name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I’ll never forget you, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
You are the reason why the Republican Party is where it is today. But the job isn't over...

| |
---
| | | My fellow Americans:

_I 'll never forget_ being on the frontlines to fight Democrat corruption.

_I 'll never forget_ defending President Trump in his sham impeachment.

_I 'll never forget_ helping force Ivy League presidents to RESIGN IN DISGRACE.

_I 'll never forget_ campaigning with President Trump across the country.

_And I will never forget_ fighting alongside YOU to save the country we both love.

THANK YOU for having my back through thick and thin, Friend. **You are the reason why the Republican Party is where it is today. But the job isn't over...**

So I'll cut to the chase:

_**[I'm partnering with my friend, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise a million dollars by the end of the quarter to help elect more strong Republicans and deliver on President Trump's powerful agenda.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zh7tjpkhcke6fcmjtm7jbmgt8qvc58v85e89np8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clh6ap70cth2bs "I’m partnering with my friend, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise a million dollars by the end of the quarter to help elect more strong Republicans and deliver on President Trump’s powerful agenda.")**_

I'm personally asking: Would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks for this noble cause?
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmv7hqaeblqhvg8l7h5qvaun6glnn8fj64oacgog_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clh6ap70cth2bs "Elise Stefanik")
---
**[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1iklhvbknk4oovku5ob1o9ik2d0e2ft7p3bh0n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clh6ap70cth2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqka42oqki0m2k69l5evdtdbj4ljkedfhe2pvhj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clh6ap70cth2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2za236o1gg332lk16hq5fdfefkt2tjbl6pjhqee08_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clh6ap70cth2bs)**
---
Please do not forget: **1)** We have one of the slimmest Majorities in the last 100 years, **2)** Democrats just crushed us in the fundraising race, and **3)** President Trump's entire legislative agenda will come to a SCREECHING HALT if we lose the House of Representatives to the Democrats.

If the Democrats manage to barge back into power, I have no doubt they will STONEWALL everything we've worked so hard for.

**I 'm doing everything I can while there's still time to prevent that. _[I just need your help.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlf8crpjtrvkjo65b8vd1etajtl1b62c3501t4fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clh6ap70cth2bs "I just need your help.")_**

Can I count on your support today?
---
**[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zou8ef74ht6v8qf5780rqi5ua6ab1db7nofbq088_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clh6ap70cth2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z20jdk9l09maga5efdrpkb865id5rhcbetp9sjvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clh6ap70cth2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdhfsv49ll5p10rkviibknvjd97r2j6gbfjuef30_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clh6ap70cth2bs)**
---
Thanks for hearing me out. God bless you!

_- Elise Stefanik_

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr2des3bb1d4ejbn33e4oli4ogv0arevdb7os8s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clh6ap70cth2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvu18bf37tu4b7dnv5b43ecuaj4114ir8c2pjb0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clh6ap70cth2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---

---

---

---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: NDRC
subject: One last push before polls close in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Will you rush a donation to help get Democracy Defenders across the finish line in critical elections?
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104934101/536897570/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2MDkwZjNmLWY5MGUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HDsleroApBwnaSGyKr8X1A8FkQ2bKxWf-7XqZC_l5AY=&emci=6245054e-730e-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d6090f3f-f90e-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

| **Know someone in Wisconsin?** Remind them to make a plan to vote before polls close at 8:00 p.m. (if they’re in line by then, they can cast their ballot). If they have any questions, they can call or text the Wisconsin Democrats’ Voter Assistance Hotline: **608-336-3232**
---

It’s Election Day in Wisconsin, Peter!
Voters have already turned out in strong numbers to cast early ballots for the supreme court race.
They understand the high stakes here. So does Elon Musk, who has spent _nearly $20 million_ trying to elect the Trump-endorsed candidate and flip control of the court.
[**We’re fighting back to preserve the Wisconsin Supreme Court’s one-seat, pro-democracy majority — will you rush a donation of $5 or more before polls close to help elect candidates like Judge Susan Crawford in Wisconsin and fair maps champions around the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104934103/536897572/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WisconsinElectionDay_email_20250401-NDRC-Tier1-WisconsinElectionDay_A&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250401-NDRC-Tier1-WisconsinElectionDay_A&utm_campaign=WisconsinElectionDay&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2MDkwZjNmLWY5MGUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HDsleroApBwnaSGyKr8X1A8FkQ2bKxWf-7XqZC_l5AY=)
On the last day of voting, we want to take a moment to reflect on what the outcome of this election will mean for folks in Wisconsin and nationwide.
Critical issues — reproductive freedom, voting rights, free elections, fair maps — are on the ballot.
Musk himself said he’s investing in this race in large part because of its stakes for redistricting. As he put it, if his candidate loses, “the Democrats will attempt to redraw the districts and cause Wisconsin to lose two Republican seats.” Republicans are doing everything they can to bring extreme partisan gerrymanders back to the state. And it’s all part of an attempt to flip the majority on the court to one that supports and enacts Trump’s far-right agenda.
This race will decide whether right-wing justices retake the court and have the power to decide high-profile cases that affect our most fundamental rights.
Wisconsin is also a key battleground state, so the makeup of the court could determine our country’s future by hearing challenges to the state’s congressional maps and new voting rules.
So with just hours left before polls close, we’re reaching out to ask if you can help power Democracy Defenders like Judge Susan Crawford to victory.
[**Please consider making a donation of $5 or more right away. We’re running out of time to turn out voters in Wisconsin, and we’ve got a lot of work ahead to elect more pro-democracy champions across the country as part of our 10 Year Plan for fair maps. Every contribution goes a long way to fight gerrymandering and protect our freedoms.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104934105/536897574/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WisconsinElectionDay_email_20250401-NDRC-Tier1-WisconsinElectionDay_A&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250401-NDRC-Tier1-WisconsinElectionDay_A&utm_campaign=WisconsinElectionDay&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2MDkwZjNmLWY5MGUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HDsleroApBwnaSGyKr8X1A8FkQ2bKxWf-7XqZC_l5AY=)
Thank you so much,
The NDRC Team

clean_body: Will you rush a donation to help get Democracy Defenders across the finish line in critical elections? | | Know someone in Wisconsin? Remind them to make a plan to vote before polls close at 8:00 p.m. (if they’re in line by then, they can cast their ballot). If they have any questions, they can call or text the Wisconsin Democrats’ Voter Assistance Hotline: 608-336-3232 It’s Election Day in Wisconsin, Peter! Voters have already turned out in strong numbers to cast early ballots for the supreme court race. They understand the high stakes here. So does Elon Musk, who has spent nearly $20 million trying to elect the Trump-endorsed candidate and flip control of the court. = On the last day of voting, we want to take a moment to reflect on what the outcome of this election will mean for folks in Wisconsin and nationwide. Critical issues — reproductive freedom, voting rights, free elections, fair maps — are on the ballot. Musk himself said he’s investing in this race in large part because of its stakes for redistricting. As he put it, if his candidate loses, “the Democrats will attempt to redraw the districts and cause Wisconsin to lose two Republican seats.” Republicans are doing everything they can to bring extreme partisan gerrymanders back to the state. And it’s all part of an attempt to flip the majority on the court to one that supports and enacts Trump’s far-right agenda. This race will decide whether right-wing justices retake the court and have the power to decide high-profile cases that affect our most fundamental rights. Wisconsin is also a key battleground state, so the makeup of the court could determine our country’s future by hearing challenges to the state’s congressional maps and new voting rules. So with just hours left before polls close, we’re reaching out to ask if you can help power Democracy Defenders like Judge Susan Crawford to victory. = Thank you so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Keep ‘Sharia cities’ out of NJ
body:
Peter, It may be April Fools’ Day, but we don’t really have time for jokes because we’re dealing with real, legit foolishness almost daily. Last week, we flagged for you that Paterson’s mayor, Andre Sayegh, called hi
| | [ ]()
---
Peter,
---
It may be April Fools’ Day, but we don’t really have time for jokes because we’re dealing with real, legit foolishness almost daily. Last week, we flagged for you that Paterson’s mayor, Andre Sayegh, called his city the “capital of Palestine” in an alarming speech as Ramadan kicked off. This is no laughing matter _(see my husband’s[op-ed](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/9de3f071b7b5a228505d20c8643c715b/eJyNkEFPwzAMhf9LzvWidkVAb9M0TVXHDgjOKG0NNUuTKPEKYep_JwO0E0gcbX9-fs8nwWiU4boXlXjnj6JYikx47MgRGl5bw6r7mhZXZb7MM6HJHLbeHp2oTr8uX4Bzuyyvi0xwdJiQh_vVuqn326ddvW8S6ZRPN_6nc5vfXHQ2d6t6J-b5T2EciTdT0g6iYn_Ec6KeUip-9DrxA7MLlZQG317RB4wv2ra46Owote2UltaRIWtgwAhOcWJSQRNCQDTAAwUY7UQILT5bj0AMaPoAE_oIrep1lMmGci51f37YYPw2M38C8jN9Og==) on this topic in the NJ Globe. He has a very personal and credible perspective). _ This week, it was reported that a Paterson cop was openly wearing a Palestinian flag on his uniform while on patrol. This comes as an Islamic center in Texas is trying to establish a muslim ‘city’ → with Governor Abbott saying that the project is being investigated and warning that Sharia law won’t be tolerated in Texas. Taken together, these are troubling events. Leftist lunatics want to boil this all down to their typical diversity and oppression narratives, when in reality, radical Islamic rhetoric generally and the Palestinian flag specifically have become synonymous in the US with antisemitism and support for Hamas-led aggression against Israel and desire for its annihilation – and _ours._ To say otherwise is to be blind to what has been going on around us. Pro-terror, extremist-Islamic ideology is in direct opposition to the principles of freedom upon which our country is built. Hamas and its ilk hate Israel and America and want to see us both wiped off the map.
---
[ Donate to Common Sense Club - Keep saying the truth out loud. ](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/02bf90f7149824ed94dc262daabb3c58/eJyNkMkKwkAMht8l52LtImpvIqWUVg8uoF5kmIk6tJ0O0ygu9N0dFzwpeE2-fMmfGxAqpigVEMGZrr4fgAMGudQSFY1rRYw_u34v9ALPgVKqIjH1UUN0-zr8AR7lMOyHDtBFo0UWs9E4S6fJNk-nmSU1M3bHf56hN_h44skozaFtf4qxkhSfrLuBiMwRH4mEtKloaUrLH4h0E7muqBUj7DRkpMYOryt3t0FcDfh8ze3h-0m3W1gd0xqVeP8iw8tL2t4BfiZmqA==)
---
You can’t be pro-Hamas and also be pro-America.
You can’t try to establish Sharia law or its principles and put America First.
You can’t call an American city the capital of a terror-harboring country and be fit to be Mayor. We’re calling it like it is. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
| [ ]()
---
President
Common Sense Club [Share this newsletter on social media!](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/0e926e5deba306606a154a8c9e2c126a/eJyNkE0LwjAMhv9Lzqtjc37tJiIyph5Ez1K7qNWtLW0mfrD_bv3Ak4KQU_LkCW9uQKi4oqyAFM50jeM2BGBRSCNR0Ugr4uI5jTtJ1I4CKKU6TqyuDaS3r8sf4NFOkl43ALoY9MhyMRzl2Xyynmbz3JOGW3_jP88g6n8849kwm0LT_BRjJWl88m4HKdkaH4kK6VPRypae3xMZl4ah0FWllUNfoqw3LW134RHRMLfnVnImJEl0TNfE9JapQ-jd3BhUxfsxOV5eF5o7InlsyQ==)

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
---

A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen. Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

subject: The Left Embraces Violence, Again

body:
The Left has crossed a terrifying line.

The Left has crossed a terrifying line.

**Democrat leaders are no longer content to just smear conservatives — they’re encouraging violence against us.** Texas Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett openly joked about physically punching Senator Ted Cruz, and mocked Governor Greg Abbott’s disability in front of a cheering crowd.
---

U.S. Rep. Jasmine Crockett (D-TX)
_Photo by Gage Skidmore_
---
They’re not hiding their hatred anymore. They’re calling for fists instead of debate. They’ve gone from cancel culture to firebombing businesses like Tesla dealerships. And they’ve nearly taken lives — Congressman Steve Scalise was almost assassinated, and President Trump barely survived an attempt on his life.

This isn’t politics. This is tyranny.

**The Democrat Party has become the party of rage, violence, and Marxism. And while the media stays silent, we must stand up — and fight back with everything we’ve got.**

The Senate Conservatives Fund is leading the charge to elect bold, unapologetic conservative fighters who will stand up to this madness and defend our Constitution.

But we can’t do it without you. **Your donation today helps us fight for true conservatives like Ted Cruz — men and women who won't back down.**

Time is running out. The Left is on the march. It’s up to us to stop them — before it’s too late.

---
**ELON MUSK’S MESSAGE TO EVERY AMERICAN ABOUT THE FUTURE OF DOGE THAT EVERY TRUMP VOTER HAS TO READ BEFORE THE DAY IS OVER:**
**_"All we're trying to do is restore the will of the people through the president. There's a vast unelected Federal bureaucracy that is opposed to the President and the cabinet. _**
**_DC voting is 92% Kamala, that's a lot. That's basically almost everyone. If the will of the President is not implemented, and the President is representative of the people, that means the will of the people isn't being implemented. _**
**_That means we don't live in a democracy we live in a bureaucracy. I think what we're seeing here is a thrashing of the bureaucracy while we try to reestablish democracy and the will of the people."_**
—---
Thank you for taking the time to read Elon’s message.
The heartbreaking fact is, even with the control of the White House & Congress, the entrenched federal bureaucracy is doing everything possible to take out Elon Musk for good.
A corrupt network of Obama-appointed activist judges has already ruled against President Trump’s most ambitious executive orders.
**_And now, Democrat members of Congress are calling for street violence against Elon Musk and EVERY Trump supporter._**
President Trump & Elon are doing everything they can, but the fact is, they can only do so much.
The real power lies with grassroots Patriots like you.
Your response - _right here, right now_ \- will send a message loud & clear that **WE THE PEOPLE** stand with President Trump & Elon at this critical moment in history.
But it has to be immediate, and it has to be massive.
Because anything short of an overwhelming response will be a failure.
**[So before Democrats levy their next round of attacks against DOGE, can we count on you to go on the record and say I STAND WITH DOGE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu4earh01kbi546eqit0uh18pgja9jk5ibtlvc80_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clh66o70c3h2bs)**

subject: Present and Accounted For!
body:
| Joyce?Joyce?Joyce?Joyce? ---|---|---
# [Present and Accounted For!](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F04%2F01%2Fpresent-and-accounted-for%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=f68818d48b48a4d9b17ece8d4be81e50&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| | By **Elizabeth Farnham** on April 1, 2025
---|---
Joyce?Joyce?Joyce?Joyce?
Farnham?
HERE!
“I, [name], do solemnly swear that I will support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic; that I will bear true faith and allegiance to the same; that I take this obligation freely, without any mental reservation or purpose of evasion, and that I will well and faithfully discharge the duties of the office on which I am about to enter. So help me God.”
This is the oath of office that US Representative for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District (PA-13), John Joyce, M.D., swore this past January.
And yet, he has already broken it.
In an age when President Donald Trump has trampled the US Constitution by declaring Executive Orders that directly contradict the 14th Amendment or reach past the authority granted to the executive branch of our government with an egregiousness heretofore unseen, John Joyce is nowhere to be found raising any objection.
According to multiple constituents of his confiding to me, John Joyce has not answered phone calls, requests for in-person Town Halls, and heartfelt letters and emails, nor has he made any known public statements addressing Trump’s violations of the Constitution of the United States, like Trump’s use of US Immigration and Custom Enforcement (ICE) agents to deport people from our country without due process. Meanwhile, Trump’s shadow president, Elon Musk, continues to gut federal programs and its work force under the false claim of ferreting out fraud and abuse through the unapproved-by-Congress Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). But the major abuses happening are Trump and Musk’s illegal firings of dedicated government employees and impoundment of Congressionally-approved funding for federal agencies whose work they don’t like.
And John Joyce simply hides in silence. Heck, even his sign at his Abbottstown office tries to hide.
However, I, Beth Farnham, refiled candidate for PA-13, am absolutely addressing these issues. On March 2nd, I recorded a virtual Town Hall which you can view here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/g3YM76FgMOk?si=ato-K4jNYiYv5kiY](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=2c84bae2c59b03f5865ca6f59d734ef17e3004fddb174cf273c8bbb5817558c9&blog_id=213069660&post_id=4879&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=6ba4993459c96fc539175c7f9fd5d744&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vbGl2ZS9nM1lNNzZGZ01Paz9zaT1hdG8tSzRqTllpWXY1a2lZ&email_id=ac030fe560f82053f61b87a03fe2e1c1)
I also invite you to follow my links below to my Facebook posts about these issues specifically:
Social Security
“Additionally, closures in PA-13, like the SSA office in Chambersburg, as well as cutting thousands of SSA staff will further inhibit accessibility of recipients to their promised funding. And we’re not entirely sure that Musk and his DOGE bros won’t simply cut off the benefits to legitimate recipients or fire the wrong people by colossal mistake, just like they accidentally fired the federal workers who oversee our nuclear arsenal and had to scramble to rehire them. That kind of incompetence will kill innocent Americans.” [https://www.facebook.com/share/p/15uTaGy4kD/](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f03253617a67a8e0192e83f847d4d15bc0c915dac4e994f387163998d31c4e4e&blog_id=213069660&post_id=4879&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=615825a983663d999b1dcc7812ea394a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3NoYXJlL3AvMTV1VGFHeTRrRC8&email_id=ac030fe560f82053f61b87a03fe2e1c1)
Medicaid
“Over 166K residents [in PA-13 rely on Medicaid], plus those who rely on expanded Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act, nicknamed "Obamacare" by Republicans so their racist constituents would turn against it. 166k is over 21% of our District's People! In other words, at least one fifth of the people who live in PA13 are enrolled in Medicaid for their healthcare because they QUALIFY. “
[https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1AJXmTjDgv/](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=cd0e4a1dcc3f1980b9b5b586ab086b23c5165af1a40bbff3a1486972b0012fc7&blog_id=213069660&post_id=4879&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=fed529b0956705211b0ac4f2ecd7c631&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3NoYXJlL3AvMUFKWG1UakRndi8&email_id=ac030fe560f82053f61b87a03fe2e1c1)
US Department of Education
“With over 50 public K-12 school districts, public brick-and-mortar charter schools, and public vocational schools, it is no surprise that PA-13 depends on federal funding of more than $120M for IDEA, Title I, Title II, Title III, Title IV, and Tile V programs that support individuals with disabilities, low-achieving students in high poverty schools, adult basic education, English as a second language instruction, college affordability, and rural education, career, and technical training, respectively.”
[https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1EoKYxLtPe/](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f95dd2a2f5f1b5f733cafd119712858972e8bb8f066c4bcaacab618fd9e50c8f&blog_id=213069660&post_id=4879&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=fa73daa01dd4bac7b9a7a2e78bae6a9a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3NoYXJlL3AvMUVvS1l4THRQZS8&email_id=ac030fe560f82053f61b87a03fe2e1c1)
Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act
“Only, the SAVE Act runs the risk of denying voting rights currently to most married women. This is because most married women’s names do not match the names published on their birth certificates, which they are more likely to hold than a current passport.
In PA-13, married women numbered 202,957, according to the 2023 census bureau data.”
[https://www.facebook.com/share/p/14G2wqmxFVt/](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=2bacfa21c57fee8b0e20245d45c48c820e3bb7aacd853b8ef679bbb130a42e83&blog_id=213069660&post_id=4879&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=b3490ab1c4dbfac74f9f0fb988e53275&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3NoYXJlL3AvMTRHMndxbXhGVnQv&email_id=ac030fe560f82053f61b87a03fe2e1c1)
Signal War Plan Chat
“Hypocrisy - claiming that Hilary Clinton compromised national security by installing a server in her home for some work - related emails that an investigation determined didn't contain information or emails clearly marked "classified."
Not batting an eye over Trump's administrators using the Signal app which is unapproved for government communications, and certainly not approved for war plans, all while including an unauthorized member of The Press in the chat.”
[https://www.facebook.com/share/p/15kffKvvSb/](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=231464e12116b94ba2ef44c39898ecbaf90c2586697e2a1d19cccccefc37a846&blog_id=213069660&post_id=4879&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=948d49de104d30dab181ca16a8011577&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3NoYXJlL3AvMTVrZmZLdnZTYi8&email_id=ac030fe560f82053f61b87a03fe2e1c1)
Due Process
“In addition to the right of due process, undocumented immigrants also have the rights to legal counsel, to be with family, and against unreasonable searches and seizures.”
[https://www.facebook.com/share/p/16DdrN9yuW/](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e399df754623438032c528508c5205c928869292dc0baecda4ada991da38082a&blog_id=213069660&post_id=4879&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=5eb6937fd1d1490ed23c85600733ce9a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3NoYXJlL3AvMTZEZHJOOXl1Vy8&email_id=ac030fe560f82053f61b87a03fe2e1c1)
Broken USDA contracts for PA-13 farmers
“Considering the Trump’s administration’s illegal rupture of USDA contracts with 190 farms across Pennsylvania, including 25 farms in our 13th Congressional district, one would think that Joyce would take a stand against this breach of trust.”
[https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1AGfY12DWV/](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=6d058a9562fc6f05be83f6aa1597c5b8c978ce50a9f621b37b35814e89729331&blog_id=213069660&post_id=4879&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=7a2021a81c39674e504e77ff84608ba6&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3NoYXJlL3AvMUFHZlkxMkRXVi8&email_id=ac030fe560f82053f61b87a03fe2e1c1)
Measles epidemic
“With nearly 500 cases of measles in 19 states, including 2 new cases in Erie and Bucks counties of Pennsylvania, one would expect the US Representative of Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, a medical doctor no less, to make a statement.
But is John Joyce, M.D. urging his constituents to be vaccinated against measles, to have their doctors check their titres if unsure of their vaccine status, to ask other parents about their vaccine philosophies, and/or is he criticizing the life-threatening advice from the Director of Health and Human Services, antivaxxer Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.?
No, John Joyce can’t be found...”
[https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1CKapcL2QY/](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=7250335e1e0b38bf7eb7002fca9c1bd498d80c2f8faa745011068baff5f1cbdf&blog_id=213069660&post_id=4879&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=1bcfd74f5440c0c812f6e5ea662a618b&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3NoYXJlL3AvMUNLYXBjTDJRWS8&email_id=ac030fe560f82053f61b87a03fe2e1c1)
In the future, I will have more information about more issues and participate in an in-person Town Hall, whose details I am working on with a committee developed for this purpose. In the meantime, however, please share with your friends, family, and coworkers my positions on the things that affect them most.
Together, we Choose Democracy
(Please donate to my campaign here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=578b78a8247c6811b775e2641a1144b074b37cf136d5485d8677b9f6e4e6206b&blog_id=213069660&post_id=4879&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=0617dc9d545b17f812e99f71fba3ab32&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=ac030fe560f82053f61b87a03fe2e1c1))

Farnham? HERE! “I, [name], do solemnly swear that I will support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic; that I will bear true faith and allegiance to the same; that I take this obligation freely, without any mental reservation or purpose of evasion, and that I will well and faithfully discharge the duties of the office on which I am about to enter. So help me God.” This is the oath of office that US Representative for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District (PA-13), John Joyce, M.D., swore this past January. And yet, he has already broken it. In an age when President Donald Trump has trampled the US Constitution by declaring Executive Orders that directly contradict the 14th Amendment or reach past the authority granted to the executive branch of our government with an egregiousness heretofore unseen, John Joyce is nowhere to be found raising any objection. According to multiple constituents of his confiding to me, John Joyce has not answered phone calls, requests for in-person Town Halls, and heartfelt letters and emails, nor has he made any known public statements addressing Trump’s violations of the Constitution of the United States, like Trump’s use of US Immigration and Custom Enforcement (ICE) agents to deport people from our country without due process. Meanwhile, Trump’s shadow president, Elon Musk, continues to gut federal programs and its work force under the false claim of ferreting out fraud and abuse through the unapproved-by-Congress Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). But the major abuses happening are Trump and Musk’s illegal firings of dedicated government employees and impoundment of Congressionally-approved funding for federal agencies whose work they don’t like. And John Joyce simply hides in silence. Heck, even his sign at his Abbottstown office tries to hide. However, I, Beth Farnham, refiled candidate for PA-13, am absolutely addressing these issues. On March 2nd, I recorded a virtual Town Hall which you can view here: I also invite you to follow my links below to my Facebook posts about these issues specifically: Social Security “Additionally, closures in PA-13, like the SSA office in Chambersburg, as well as cutting thousands of SSA staff will further inhibit accessibility of recipients to their promised funding. And we’re not entirely sure that Musk and his DOGE bros won’t simply cut off the benefits to legitimate recipients or fire the wrong people by colossal mistake, just like they accidentally fired the federal workers who oversee our nuclear arsenal and had to scramble to rehire them. That kind of incompetence will kill innocent Americans.” Medicaid “Over 166K residents [in PA-13 rely on Medicaid], plus those who rely on expanded Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act, nicknamed "Obamacare" by Republicans so their racist constituents would turn against it. 166k is over 21% of our District's People! In other words, at least one fifth of the people who live in PA13 are enrolled in Medicaid for their healthcare because they QUALIFY. “ US Department of Education “With over 50 public K-12 school districts, public brick-and-mortar charter schools, and public vocational schools, it is no surprise that PA-13 depends on federal funding of more than $120M for IDEA, Title I, Title II, Title III, Title IV, and Tile V programs that support individuals with disabilities, low-achieving students in high poverty schools, adult basic education, English as a second language instruction, college affordability, and rural education, career, and technical training, respectively.” Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act “Only, the SAVE Act runs the risk of denying voting rights currently to most married women. But is John Joyce, M.D. urging his constituents to be vaccinated against measles, to have their doctors check their titres if unsure of their vaccine status, to ask other parents about their vaccine philosophies, and/or is he criticizing the life-threatening advice from the Director of Health and Human Services, antivaxxer Robert F. ## Can’t make it to St. Louis?
### _We’ll bring the conference to you!_
Anyone interested in learning more about how we secure our elections in 2026 and beyond invited to watch the livestream conference presentations. **KEYNOTE SPEAKERS:** **Joe Hoft, **TV/radio host, author, and The Gateway Pundit contributor and **Ann Vandersteel, **media personality known for her “SteelTruth” podcast Learn how you can help USA secure legitimate representative government. USA Chair Harry Haury and CEO Marly Hornik will present the USA Solution, a strategic, constitutional approach to holding election officials accountable and securing every control point in the election system.
## **Topics include investigation, litigation, prosecution, legislation, advocacy and outreach.**
Learn how the Constitution, federal law, and USA’s peer-reviewed data analysis provide the foundation and tools for securing the election process from end to end.
* Connect with citizens nationwide working to secure liberty for future generations,
* Gain the knowledge to educate others on this critical national security issue,
* Be the inspirational team player you were born for, while saving your country, and
* Join the citizen advocacy force more powerful than money.

---

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/yREhOjOT111uoM5ybVveS1nq5oeCbNO6XhTpaUpVFdjXsezEKMAk25wiSdX1LqMAtAPLHEAHPxyBKoIwXimYKzRA_i42DesORNqazu1Duwu4nTRRRGtukreyLUwE7spxh0_lzTGR2a_gE6nIHm-bVNrU9EKZfVzLtdcanEneKCF30VGJTDNiS2kP_Ov6vnC9d1CnYOtfDfqoi8Amv-CnYKTUZIwGa7OVwrWYPUM3Iycl4NyDfz-HdFSUbeOOhssfg1W0dA/Ti33ifgHTiOtBA-Y8cWabapcvatSgeN5/7)

## The Left’s Imaginary COVID-19 ‘Reckoning’
When I first came across Jonathan Chait’s new Atlantic piece, “Why the COVID Reckoning Is So One-Sided,” I assumed the answer would be that Democrats had been the ones relentlessly and tragically wrong about virtually everything during the pandemic. No such luck. In Chait’s telling, the Left remains uncannily open-minded, always striving for truth, while [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Ss2yZh4aJTl2heCsqUi5rWp76vWT2fgF0lvFZBARgz7lYUrRlaFGwhzVB-vo99HNAa4OuoFBPg3QYLdJsixbWn56-qfsQZYdCvSfCYk5ch_-_UcX_XiXnqBmXH5D49btA0bUxIli-FHQS1WSJvzNTVqdiQWNX-F_OmrunQR-hcQNtQBa8rV38C-EXHaHVPafad9jRel5w_vCS9dj9w9_fu11f6m1hl0BoIEytBsxtakIj-PBySW4mNYLaDbjjS_i1JScdkrMrulRcQdfT2J9Y_2Tg82YTJlu4dfAE8MfE8X8d8APW-Sob2OdMJ5vaXQ/1X723tQ4aD4-W49m7-hoHGWPuaB-D2mX/7)
---
| |
## Parents Find Ally for Compliance With Trump Edict on Girls Sports
FIRST ON THE DAILY SIGNAL—A conservative organization for parents is equipping them to challenge their elected representatives who are defying President Donald Trump’s executive order protecting women’s sports. The American Parents Coalition will send parents a form they can send to their legislators urging them to adhere to Trump’s directive keeping biological males out of [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/esap2p4aaAoNyjf6_HLLDmO1r1VZBDmZPyzgvRu81bcoY4-E909maEiS1xe7IODdpwbcOsQ5r7B_QDicGHO_1AhozDbpmvzBxRuTvRUV5lWduOqtf8SB-OouWQ6PMrjnkGxeixJjqyE_fZO28d12-QEsn569HjmYiu2glkkmDaSXKtMrZI0DhZSALZZxfajPswdxRFAfX1FkGPxubPz3OwNdJ-qss2uxvN5Cnps6dV1eL8qTR5XBQOCVTC7C1QAox0_bxkBULgbo3eANVPi3r0aiZr3ieOeRLi-pgb--qnSOalw1osNgDTwFqoYKjyM0CABhKKex1e4Q0PzCqTld7rQJaqRQ-OsPao8/SVyX1GxkHRidt_rIOIRei4fAvBQe1Isr/7)

| |
## Iran finally at the ‘tipping point’ * WorldNetDaily * by Hamid Enayat
Although “Nowruz,” the Iranian New Year that began on the first day of spring, March 21, supposedly marks a moment of renewal and reflection, this year it marks something far more consequential: the unraveling of the brutal theocratic Tehran regime’s decades-long strategy for survival. In his New Year’s address, Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei drew a [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/1NBA-yjkOrdokO7WNCseIFyKlEIUZMijY9jEyQf6UfT27A3GHHD9bdL3o1VrYcj472wzg2w1aDGhfPDcbxuwGEyDoBL_o5Bsm02Xyk0r4LoYj0bIVCUKRJQOErVpeXOwZBR-ELHdr8A6l5Po0XEV5kq_11Y7mGuXXpW53StYPFi6v_ViyU2uJIqueUNMGmNK_QYK0B9ezKCnib0IEjgB4-oV_sOPb5gK3gs9MenGBGRBUekPXNdIdpdSWl5TvYMIYVvYbKOIGTT87qdzBBPOmn8Tx_w5sVsDPJAP1JB5WDl8A_19QJVWn1hPKMUbflH8klG55c2Ft-TYQFFcpkS3A49MhWFm0Snd/yLAXxN0Qjh9S7nXGtgUP3U6L8SK3G5YW/7)

| |
## A Vertical Trip to the Poles – RedState
As Europe goes back to the drawing board, following a mild setback in its space flight efforts, Elon Musk's SpaceX decided to do something completely different: Let's go up and down, not right to left. Liftoff of Fram2 and the @framonauts! pic.twitter.com/XBL5juCnHQ — SpaceX (@SpaceX) April 1, 2025 READ [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/H8qzqSt4m35hURdJF5feqfMjxsSIRDerUbKC2oOL4LCGKHs_kqcjzgnDK26Cr-v9_c84QLA5CCymqTFwdSSmQCGzx_wbWYCQFtfVzd8OSPrZibjH2f2h7j8m_aPcEe9saF_ElnXcNy1Z0qOXF9T8lYAbG8WG4AE1a1pkR0v0LuZwGXzLGmnDoB0gXo0ar9O49YZTQDpWxruQiEOuEcSXQfd4Ba-jkRxfxxr84K6j9pZXRuebSuKhhQfu0yOAkGPfQchJh_X0sF-ApUSitmDN7kPy5lDXMiv9iIgTsrmisnygP1SjgwtfZPznucWTTQ/sg6d5leKLE5Gw6Gh1929XW-mT4d7br5H/7)

## NPR and PBS Are Begging for Mercy. They Don’t Deserve It.
NPR and PBS used to justify their unjustifiable taxpayer funding by telling people that poor children would be harmed if their educational programming was cut. Then, in 2015, “Sesame Street” got a private deal with HBO, and a stream of educational content came online. Now, the mantra is that without public broadcasting, there will be no advance warning systems [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/CYjoo7A3gvPc3cOSHPjLNGdOAYlAJ_WWNTfXoi8ab3-mncmDs4mp1cwNZx76_0VtcpXRG7iKCoUsFVQXLMToZ9o1DE2aX_E4x-oIPFrdcvgvAyWqj7zjS2Luo4qpab-ZcKHDMjQVxpNCa99iSFySWma8zBhsprGOqqk347LDw49MbNCFppgE6QFGS_T3pf58qoAVVHoGg-_6r0PKwbBrnbvwdfDl_KQimcRL0Or-3xKu2igB2fDH1u3JfkD8sd9NQMD8k5Q0A-LFst9P4EWXLmAhP27-aczwfNy0TZj_pRS2NeXzlaNj1bn5bbI1w39ulTXtvrcbVD5BUq6s4lf3/bLQjNAA1WMP7rLl0JcbMIcUi4q9IGJsf/7)

name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: Democratic Committees File Lawsuit to Block Trump’s Executive Order to Undermine Elections
body:
| | | | | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1b908c9cbe&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | | | |
---
|
# **Democratic Committees, Leaders Schumer and Jeffries File Lawsuit to Block Trump’s Executive Order to Undermine Elections**
---
| | | _Democrats challenge Trump’s attempt to violate the Constitution and multiple federal laws, and attack the rights of married women, members of the military, and mail voters_
In response to Trump’s illegal [Executive Order](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0781a13372&e=d6c5c7d7ec) that attempts to suppress voters, upend voter registration systems and hand over sensitive information to DOGE, stop states from counting eligible mail ballots, and withhold federal election funding from dozens of states in the process, the Democratic National Committee (DNC), Democratic Governors Association (DGA), Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC), Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC), and Democratic Senate and House leaders Chuck Schumer and Hakeem Jeffries, have sued President Trump, DOGE, and other departments within the Trump Administration in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia to block this order.

_**DNC Chair Ken Martin, DGA Chair Laura Kelly, DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand, DCCC Chair Suzan DelBene, Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer, and House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries released the following statement:**_
“This executive order is an unconstitutional power grab from Donald Trump that attacks vote by mail, gives DOGE sensitive personal information and makes it harder for states to run their own free and fair elections. It will even make it harder for military members serving overseas and married women who have changed their name to have their votes count. Donald Trump and DOGE are doing this as an attempt to rationalize their repeatedly debunked conspiracy theories and set the groundwork to throw out legal votes and ignore election outcomes they do not like. It's anti-American and Democrats are using every tool at our disposal – including taking Trump to court – to stop this illegal overreach that undermines our democracy."
**To view the full lawsuit, click**[**here**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6d5bb50843&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**.**

Summary of Trump’s Illegal Executive Order:
* Attacks dozens of States that properly and lawfully allow mail ballots cast by Election Day to count if _received_ within a certain time frame;
* Forces numerous federal agencies to reveal sensitive personal information about millions of voters to the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (“DOGE”) without any consent or statutory authority;
* Tramples upon the independence and bipartisan structure of the Election Assistance Commission (“EAC”), an agency created in the wake of the 2000 presidential election to improve election administration and voter access in coordination with States; and
* Threatens to deprive States of crucial federal grants needed to fund elections and law enforcement if they do not follow the President’s commands at the detriment of voters.

---
| ###

|

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Watch my interview on "The Count"
body:
| | |
---
| | Friend,
---
| | For far too long, we’ve been funding both sides of the obesity epidemic. But for the first time in a long time, we have leadership willing to talk about the problems and implement real solutions. I joined _The Count_ on Newsmax to discuss the critical work being done to **Make America Healthy Again**! **WATCH THE VIDEO ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**
---
| | [| | |
---|---|---](http://e.americanxt.com/c/eJyEks1y4jgURp9G7EhJV3944QXgUQiQEAdIgA0lS7It_4BjGxLy9FOT6U5Vr3p9ztnc-9mQBSADMXAhkYxyIrCQgzzkWqeSJgmXBKeB1Zwzi0damhHVieTJwIeAgWOGCWGYYH5HGSRcSgYs0Iw6hxjWtWu90afP_s6c60EV5n3fIDpGoBCoyp_K7u5PB4G6IFCm8qZEVB17RKMRSyShjgpODEtwqlMhDVgucAo81RqBONaIRjSxAMJSzEAwLo22ELiUO0o0EUCC_zyHaGT_WRWPZv70ur-_Xs79LiObSXvavah4H8XP5ayhyt6mmG1IN8zUceGi7GHr43O1kO_L96kubn6dpOvobf2c3zfDh0N5VbeonC0Xq_mnlTXmdhlPSBcNo8vy4uc3NZVPVfHJHl_SA5m2fbe7bUmxuK-kuizX-S7ygZgsdrmPS-7HS0yLJJ98FWKf6JVa2nPRwvXms7dJzw56n5fpbs4PeONf0rG6imLy8RXHjM2i1_a8vppgPK-39Tw1RxVMF9vXuTnkq2MzzceVnw03tBrUrtdW9zpEcoIAatd1OnMPFgF8Pwf-fklAMEUAvaubSvc_LZEEB4zy_2nTngtn-t8QhAx-EaPrRvvs9NNRLCmTIySjQRva5sNXle-ERAxntfbV93yuIfwbAAD__yN4zcE "Bobby Jindal on The Count")
| | _Here's a great line from the interview: _

“In America, 40% of people are obese, and the rate is rising. It’s impacting our kids, too. We’re seeing increasing rates of diabetes, anxiety, and depression. Clearly, something is going wrong. We’ve been funding both the problem and the treatment. What Secretary Kennedy and President Trump are saying with ‘Make America Healthy Again’ is: let’s prevent this in the first place. Instead of just treating chronic disease and giving our kids more prescription drugs, let’s give them healthy food.”
---
God Bless, Bobby

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, | | For far too long, we’ve been funding both sides of the obesity epidemic. But for the first time in a long time, we have leadership willing to talk about the problems and implement real solutions. I joined The Count on Newsmax to discuss the critical work being done to Make America Healthy Again! WATCH THE VIDEO ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | "Bobby Jindal on The Count" | | Here's a great line from the interview: “In America, 40% of people are obese, and the rate is rising. It’s impacting our kids, too. We’re seeing increasing rates of diabetes, anxiety, and depression. Clearly, something is going wrong. We’ve been funding both the problem and the treatment. What Secretary Kennedy and President Trump are saying with ‘Make America Healthy Again’ is: let’s prevent this in the first place. Instead of just treating chronic disease and giving our kids more prescription drugs, let’s give them healthy food.” God Bless, Bobby | | | | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by AmericaNext

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: Is your business prepared for the future?
body:
| Hi Peter, Did you know the regions with the highest first-year business success rates include California, Kentucky, and Massachusetts?1 On the other hand, Washington state, D.C., and Idaho face more challenges during those critical first 12 months.1 What sets successful businesses apart? Factors like access to capital, economic conditions, and strategic planning all play a role. One of the most impactful ways to ensure your business thrives in the long run is by creating a thoughtful succession plan.
---
|
---
Having a plan isn't just about avoiding disruptions — it's about ensuring your business is prepared for smooth transitions, continued growth, and long-term success. In this month's **Visual Insights Newsletter** , we share key tips for building a succession plan that works for your business. From nurturing leadership pipelines to creating a flexible exit strategy, these insights can help you feel confident about the road ahead. [**Click here to explore actionable tips for your business's future.**](https://financeinsights.net/0zwNT44dKS2lBbZFxKj5zfkQqmK?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Don't wait for a sudden change or challenge to start planning. A proactive approach now can help you navigate transitions seamlessly and prepare for what's next. Ready to take the next step toward securing your business's future? **[Click here!](https://financeinsights.net/0zwNT44dKS2lBbZFxKj5zfkQqmK?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)** Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6IlBRcU90QUFxMWk4RVFPNSIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. Where do you want your business to be in 5, 10, or even 15 years? Hit "reply" and share your answer. I'd love to hear more about your plans and what kind of progress you've been able to make toward your bigger goals.[](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuZ29vZ2xlLmNvbVwvIiwiaGFzaCI6IlBRcU90QUFxMWk4RVFPNSIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: The Party of Violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
The Left has crossed a terrifying line.

| | |
---
|
---
The Left has crossed a terrifying line.

**Democrat leaders are no longer content to just smear conservatives — they’re encouraging violence against us.** Texas Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett openly joked about physically punching Senator Ted Cruz, and mocked Governor Greg Abbott’s disability in front of a cheering crowd.
---
---
U.S. Rep. Jasmine Crockett (D-TX)
_Photo by Gage Skidmore_
---
They’re not hiding their hatred anymore. They’re calling for fists instead of debate. They’ve gone from cancel culture to firebombing businesses like Tesla dealerships. And they’ve nearly taken lives — Congressman Steve Scalise was almost assassinated, and President Trump barely survived an attempt on his life.

This isn’t politics. This is tyranny.

**The Democrat Party has become the party of rage, violence, and Marxism. And while the media stays silent, we must stand up — and fight back with everything we’ve got.**

The Senate Conservatives Fund is leading the charge to elect bold, unapologetic conservative fighters who will stand up to this madness and defend our Constitution.

But we can’t do it without you. **Your donation today helps us fight for true conservatives like Ted Cruz — men and women who won't back down.**

**[**DONATE NOW to defend liberty and restore our Republic.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zekprc5ef5sc0g7ocgmbncvkbv5btpnlpdp07f7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clj68pj6cdh2bs)** You can donate to SCF and we will use your donation to help all of our supported conservatives in the Senate. You can also donate directly to specific senators through SCF, and we transfer it to their campaigns.

Time is running out. The Left is on the march. It’s up to us to stop them — before it’s too late.
---
|
---
---
Senate Conservatives Fund seeks to serve grassroots patriots by providing safe and effective ways to make political contributions.

▶︎ No RINO candidates. ▶︎ No unelectable candidates. ▶︎ No fake "10X" matching scams. ▶︎ No contributions required for surveys. ▶︎ No hidden fees taken out of candidate contributions.
---
|
---

---

---
|
---

300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

---
---

---
Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Let’s be clear: **this race is huge.** Control of Wisconsin’s Supreme Court is on the line. So is reproductive freedom, voting rights, public education, and basically everything Musk and his far-right friends want to gut.
**He might have crypto claws and a bottomless bank account, but he’s still just another billionaire trying to buy our courts.**

---

A young left wing student **[confronted Charlie Kirk](https://substack.com/redirect/bce84835-ce2a-4a94-a649-2bab546a9f9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a campus speaking event, attempting to prove that the MAGA movement is "a cult."
Kirk's response completely turned the tables on her and made her regret making the insulting claim.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bce84835-ce2a-4a94-a649-2bab546a9f9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bce84835-ce2a-4a94-a649-2bab546a9f9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"My statement/question is would you agree that the MAGA movement is a cult?" she girl asked Kirk.
Kirk paused before answering the absurd question, "No... why don't you eplain to me what a cult is."
The girl turned the prompt right back on Kirk, to which he began listing features of a cult and cult-like behavior. "A charismatic leader that constantly lied to people, they take you out of everyday normal life and leads you to ostracization and cutting family ties,... am I getting closer to describing the Democrat party?" Kirk joked.
The girl further claimed that members of the MAGA movement will "agree with Trump no matter what."
Kirk explained that there was wide-spanning intellectual diversity within the MAGA movement itself, "So what you're trying to say is 'what the leader says the leader gets' basically... We have lots of disagreements in the MAGA movement, in fact I'm far more pro-life than the President. A lot of people in this audience would have differing views on where the President is at on Israel and Gaza,... I would argue that we have far more intellectual diversity in the MAGA movement than your traditional Democrat party."
"Would you agree that when the Democrats sat during the State of the Union Address to not applaud a kid with brain cancer, that is cult-like behavior?" Kirk asked the student.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bce84835-ce2a-4a94-a649-2bab546a9f9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Michael Knowles STEAMROLLS Democrat bully during off-the-rails rant on Trump rape accusation
Conservative podcaster Michael Knowles **[took on a raging anti-Trump liberal](https://substack.com/redirect/5f17f009-e886-49ad-bee3-26e41781953c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on the Piers Morgan show, humiliating him in front of millions.
_**" Excuse me one second, you have a very difficult time listening!" **_

During the panel discussion, anti-Trump podcaster Brian Shapiro claimed that President Trump is "a liable sexual abuser."
"Most of us don't really believe that Trump is a rapist or anything," Knowles responded. "E. Jean Carroll went on T.V. and said that rape was 'sexy,' she seems a little bit odd, I'm skeptical of her claims."
"25 women!" Shapiro interrupted.
"Excuse me one second, I'm just going to try to finish my point like a civilized human being," Knowles clapped back.

# The Signal Leak Is a Nothing Burger--Democrats Are Just Desperate
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/54d686c1-3ded-4033-b7a8-741ce76c09da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy Giuliani**
Listen up, folks--the media's at it again, trying to turn a molehill into Mount Everest. This so-called "Signal app leak" they're screaming about? It's a nothing burger, plain and simple. The Trump administration pulled off a flawless military strike against Houthi terrorists in Yemen--no Americans hurt, no soldiers killed in action, just a bunch of bad guys taken out. And yet, the Democrats and their lapdog press are clutching their pearls, demanding Pete Hegseth and other Trump officials get the axe over what? A group chat that could've been tighter but didn't cost a single American life? Give me a break.
Let's put this in perspective. These are the same hypocrites who spent years playing cover for Joe Biden's disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan. Remember that debacle? Thirteen brave Marines lost their lives because of Biden's incompetence--abandoning allies, leaving billions in equipment for the Taliban, and turning Kabul into a terrorist playground. Did the media call for heads to roll then? Nope. They buried it, just like they buried the fact that our president for the last four years was mentally checked out, stumbling through speeches and forgetting where he was half the time. But now, when Trump's team scores a win, they're grasping at straws to make this Signal slip-up sound like Watergate. It's pathetic...

| Peter,

My team and I spoke a lot last month about the importance of reaching our quarterly fundraising goal. Hitting our marks sets our campaign up for success, and I’m proud to announce that because of your commitment, we reached ours!

Hitting our goals is even more critical in the face of intense outside Republican spending and attack ads. As this race continues to heat up, we’ll be seeing even more of it, especially with polls showing my opponent and I neck-and-neck.

We have a challenging road ahead, but I know with you in my corner, we’ll mount yet another winning campaign this November! So at this moment, I just want to say thank you.

I’m eager to see what the following months hold for our campaign, and I’m so grateful for your support along the way.

With sincere appreciation,

Abigail

subject: Looking down the barrel
body:
I need you in this fight – are you with me?
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMuO4jAQRb_G2RHZVXYcFl4MgzzSjAYhsaHZGdtpjOw8nJCIv29B02yrTtU9uib1MTR3ReSGAFyCGwkAwV8EYPhYUr5d078_qxNeh9VQ7ZJ4bOH3C53hDbfWiGF_cFd6MCNL3XQ8xzyzNz7de_-GX6GlTybEx1RuC6ewcZQXXjHJUbC1EKy4KCOpr7D2lauxoRbPshbN2lvfOOm8wSIooCAop4xxIZGXzmEFaJllYo01F4TTZ05pks_BGjZOi8m561Jpu1REdZmmfnyKaQJ6yV3Z3mz0t_H7zHaJgH4pE9AzAb1pd1727bGqCOpnabjdnIzXef_3f5GV65cQYxgrSTj9_HlTzAq-AgAA__82uG-J)

Patriot – the latest poll in **FL-6** has me locked in a dead heat with my radical leftist opponent **inside the******margin of error****.
We are staring down the barrel of a loss that could rip Congress apart and unleash chaos.
The other side smells blood in the water, and they’re pouring in **_millions of dollars_** to buy this race... And if the latest poll is any indication, **their strategy might be working**.

[DEFEND THE MAJORITY](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GumzAQRb_G7ECesQ28BYu2UbqoVFV6m7Yb5NhD4gjjZAxB-fsnUJSl7z3yPWPjbQzDsxPNd4F4CT4LRKG-CcT7vzXyco2_fpb_1fVe3uvf0Wwt_nihD3zDk7Pm_ufTX-WnzRDT_Pc08gPe-Py80Rt-jVYUbRi3tDkUvlODl7qgDhqtDHwYA8WlQ_RgPJAeTq1UvnZgG2wbY0iCG9q2CB1KNFJLAG0apSvvVY3KgQPzoVpthJb7TmUjcXAW8rxa5pRi5VIsxu4yz7e8ix0FHjO5halaw8TkN0Lgke3kn-UQJiqHxKVL05kp560Zep-mPsWeuOehjIl6zv2upBRsX6rjMsc-p4UdCXWY3Ciw3qJIPixRqMOJX8lMvL1XhoI7f1vDOIZcN0LL837B5vvo8CsAAP__rcuHAQ)
In a race this close every second - and every dollar - can make every difference in the world. But right now, we can’t **_respond to the attacks_** being levied against me.
****
**Without additional resources I have no way of countering the lies flooding the airwaves.** That's why I’m coming to you asking, whatever you can spare, please chip in a contribution of any amount right now.
This isn’t about politics as usual, it’s about saving the House of Representatives from descending into chaos. Your donation today isn’t just a contribution, it could be the difference between victory and a defeat that could haunt us for years if we fail.

[CLOSE THE GAP](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GumzAQRb_G7ECesQ28BYu2UbqoVFV6m7Yb5NhD4gjjZAxB-fsnUJSl7z3yPWPjbQzDsxPNd4F4CT4LRKG-CcT7vzXyco2_fpb_1fVe3uvf0Wwt_nihD3zDk7Pm_ufTX-WnzRDT_Pc08gPe-Py80Rt-jVYUbRi3tDkUvlODl7qgDhqtDHwYA8WlQ_RgPJAeTq1UvnZgG2wbY0iCG9q2CB1KNFJLAG0apSvvVY3KgQPzoVpthJb7TmUjcXAW8rxa5pRi5VIsxu4yz7e8ix0FHjO5halaw8TkN0Lgke3kn-UQJiqHxKVL05kp560Zep-mPsWeuOehjIl6zv2upBRsX6rjMsc-p4UdCXWY3Ciw3qJIPixRqMOJX8lMvL1XhoI7f1vDOIZcN0LL837B5vvo8CsAAP__rcuHAQ)
Please stand with me to _**protect Congress**_ , to _**protect our country**_ , to **_protect everything that’s been built since we put President Trump back in the White House_.**

**__[We’ve come too far to lose now, let’s fight like hell and take this race across the finish line](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GumzAQRb_G7ECesQ28BYu2UbqoVFV6m7Yb5NhD4gjjZAxB-fsnUJSl7z3yPWPjbQzDsxPNd4F4CT4LRKG-CcT7vzXyco2_fpb_1fVe3uvf0Wwt_nihD3zDk7Pm_ufTX-WnzRDT_Pc08gPe-Py80Rt-jVYUbRi3tDkUvlODl7qgDhqtDHwYA8WlQ_RgPJAeTq1UvnZgG2wbY0iCG9q2CB1KNFJLAG0apSvvVY3KgQPzoVpthJb7TmUjcXAW8rxa5pRi5VIsxu4yz7e8ix0FHjO5halaw8TkN0Lgke3kn-UQJiqHxKVL05kp560Zep-mPsWeuOehjIl6zv2upBRsX6rjMsc-p4UdCXWY3Ciw3qJIPixRqMOJX8lMvL1XhoI7f1vDOIZcN0LL837B5vvo8CsAAP__rcuHAQ)_._**

_Yours,_

**Randy Fine** Candidate for Congress
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GumzAQRb_G7ECesQ28BYu2UbqoVFV6m7Yb5NhD4gjjZAxB-fsnUJSl7z3yPWPjbQzDsxPNd4F4CT4LRKG-CcT7vzXyco2_fpb_1fVe3uvf0Wwt_nihD3zDk7Pm_ufTX-WnzRDT_Pc08gPe-Py80Rt-jVYUbRi3tDkUvlODl7qgDhqtDHwYA8WlQ_RgPJAeTq1UvnZgG2wbY0iCG9q2CB1KNFJLAG0apSvvVY3KgQPzoVpthJb7TmUjcXAW8rxa5pRi5VIsxu4yz7e8ix0FHjO5halaw8TkN0Lgke3kn-UQJiqHxKVL05kp560Zep-mPsWeuOehjIl6zv2upBRsX6rjMsc-p4UdCXWY3Ciw3qJIPixRqMOJX8lMvL1XhoI7f1vDOIZcN0LL837B5vvo8CsAAP__rcuHAQ)

# [The People vs. Ticketmaster](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=160259890&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwMjU5ODkwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDM1MjA1MDQsImV4cCI6MTc0NjExMjUwNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dBlwfMNGpk8k5uS1wSlNCyzetDVEeQlItsKLfnEQFtw)
### I've been busy. Here's the latest.
| | [Jeff Jackson](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---
| Apr 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=160259890&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwMjU5ODkwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MzUyMDUwNCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ2MTEyNTA0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTE0NTAyMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RhEHr0dfXU4fycc5c3EY8n-gXkuSFw0fEpGGyvDr-TE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=160259890&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwMjU5ODkwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDM1MjA1MDQsImV4cCI6MTc0NjExMjUwNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dBlwfMNGpk8k5uS1wSlNCyzetDVEeQlItsKLfnEQFtw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=160259890&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwMjU5ODkwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDM1MjA1MDQsImV4cCI6MTc0NjExMjUwNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dBlwfMNGpk8k5uS1wSlNCyzetDVEeQlItsKLfnEQFtw)
---
| | [](https://substack..WcL0z2tnbMP_G3LCJqhlgVl3ICJFLreujktNPhNfM8M?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jeffjacksonnc/p/the-people-vs-ticketmaster?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

You haven't heard from me in a month.
Why?
Because this is a great job, but it's all-consuming.
We're the state's largest law firm, handling hundreds of criminal and civil cases at any given moment.
We also run the three largest crime labs in the state, full of forensic scientists doing all kinds of work, including testing firearm ballistics, DNA evidence, and drug chemistry.
And we do a huge amount of law enforcement training at two major facilities that are always very busy.
I wanted to get to each of our facilities as quickly as possible, and now I've done that.
The impression I'm left with is that this entire organization is filled with mission-driven people. I've been in the military for a long time, and mission-driven people are a different breed. Their motivation is internal, and it doesn't quit. They're drawn toward teams, because working as a team is how you accomplish a mission. And when a team full of mission-driven people feels pressure, it pushes them together instead of pulling them apart.
It's incredibly motivating to lead an organization filled with people like that. I knew their reputation before I arrived, but now seeing it up close, it's just outstanding.
## **The People vs. Ticketmaster/Live Nation**
I'm forcing myself to only pick one case to go into detail about - but it's a great one.
Let's say you want to make a bunch of money by supplying live entertainment, primarily the music industry.
Well, the three big pieces in that business are:
* The venue
* The right to promote the event
* The right to sell the tickets

Now imagine you control each of those. You own venues, and you promote the events, and you sell the tickets.
Congratulations - _you 're a monopoly._
You've achieved vertical integration within your business, which means the sum of those parts has unlocked the ability to gouge customers with the confidence that they won't be able to find a competitor to offer them a better deal. And using your monopoly to further entrench your power to charge customers higher prices is against the law.
This is exactly what I, along with a bipartisan group of AGs, allege that Ticketmaster/Live Nation has done.
They've turned concert ticket fees into something fans call the "Ticketmaster Tax." These are the "convenience fees," "processing fees," and "handling fees" that add up quickly, inflating ticket prices by huge margins.
Why can they get away with it? Because they've locked venues into exclusive contracts, squeezing out any chance of competition.
But it gets worse. If venues try to resist and explore other options, Live Nation retaliates by threatening to strip venues of popular acts. The internal emails from Live Nation executives detailed in our lawsuit are explicit and awful.
Which means, if you're an independent venue that doesn't use Ticketmaster, good luck booking artists. Ticketmaster controls ticket sales and Live Nation controls promotion, so artists who are promoted by Live Nation typically won't be allowed to perform at venues that refuse to use Ticketmaster for ticketing.
This is textbook unlawful monopoly behavior. Consumers are paying higher prices and artists and venues are suffering from reduced competition and income.
The good news is that Live Nation just tried - but failed - to get our lawsuit dismissed. That's a big step toward accountability, including our ultimate request that Live Nation be required to divest Ticketmaster, which it acquired in 2011 and which became the linchpin for much of their monopolistic behavior.
## **One-sentence roundup**
Just to quickly cover some other important issues, I also:
* Visited Western North Carolina to find ways our office can assist with rebuilding efforts, and we'll roll that out next week.
* Coordinated with the NC Turnpike Authority to tackle the toll road text message scam affecting people statewide (more to come - and please warn your friends not to fall for texts demanding payment for fake missed toll fees!).
* Responded quickly to 23andMe's bankruptcy announcement, urging users to delete their genetic data before it's sold - and we've drafted legislation to strengthen your control over your genetic information.
* Joined a lawsuit to prevent nearly quarter of a billion dollars in health care funding to North Carolina from being unlawfully cut, which would hurt 77 of 86 local health departments.
* Led the first fentanyl task force meeting of the year, bringing together state, federal, and local law enforcement to align resources and strategies for a stronger response.
* Met with Chief Penn of Winston-Salem Police Department to explore their real-time crime center - the most advanced in the state - which has significantly reduced response times and strengthened public safety.
* Launched a new initiative providing real-time support to District Attorneys statewide for major criminal cases.
* Spent considerable time at the state legislature, meeting lawmakers individually to discuss our priorities and address their concerns.
* Consulted with the State Bureau of Investigation on strategies to combat money laundering linked to fentanyl trafficking (more details soon).
* Met sheriffs from across the state to discuss criminal trends and address local issues unique to their regions.
* Delivered the inaugural keynote for Wake Forest Law School's lecture on Character and Leadership in the law - an honor and a genuine pleasure.

clean_body: I've been busy. Here's the latest. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more I've been busy. Here's the latest. | | | Apr 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | You haven't heard from me in a month. Why? Because this is a great job, but it's all-consuming. We're the state's largest law firm, handling hundreds of criminal and civil cases at any given moment. We also run the three largest crime labs in the state, full of forensic scientists doing all kinds of work, including testing firearm ballistics, DNA evidence, and drug chemistry. And we do a huge amount of law enforcement training at two major facilities that are always very busy. I wanted to get to each of our facilities as quickly as possible, and now I've done that. The impression I'm left with is that this entire organization is filled with mission-driven people. I've been in the military for a long time, and mission-driven people are a different breed. Their motivation is internal, and it doesn't quit. They're drawn toward teams, because working as a team is how you accomplish a mission. And when a team full of mission-driven people feels pressure, it pushes them together instead of pulling them apart. It's incredibly motivating to lead an organization filled with people like that. I knew their reputation before I arrived, but now seeing it up close, it's just outstanding. The People vs. Ticketmaster/Live Nation I'm forcing myself to only pick one case to go into detail about - but it's a great one. Let's say you want to make a bunch of money by supplying live entertainment, primarily the music industry. Well, the three big pieces in that business are: The venue The right to promote the event The right to sell the tickets Now imagine you control each of those. You own venues, and you promote the events, and you sell the tickets. Congratulations - you 're a monopoly. You've achieved vertical integration within your business, which means the sum of those parts has unlocked the ability to gouge customers with the confidence that they won't be able to find a competitor to offer them a better deal. And using your monopoly to further entrench your power to charge customers higher prices is against the law. This is exactly what I, along with a bipartisan group of AGs, allege that Ticketmaster/Live Nation has done. They've turned concert ticket fees into something fans call the "Ticketmaster Tax." These are the "convenience fees," "processing fees," and "handling fees" that add up quickly, inflating ticket prices by huge margins. Why can they get away with it? Because they've locked venues into exclusive contracts, squeezing out any chance of competition. But it gets worse. If venues try to resist and explore other options, Live Nation retaliates by threatening to strip venues of popular acts. The internal emails from Live Nation executives detailed in our lawsuit are explicit and awful. Which means, if you're an independent venue that doesn't use Ticketmaster, good luck booking artists. Ticketmaster controls ticket sales and Live Nation controls promotion, so artists who are promoted by Live Nation typically won't be allowed to perform at venues that refuse to use Ticketmaster for ticketing. This is textbook unlawful monopoly behavior. Consumers are paying higher prices and artists and venues are suffering from reduced competition and income. The good news is that Live Nation just tried - but failed - to get our lawsuit dismissed. That's a big step toward accountability, including our ultimate request that Live Nation be required to divest Ticketmaster, which it acquired in 2011 and which became the linchpin for much of their monopolistic behavior. One-sentence roundup Just to quickly cover some other important issues, I also: Visited Western North Carolina to find ways our office can assist with rebuilding efforts, and we'll roll that out next week. Coordinated with the NC Turnpike Authority to tackle the toll road text message scam affecting people statewide (more to come - and please warn your friends not to fall for texts demanding payment for fake missed toll fees!). Responded quickly to 23andMe's bankruptcy announcement, urging users to delete their genetic data before it's sold - and we've drafted legislation to strengthen your control over your genetic information. Joined a lawsuit to prevent nearly quarter of a billion dollars in health care funding to North Carolina from being unlawfully cut, which would hurt 77 of 86 local health departments. Led the first fentanyl task force meeting of the year, bringing together state, federal, and local law enforcement to align resources and strategies for a stronger response. Met with Chief Penn of Winston-Salem Police Department to explore their real-time crime center - the most advanced in the state - which has significantly reduced response times and strengthened public safety. Launched a new initiative providing real-time support to District Attorneys statewide for major criminal cases. Spent considerable time at the state legislature, meeting lawmakers individually to discuss our priorities and address their concerns. Consulted with the State Bureau of Investigation on strategies to combat money laundering linked to fentanyl trafficking (more details soon). Met sheriffs from across the state to discuss criminal trends and address local issues unique to their regions. Delivered the inaugural keynote for Wake Forest Law School's lecture on Character and Leadership in the law - an honor and a genuine pleasure. At CPAC this year, we spoke with some of the courageous people working to end abuse and political bias in medicine. Chloe Cole is
a young woman who detransitioned after overcoming what she calls "the Woke Mind Virus."

Dr. Jared Ross, an emergency medicine physician and senior fellow at DO NO HARM, shares how medical professionals are working to
get politics out of medicine and protect vulnerable patients like Chloe.

Retired Air Force Major Tom Haviland joined us to talk about the ongoing, disastrous results of politically-motivated medical
policies in our armed forces. Listen in to this informative conversations. Like, share and subscribe.
