The Transgender Obsession and Its Effect on America's Kids

For too long, the transgender movement has grown and become deeply embedded in our educational, health, and cultural institutions.
Kids are falling prey to the gender grift in record numbers, but thanks to the new Trump Administration, help is in sight.

With a flurry of executive orders, our President is taking action to return our nation to biological truth, scientific
commonsense, and protection for the most vulnerable Americans – our children. This week, we're looking at the transgender craze
and how things are finally starting to change.

clean_body: Courageous people are speaking out and taking action to protect the most vulnerable from the dark side of our medical model. And the Trump Administration is taking action, too! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] April 1, 2025 • Newsletter A HEALTHIER 2025 WITH MOMS FOR AMERICA AND CARDIO MIRACLE At Moms for America, we prioritize sharing resources that promote health and wellness among our community. One such product is Cardio Miracle. We encourage you to explore Cardio Miracle and determine if it's the right fit for your health journey. Many moms, including our founder Kimberly Fletcher, have incorporated it into their daily routines and appreciate its commitment to quality and transparency. Watch the video below, and for more information and to see if Cardio Miracle aligns with your wellness goals, visit their website: Cardio Miracle []. [] [] The Dark Side of Medicine Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] At CPAC this year, we spoke with some of the courageous people working to end abuse and political bias in medicine. Chloe Cole is a young woman who detransitioned after overcoming what she calls "the Woke Mind Virus." Dr. Jared Ross, an emergency medicine physician and senior fellow at DO NO HARM, shares how medical professionals are working to get politics out of medicine and protect vulnerable patients like Chloe. Retired Air Force Major Tom Haviland joined us to talk about the ongoing, disastrous results of politically-motivated medical policies in our armed forces. Listen in to this informative conversations. Like, share and subscribe. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] [] The Transgender Obsession and Its Effect on America's Kids For too long, the transgender movement has grown and become deeply embedded in our educational, health, and cultural institutions. Kids are falling prey to the gender grift in record numbers, but thanks to the new Trump Administration, help is in sight. With a flurry of executive orders, our President is taking action to return our nation to biological truth, scientific commonsense, and protection for the most vulnerable Americans – our children. This week, we're looking at the transgender craze and how things are finally starting to change. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [-] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

body:

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20909/6374453/5d221a8e743b3dcd52696276a27b1e5bb7da54b8/25b6ce100f61489a9b4b49fd5457ef02c0262f51)

Let’s be honest—**the truth makes some people melt down** faster than ice in the summer. That’s why we’re giving away **200 FREE T.R.U.M.P. Can Coolers** to supporters like you who know how to _keep it cool._ This isn’t just a koozie—it’s a **statement.** A declaration that you stand for **free speech, personal liberty, and bold American values.** Why You Need This Can Cooler: ✔️ **Keeps your drink cold, even when debates get heated** ✔️ **Waterproof, durable, and built for everyday use** ✔️ **Perfect for BBQs, rallies, and social gatherings** ✔️ **Fits both regular & slim cans – because choice matters** But here’s the deal—we’re only giving away 200, and they’re going fast. Once they’re gone, they’re gone. **Don’t wait.** Grab your **FREE T.R.U.M.P. Can Cooler** today.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20909/6374453/5d221a8e743b3dcd52696276a27b1e5bb7da54b8/25b6ce100f61489a9b4b49fd5457ef02c0262f51)

name: Frank Wojtash: Political Director - Rob for PA
subject: Rob's NEPA Rundown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob for PA]()
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c69e7ed5a0a8/robs-nepa-rundown?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | |
---
| Good Morning,
Rob had a very busy week in our nation’s capital and at home. Rob came back home for the weekend and was out and about meeting with constituents across PA-08. He will be in Washington, fighting for Northeastern Pennsylvanians this week, but will be back for the weekend.
---
|
---
| Rob was in DC this past week, but that didn’t mean he stayed in the Swamp. He came back to NEPA for the weekend and met with constituents as well as honor our nation’s brave heroes who fought for our freedom. He also met with President Trump to discuss what’s best for us and our neighbors!
---
|
---
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=9847fa14f5&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is Kingza Asian Cuisine, in Kingston. Be sure to support local small businesses like Kingza!
---
|
---
|
The Democrats are already coming after our Congressman for 2026! They’re gearing up to lie and slander Rob, and we need your help to put our side of the story out there. If you are able, please donate to our campaign to keep NEPA out of the grasp of the far-left.
You can donate online. Please give any amount you are able, every penny counts! Click the logo below to donate now!
---

| Best Regards,Frank WojtashPolitical Director

body:

Greetings

As a reminder, the Young Democrats of America will gather for an exciting spring meeting from**May****9-11** in **Minneapolis, Minnesota**. This in-person event will bring together young leaders from across the nation for discussions and reflections on how we push forward as a party in this troubling time, hands-on training sessions, important organizational business, and much more. You can find all the information in this email on our website at **[yda.org/ydamsp](yda.org/ydamsp?link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-reminder-yda-spring-meeting-in-minneapolis-2&email_referrer=email_2677159&email_subject=reminder-yda-spring-meeting-in-minneapolis&&)****

******
* * *
**Registration
****
[Click here to register](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39ispmPgnyBeLzstfRs0GcNMmQ8i0Uu7JlJXUCxxrJCmdAhrI3WMZ3WpZtbbn7FJUyH8PiIH8zUEWT2Y3pu2hvLIyA8UYNzpJxLsJRA6Lz0_aO1-xk1H_mXxDJU7uBJAjzt4387JskVfRjgqThpDz-JMW_jVdeWbBYm4fhMExNOrY7N74sQinZtvXmFRN2w5zG7H1DJMAPis7LC3p1WbSA1xVv-0jBzeI92yRBV7YzDtjvF0qWt11gmp0dxVu8M8Ss7RtLBWdIg96hWPq4goHqCeChNd2m0eWfst34DegFOSa-J6sv84YqoFPFuMWnix4IMFLKqKl2IYm3IsPEATG7W45WXoflItc0QSfj8Daujlw/4fa/W37CsA3LReqFECg3dRQqxQ/h1/h001.SP2anZR64ge7-BlBCtQ1q1RdI8a7sIjnkbyaCGCS74w) **at the early bird rate of **$60.00**. The early bird registration rate is valid until **April****16****, 2025**.
****
* * *
**Reserving a Hotel Room
**
Lodging will be available at the Royal Sonesta Minneapolis Downtown (35 S 7th St, Minneapolis, MN 55402). Hotel reservations must be made no later than**April****25, 2025**. **[Click here to book at our group rate of $ 159 per night](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYVTJ3gaXEQhNrFAZPhr6sabsSNHnk0fk6DOOTQdyE3JosLT_nADN5jURGejAj_8zTcSx74oOvq8JuRihLimg-UNatSKqLMYoZzw9A4pGLtetcBrME2x_39Q18TEOJTZpjU1WmVSNQDLRZ509r2sctFK5lV6s5q8bwkJIM7GpOslHchmDjh6QteDbGElCboM_mbgkT8fNGa_RflOawyJ5bc9XUGFd8HEco-Z1APkM7EGLih98bW3Y-sa1ZPh58SDkjLt7e_lmnO9wVhYxRjxssg8E8Ajre0HSIx7R2wNufGy2PXmMgqtzbz2CCIqvGQpGPb-oiHT7Ah9Sm552pVu-tBna-k8IWhioKXhlg8A2zw1AQ6GimqCwYKC9EIhhNZN8fJwBsUsXMv-mVhcyFBxd4fRmegAmcSOpTJhWOkcfIbSJDYnGsWIGvB3VdaBQG1ian1n49lwNgAcy3cGXax1VXzsB4TwqHgKtYr6i4JaD3TB/4fa/W37CsA3LReqFECg3dRQqxQ/h2/h001.cvgQcPN2NUB9rnZWc4uOgLOHzvEE4aIjd7yU5g_Azbg)**.**
**
* * *
**National Committee Proxy Submissions
**
Proxies are due two hours before the start of the National Committee Meeting on Sunday, May 11th. body:
That’s what I’m asking you to donate to my campaign to become the next governor of New Mexico.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1058%2E400544%2EYzdN-Z)
**$5.**
That’s what I’m asking you to donate to my campaign to become the next governor of New Mexico.
Why? Because I’m facing my _first_ public fundraising deadline of this race on April 7.
**$5** will help us reach our ambitious $150,000 goal.
**$5** will help us send a fierce message to the MAGA forces trying to flip control of our state government that momentum is on our side.
**$5** will help us show we’re **a real movement** ready to win and bring change to New Mexico.
**But we still need a lot of supporters to chip in $5 between now and our big deadline on April 7.** **[So please, will you pitch in $5 — or whatever you can spare — right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250401_1_deadline?amount=5&refcode=em20250401-1058&refcode2=1058_400544_YzdN-Z&akid=1058%2E400544%2EYzdN-Z)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250401_1_deadline?amount=5&refcode=em20250401-1058&refcode2=1058_400544_YzdN-Z&akid=1058%2E400544%2EYzdN-Z)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250401-1&t=2&refcode2=1058_400544_YzdN-Z&akid=1058%2E400544%2EYzdN-Z)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1058%2E400544%2EYzdN-Z)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1058%2E400544%2EYzdN-Z)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

subject: Sign: Demand the Senate vote to stop Trump’s Canada tariffs
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Sign: Tell the Senate to reverse Trump's tariffs on Canada](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted17d730-a1d2-4fef-9828-fa519a3ece75/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7f2a308-d88b-4107-b01c-394667cd9e0d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump is about to impose a 25% tariff (tax) on a range of Canadian goods, a move that could end our long friendship and alliance, and likely plunge both our countries into a recession. It is an asinine move, economists across the spectrum agree it will be a disaster, and Trump seems to have no idea whatsoever why the heck he is even doing it. But Senate Democrats are fighting back by **forcing a vote to [reverse Trump's tariffs](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d8100e6-4c5e-431d-a3f5-653f67aa8076/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** And some Republicans – particularly in border states – may support it. And if this passes, we may be able to roll back bad tariffs with others. Imposing these tariffs will have widespread consequences, just to appease Trump's ego. We need the Senate to stop Trump in his tracks by voting to REVERSE these tariffs. And that will only happen if Republicans put the country over Trump, and finally show some guts. [**Add your name: Tell the Senate to reverse Trump's tariffs on Canada >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2de4d05-4345-449b-9c16-d6e072fb7853/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
Democrats want to take DOGE to the woodchipper

| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/f3J81f8cHowcsRGGiBe9kh_-YLn1zRb4rquGEeSRuWy9Uoj4YFhGrs_by9mpKGFJ4As2uuArpO6tYbVm_nZVjLQzyc6UxgHKVoJtsGzlmMb1lWrTV6SoZJCIwzK_fdPeEcDwMYqJwJ9nE6c_15YfOdpeIQaI-LzYftQkzuUfMMHgON7FLBtFS1jD13ZZRUVIWrqy5pHW3fo6Qjj9vmjAT0MtlIu0viKPZ7YIvxwzwaAcSZOfWnE1V3Fa5D8iTA3SbOGo4mOqgr9q9eJVU0faBoXOXv06FjgVEDtjzWirqciIRmEu-AvM9lezUk4XbZo8t54hRm7UgjZNOrDsgiY3idA9jHM3LluCWtwQMGouioQrpVjix85NYfVLSlCwpYyxwPYdZAzRQLkVEadl5UEScj3OK29-8kVkqJ6NM1HwkXaAFoPgq4-cqNUrPcaxy6BPdHAaJeZ8oFfl4Ds0QP5wRCArcqo3T_rueYUEoSH5itO2S2xQINUcYnHPNCoX6AdqLThSO7N-JOcgrg5pP7ul/hi2sv2FimEiRTIBC9MN5MGTJj2qZlq9F/7)
---
**ELON MUSK’S MESSAGE TO EVERY AMERICAN ABOUT THE FUTURE OF DOGE THAT EVERY TRUMP VOTER HAS TO READ BEFORE THE DAY IS OVER:**
**_"All we're trying to do is restore the will of the people through the president. There's a vast unelected Federal bureaucracy that is opposed to the President and the cabinet. _**
**_DC voting is 92% Kamala, that's a lot. That's basically almost everyone. If the will of the President is not implemented, and the President is representative of the people, that means the will of the people isn't being implemented. _**
**_That means we don't live in a democracy we live in a bureaucracy. I think what we're seeing here is a thrashing of the bureaucracy while we try to reestablish democracy and the will of the people."_**
—---
Thank you for taking the time to read Elon’s message.
The heartbreaking fact is, even with the control of the White House & Congress, the entrenched federal bureaucracy is doing everything possible to take out Elon Musk for good.
A corrupt network of Obama-appointed activist judges has already ruled against President Trump’s most ambitious executive orders.
**_And now, Democrat members of Congress are calling for street violence against Elon Musk and EVERY Trump supporter._**
President Trump & Elon are doing everything they can, but the fact is, they can only do so much.
The real power lies with grassroots Patriots like you.
Your response - _right here, right now_ \- will send a message loud & clear that **WE THE PEOPLE** stand with President Trump & Elon at this critical moment in history.
But it has to be immediate, and it has to be massive.
Because anything short of an overwhelming response will be a failure.

Team -- Amid Donald Trump and Elon Musk's calls to demolish vital news sources like MSNBC, PBS, and NPR, Justice Sonia Sotomayor has a _dire warning:_ **Unless we stand up for a free press and independent media, "we're going to lose our democracy."**

Justice Sotomayor is 100% correct. Without reliable sources of truthful information, our country could suffer _unimaginable harm._ But that's exactly what Trump and Musk want!

We can't sit idly by as Trump's attacks on our media expand, so **we've launched an URGENT Rapid Response Petition to show that Democrats support PBS, MSNBC, NPR, and the independent journalism that's vital to our nation.** But as of 11:10 A.M. ET, we're still waiting for your signature, and the petition closes at midnight! **Please, sign on now:**

**[Add your signature IMMEDIATELY to stand with PBS, NPR, MSNBC, and freedom of the press>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21373?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250401-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250401-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=19942%2E9716520%2EvcLd-0)**

name: Weston Imer For Congress
subject: Everyone has asked, so I am running! Support my run for Congress today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Team Imer PAC and is not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
I am thrilled to announce my run for congress, will you join me today?...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S0lt8RxIA9PFmk0XELjIHPrm8mKBobzRrMU78_FNP8pk7ck-2Gx2qlgVmHlp9DR0TBfrwO_RliCgpNPsHddCoKsShB8IEVsyCQkzIohKnwQKW3nILzWmiYVDg4e9QCmZ52eia6kNC69wLIl9RUg5bU7osH9hi30AaoVSy_vga9OVOKoZrPCFQd0HNANV7rh_RkMPPJhTLZw=&c=doWpPFexV-Yl-lFPeZftITFLsnHZZ5crQIa1NAwW1t_rNxXMiO5Oiw==&ch=eKvioYyqePpFByxn6H3R_vYTUxm5-Cs9rR-9_hLKjly1zRlsgFFFcg==)
---
---
| Friend, People like you have been asking me to run for something for years.
So, after much consideration, I have decided to run for Congress in Colorado's 7th District.
Colorado and Congress are headed in the wrong direction. Right now, Congress is grid-locked on passing President Trump's agenda and many more critical bills that are imperative to the mission of Making America Great Again.
Brittany Petterson has been nothing but a rubber stamp for the democrats for years, and it is time that a strong, grassroots, America First, Conservative Republican runs to oust her from Congress.
Given the recent events in the Colorado GOP, we must have the right candidates in the right races to ensure victory in 2026.
Shad Murib said it best: the Colorado Republican Party is headed in the wrong direction, but with your help, I can win the primary and beat Brittany in the General Election.
---
| | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S0lt8RxIA9PFmk0XELjIHPrm8mKBobzRrMU78_FNP8pk7ck-2Gx2ql8gqL25tJ8nVTWWo9n2TNk4_8D27Bqdm5drCpeIiwMLxBC-pvsBrJdbvAEQBULIddo9okn-VeMr_-CwZ5yBlmxAQJJvAN9KmnyWFfvL1TmvEgb8zEjkkfggrHHqyduLBlAPOFhMQzd-&c=doWpPFexV-Yl-lFPeZftITFLsnHZZ5crQIa1NAwW1t_rNxXMiO5Oiw==&ch=eKvioYyqePpFByxn6H3R_vYTUxm5-Cs9rR-9_hLKjly1zRlsgFFFcg==)
---
| But I cannot do this without supporters like you, who are sick and tired of the gridlock and political games that are played by the establishment leaders who occupy the halls of Congress.
We must elect candidates who believe in putting America First above all else and elect Gen Z leaders to breathe new life into our party.
Will you help me set an opening day fundraising record and contribute any amount today?

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’m going to block Trump’s VA nominees
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Collins says they can cut VA staff by 15% — more than 80,000 people doing important jobs — and not impact services. I call bullsh*t on that.
#

Hey everybody, it’s Ruben.
I’m sick of the way Trump and Elon Musk are treating the VA and the millions of Veterans who depend on it. I’m sick of getting a brick wall from the VA Secretary when I ask for answers. And I am not going to sit by while they finalize plans to fire more than 80,000 VA staff — 15% of the workforce.
**I am going to block every nominee to the VA that the Trump administration puts forward until they back off their plans to destroy it. It has to stop before they push Veterans past the breaking point.**
When I voted to confirm Doug Collins as VA Secretary, it was out of hope that we could collaborate and continue working to support the VA and the services it provides to Veterans. I knew Collins from the House, and while we disagreed on many things we still found common ground — especially for Veterans. There’s a lot we can do to improve the VA, and I think it’s important we pursue that.
Since then, I’ve seen the VA fire thousands of staff. From research to treatment to casework to services — even the Veterans Crisis Line, which is a resource for Veterans who are at the end of their rope. Several guys I served with in the Marines have taken their lives, alongside far too many others. And when I ask Collins and his office for answers, I get virtually nothing of substance in return.
Collins says they can cut VA staff by 15% — more than 80,000 people doing important jobs — and not impact services. **I call bullsh*t on that.** I’ve used the VA. I’ve fought for care and accountability at the VA. Many friends of mine depend on the VA. And there is no way you can cut that many staff without impacting Veterans’ benefits. No way.
That’s why I’m blocking their nominees. Whatever tool I have to fight this, to fix this, I’m going to use it. This is one of the few tools I have to put pressure on Trump, Elon, and Collins. If I can make a difference, I have to try.
I appreciate you taking the time to let me explain this.
Until next time, Semper Fi.
Ruben
🌵 Please! Don’t click away yet 🌞
While Ruben takes on the Trump administration, he needs to know he has the support of a big team behind him. If you can afford it, [**consider making a donation to his campaign to help him keep up the pressure.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr25.dU9j8y&refcode=em250401-1-90&t=1&akid=3799%2E734936%2EbVA7mO)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr25.dU9j8y&refcode=em250401-1-90&t=2&akid=3799%2E734936%2EbVA7mO)
Thank you! 🫡

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: A Royal Journey Through Western PA
body:
Thom Nickels | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Thom Nickels_ : The last Romanian princess_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a27131ef82&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| ''I’m on Amtrak’s Pennsylvanian traveling from Philadelphia to Pittsburgh to check out the legacy of the last Romanian Princess.

Arranging this trip was almost as difficult as planning a trip to Romania. Figuring out how to get to Ellwood City, Pennsylvania from Pittsburgh was a challenge. Ellwood City is where Princess Ileana of Romania — in her later incarnation as Mother Alexandra — founded the Orthodox Monastery of the Transfiguration..."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3e62771eff&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")

| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=08d481cdd9&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
## About Thom Nickels:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4f860a2d19&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Thom Nickels is a Philadelphia-based journalist/columnist and the 2005 recipient of the AIA Lewis Mumford Award for Architectural Journalism. He writes for City Journal, New York, and Frontpage Magazine. Thom Nickels is the author of fifteen books, including “[Literary Philadelphia](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c74b6377aa&e=b7b3eddce2)” and ”[From Mother Divine to the Corner Swami: Religious Cults in Philadelphia](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=988b16e9d0&e=b7b3eddce2).” His latest is “[Death in Philadelphia: The Murder of Kimberly Ernest](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dbfb48b399&e=b7b3eddce2).” He is currently at work on “The Last Romanian Princess and Her World Legacy,” about the life of Princess Ileana of Romania.
---
|

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Join Me Tonight On TBN w/Erick Stakelbeck
body:
Tonight at 7:30pm ET, I will join Erick Stakelbeck on TBN to discuss the amazing success of the Trump Administration, the NEW White House Faith Office
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11166.1.8134d8cb9e0feaf70e0a3c12f9a78c99) |
---
Tonight at 7:30pm ET, I will join **Erick Stakelbeck** on **TBN** to discuss the amazing success of the **Trump Administration** , the NEW White House **Faith Office** and much more... **Erick Stakelbeck** has become a good friend and recently he preached at Sheridan.Church in Tulsa, OK and it was _incredible_. Watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/DzQcKIObolQ?si=kOuw8P5WnIXaBLko](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11167.1.fd34c86274d06b379ca36f4e16d149c5) Upcoming Events At [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11168.1.580e797ef5cb17db74538314482d493a): -Wed, Apr 2 @7:00pm: **First Wednesday** \- All Family Service -Wed, Apr 9 @6:30pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** | RSVP: [https://clr.cm/mKVY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11169.1.cab7b957b4a5ee3dfbafbe683f90b4aa) -Sat, Apr 19 @5:00pm: **Passover Experience** | RSVP: [https://clr.cm/fXJN](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11170.1.b14dc25a14453d355a6ffc2c73834847) -Thur, May 8 @6:30pm: **Roger Stone** | RSVP: [https://clr.cm/hGXW](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11171.1.c10e1df618151ddc28271589cd0ebd7e) Please consider partnering w/Sheridan by visiting [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11172.1.028a3fd22e6e9492d160ad223826b7fe) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11173.1.798d5af13bb58b6ec81febdfbc10ec86)
---
---
## WOLVES Among The SHEEP
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11174.1.f996b0015a377690d3d2bdfaf821a99a)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11175.1.5db685d108edb6c0708b95d462424454) in Tulsa + OKC, I preached an _interesting message_ over Wolves Among The Sheep! Watch [Acts Pt. 67 - WOLVES Among The Sheep](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11176.1.1f59ab42dbd48e0cdaca1ba37dcfd88f): [https://www.youtube.com/live/WW5k3XGdfn4?si=bGP4q7lYriq6X_d6](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11177.1.6c018689c9498f53fecd91d21457ebe7)
---
---
|
---
Recently, **President Trump** fulfilled another _campaign promise_ by releasing all **80,000 files** about the **JFK assassination**! Last year, **Roger Stone** (advisor and friend of Presidents **Nixon** , **Reagan** \+ **Trump**) came to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11178.1.5c617eac820ff8666498f69837dd8000) and gave one of the most intriguing conversations about [Who Really Killed JFK](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11179.1.16e99c9e7a5997a210686f74bf9d0576) from his book, _"The Man Who Killed Kennedy: The Case Against LBJ"_. You can watch it here: [https://youtu.be/ZphwDct5Mio](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11180.1.7b463e2b6b1545427175f9b16f5b7e47) With that being said... I am excited to announce that **Roger Stone** is coming back to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11181.1.65b9bc2a60e09d28a2bcb662f84a2d2f) to share about the **JFK files** and what they mean _plus_ to discuss how **President Trump** dismantled the **Clinton-Obama-Biden Political Dynasty**. This event will be a BLAST! Seating is **LIMITED**. RSVP today: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1628128](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11182.1.f7dd5bbfec615e3fc71b6f83316c737f) **Date** : Thursday, May 8 **Time** : 6:30pm **Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP For Roger Stone At Sheridan ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11183.1.78e602bd6b047bfd8a2a700cf293298d)
---
---
## Eric Trump Inside | Protesters Outside
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11184.1.62fb92e932dbe29d2c9785c658d5e1c1)
---
I sat down with [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11185.1.5deb9f028ca527c31d57d4d2d68a663f) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11186.1.5f45e92bf8277f2254f952ca08f74db7) in Tulsa, OK for an _incredible conversation_ about a wide range of subjects from the **2024 Election** , **DOGE** and the **Great American Comeback** while protestors outside were not thrilled with a Trump speaking at a church... Watch [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11187.1.4d02c773703fa02b54d35f9ef2769046) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11188.1.0d28872c88793bfce88e1fc7d2aa0a05) here: [https://youtu.be/uH0zK20NJ18](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11189.1.a28225a33896b382985fde073f52670e)
---
| | [ Watch: Eric Trump At Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20233402.11190.1.2bd04e3fb72cc257c8c9e2791624d08d)

name: Troy Downing
subject: We’ve put this on the back burner for far too long

body:
I'm ready to take on China

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQwMV9DVS1aSS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjEyOTUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MDFfQ1UtWkkuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjIxMjk1LTI4OTkifQ/vG8d43tTwKWH_lc7Zgiq3A)
---
After putting this on the back burner for DECADES, we finally have leadership ready to take on China. Leadership from both sides has been too scared to stand up to China for too long, and we can finally make that change.

If we’re going to make a difference, though, we need to know your opinions on China. Without your help, we won’t know where to focus our energy. **[**Will you do me a favor and take our Defend Against China Survey?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQwMV9DVS1aSS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjEyOTUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MDFfQ1UtWkkuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjIxMjk1LTI4OTkifQ/nmY7V_TtktC5dwW6sEubXw)**

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I’ll never forget you, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
You are the reason why the Republican Party is where it is today. But the job isn't over...

| |
---
| | | My fellow Americans:

_I 'll never forget_ being on the frontlines to fight Democrat corruption.

_I 'll never forget_ defending President Trump in his sham impeachment.

_I 'll never forget_ helping force Ivy League presidents to RESIGN IN DISGRACE.

_I 'll never forget_ campaigning with President Trump across the country.

_And I will never forget_ fighting alongside YOU to save the country we both love.

THANK YOU for having my back through thick and thin, Friend. **You are the reason why the Republican Party is where it is today. But the job isn't over...**

So I'll cut to the chase:

_**[I'm partnering with my friend, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise a million dollars by the end of the quarter to help elect more strong Republicans and deliver on President Trump's powerful agenda.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b6b9586b8b8948188934aae818baecec&_e=XxciQhRAEo_YerHZhUUfwtbW-gkdc_S9z_2UClt8bpHaftaIL5sWXH95ihRr7RhbQKMN3-65C5v0w09M6sJbg85OTCBixrycj3yV3qxvKeuG7F05CN0ouzgVzBWJQLIjyxPUbaNXeEqu7WObt6r8WhDmDOIvsIPWaW5NkZKPRblmJDxbL5k2wuBil6mRmQXm_qJrOOqKHJgJQT67okMvoQvzhLwCCLnuWJuX0SZpzmzwqSm9DTqCEJqm2EOwTJZLR8Xik_F19kSSHeURJYlaT0DpBHJKVmW6v_TMFhMTR0kXMRkYE0OOlkX5m7jzsdJ0hvSwz-zWMTk-O5RnpzZxOJXgcR-hEt9O4X2X-O_F6y79ok_PW6J4Comrr4FdcFFB3sGe3R_L85KxTMrIhByhIRVaiyxFIFIqJy4FXSTJlhg2x4Y-PGK-_qb-PYRPed-yf6lyGwe00WPWzvxKSrmRCQ%3D%3D "I’m partnering with my friend, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise a million dollars by the end of the quarter to help elect more strong Republicans and deliver on President Trump’s powerful agenda.")**_

clean_body: You are the reason why the Republican Party is where it is today. But the job isn't over... | | | | | My fellow Americans: I 'll never forget being on the frontlines to fight Democrat corruption. I 'll never forget defending President Trump in his sham impeachment. I 'll never forget helping force Ivy League presidents to RESIGN IN DISGRACE. I 'll never forget campaigning with President Trump across the country. And I will never forget fighting alongside YOU to save the country we both love. THANK YOU for having my back through thick and thin, Friend. You are the reason why the Republican Party is where it is today. But the job isn't over... So I'll cut to the chase: "I’m partnering with my friend, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise a million dollars by the end of the quarter to help elect more strong Republicans and deliver on President Trump’s powerful agenda." I'm personally asking: Would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks for this noble cause? | "Elise Stefanik" Please do not forget: 1) We have one of the slimmest Majorities in the last 100 years, 2) Democrats just crushed us in the fundraising race, and 3) President Trump's entire legislative agenda will come to a SCREECHING HALT if we lose the House of Representatives to the Democrats. If the Democrats manage to barge back into power, I have no doubt they will STONEWALL everything we've worked so hard for. I 'm doing everything I can while there's still time to prevent that. https://secure.ngpvan.com/Muf0aMF2WUyYxf0LnXS6TQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Muf0aMF2WUyYxf0LnXS6TQ2]
Peter -
Since his swearing in on January 20th, Donald Trump has done everything he can to implement the plans outlined in Project 2025. He has pardoned insurrectionists and is now dismantling the Department of Education. He has emboldened his largest donor, Elon Musk, to establish DOGE and cut thousands of federal jobs and leave essential government departments understaffed. His reckless actions continue to hurt working families and our children’s future.
Now, we need to hear from you: How do you feel about Trump’s presidency so far?
Take our quick survey and let us know your thoughts:
📋 Click here to take the survey [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Muf0aMF2WUyYxf0LnXS6TQ2]
By sharing your opinion, you’re helping us unify and push back against Trump’s dangerous agenda. Together, we can hold him accountable and defend the programs and rights that millions of Americans rely on.
Don’t wait—make your voice heard today:
📋 Take the survey now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Muf0aMF2WUyYxf0LnXS6TQ2]
Thank you for speaking up.
— Team Griswold
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: PA FWD Party April Newsletter
body:
An important deadline

|
### **Deadline for November Elections**
Getting Forwardists into office the point of everything we're doing. That starts by running Candidates. As a minor party, we can run candidates and support them in ways that activist groups cannot. That's why what we're doing is different and important. There are great potential leaders all around us that get so discouraged by our political system that they don't consider public office. We will only change that by adding competition to races at the most local level and working up. There are huge opportunities in Pennsylvania this November. Below are some of the local offices that may be available in your area. The filing deadline for a 3rd party candidate for the 2025 Elections is August 1st, but to be eligible to file that paperwork, the candidate must be not registered as an R or a D as of 30 days before the primary.
#### If you are considering running for office this year, change your voter registration to "None (No Affiliation)" by April 20th.
| [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=Qq1f-_efxn4B2fVu7Zwq9RrVHSQ8NTVH5hCbMJX9qQd9ej9TV6csUrMgozd4mYomM_rTMy7BzbiQbD8vmto59RdKiFWzpeuByPsEJrscapw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_april_newsletter&n=1 "Click here to change voter registration") [Click here to change voter registration](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=Qq1f-_efxn4B2fVu7Zwq9RrVHSQ8NTVH5hCbMJX9qQd9ej9TV6csUrMgozd4mYomM_rTMy7BzbiQbD8vmto59RdKiFWzpeuByPsEJrscapw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_april_newsletter&n=1)
---
**If you are concerned about what you see coming from our current 2 party system? There is absolutely nothing you can do that will have as much impact this year as running for one of these offices as a Forwardist.**
**Judge of Elections-** Have you been a poll worker? This is an elected position that has important responsibilities and oversees the election. Small commitment of time. Tens of Thousands of districts across PA and many go completely unfilled. **This is a great opportunity to be your first public elected office.**
**Township Auditor-** The Township Auditor is a member of a multi-person Board of Auditors charged with auditing, settling, and adjusting the accounts of all elected or appointed officials of the township received or disbursed township funds in the preceding calendar year. Small commitment of time. **Often goes unfilled and is appointed by the people who are supposed to be audited.**
******School Board-** The Local School Board member is responsible for overseeing school operations within the district, and often for hiring/firing of school superintendents. Can be a great way to impact your community.
**City Legislature-** The City Legislature is the municipality's governing body, responsible for voting on ordinances and policies, and often is in charge of hiring a city manager.
**Township Supervisor-** The Township Supervisor is a member of a multi-person Board of Supervisors charged with general governance of the township and execution of legislative, executive and administrative powers. The Supervisor is responsible for setting and enacting policies and resolutions, levying taxes, and setting budgets.
**Tax Collector**
**County Treasurer**
**County Court Judge**
**Mayor**
### **Resources**
Please reach out if you would like help researching open offices in your area. There are people who want to help. We at Pennsylvania Forward Party have spent a lot of time learning about resources to help people just like you step up to run and serve.
[](https://www.forwardparty.com/runforoffice/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_april_newsletter&n=2 "Forward Party Candidate Info") [Forward Party Candidate Info](https://www.forwardparty.com/runforoffice/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_april_newsletter&n=2)
---
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=bOIh4UEYYsyl_IjgdMbLEqKo2Oo-qZX72cvO7VWZULc&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_april_newsletter&n=3 "Good Party Office Explorer \(Doesn't show Judge
of Elections\)") [Good Party Office Explorer (Doesn't show Judge of Elections)](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=bOIh4UEYYsyl_IjgdMbLEqKo2Oo-qZX72cvO7VWZULc&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_april_newsletter&n=3)

name: MassDems
subject: Not a joke: Trump is taking $106 MILLION away from Mass. students
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Peter, this isn't an April Fools joke:
President Trump and his GOP cronies are on a crusade to harm public schools and hinder our students' ability to learn.
Just this morning, we learned that they have terminated $106 million in federal funding for K-12 Education in Massachusetts. That funding would have provided: [https://www.mass.gov/news/trump-administration-terminates-106-million-in-k-12-education-funding-for-massachusetts]
* Mental health services for students
* Math tutoring
* Purchasing of high-quality instructional material with a focus on science
* Enhanced screenings to identify students’ risk of poor reading outcomes, including risk of dyslexia.
* Building upgrades including: * Improving air quality through HVAC installations
* Building outdoor learning spaces for students

* Bolstering security in schools, including the purchasing of cameras, door alarm, and emergency response technology.
Massachusetts students who just want to learn and be safe in school are suffering because of Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their reckless crusade to slash funding without due process or any accountability to the American people.
This yanking of funds means that projects which have already been started will be jeopardized and students will not get the resources they need. This is a disgusting move by an administration that is committed to dismantling our public education system.
Here's what else you need to know about Republican attacks on the Department of Education:
President Trump's Executive Order
On March 20th, President Trump signed an executive order to dismantle the U.S. Department of Education (DOE) to the fullest extent possible. While a full elimination of the department requires an act of Congress, this action fulfills his Project 2025 campaign promise to restore public education to state jurisdiction.
Trump assured that key functions of the department would be preserved and redistributed to other agencies. Among the programs set to be reassigned are Pell Grants, Title 1 funding, and programs for students with disabilities.
Impact on Students and Massachusetts
The DOE serves over 50 million students across 18,200 school districts nationwide. In Massachusetts alone, nearly one million students depend on the department's resources.
The Commonwealth receives $2 billion in federal education funding annually, which accounts for roughly 10% of the total state school budget . The loss or redistribution of these funds could have serious implications for public schools.
Key Changes & Workforce Reductions
Days before Trump’s executive order, on March 11th , the DOE workforce was cut nearly in half. Secretary of Education and billionaire Trump donor Linda McMahon said, “Today’s reduction in force reflects the Department of Education’s commitment to efficiency, accountability, and ensuring that resources are directed where they matter most: to students, parents, and teachers.”
Soon thereafter, President Trump ordered the transfer of the student loan program to the Small Business Administration (SBA) under Kelly Loeffler. The same day, he announced a 43% workforce reduction at SBA , significantly affecting the department's ability to manage student loans effectively.
Additionally, Special Needs and Nutrition programs were moved to Health and Human Services (HHS) under Robert F. Kennedy Jr., who has publicly claimed that childhood vaccinations cause autism.
Legal & Political Response
On March 13th , Massachusetts Attorney General Andrea Campbell led 21 state attorneys general in filing a lawsuit [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1EGA9HNB4ck-bmTTuDeau8mpfNLrC6Z6v/view?usp=sharing] against Secretary McMahon and President Trump, challenging the drastic DOE workforce and program cuts.
On March 24th , AG Campbell filed an additional motion to her lawsuit for “a court order to immediately stop the mass layoffs and transfer of services.”
Senator Ed Markey, a member of the Senate’s Health, Education, Labor and Pensions Committee, charged Trump, Musk, and McMahon's dismantling effort as an attempt to privatize education. He said that eliminating the DOE “will harm every community in the country.”
Governor Maura Healey also criticized the cuts, arguing that they would lead to:
* Larger class sizes
* Canceled after-school programs
* Reduced support for students, particularly those in rural areas or with special needs
* Cuts to professional development, research, and school nutrition programs
Massachusetts' Reliance on Federal Education Funding
Massachusetts receives $2 billion annually in federal education funding. These funds will not be fully replaced. Lost funding will impact:
* Low- and middle-income student college tuition assistance
* Salaries for teachers, counselors, and homeless liaisons in low-income districts
* Special education programs, including: * Assistive technology
* Professional development
* Special education teacher salaries
* Paraprofessionals and reading specialists
* Student transportation for specialized services
* Physical and speech therapy, social workers

Who is Secretary of Education Linda McMahon?
Billionaire Linda McMahon, WWE co-founder who has never worked in public service and lost two Senate elections in Connecticut, previously served as head of the Small Business Administration under Trump. Now, as Secretary of Education, she is responsible for dismantling her own department.
These sweeping changes threaten critical federal education programs, impacting students, teachers, and families across the country.
Visit mobilize.us/massdems [mobilize.us/massdems] to find an event near you to help us stand up to this harmful administration.

clean_body: [] Peter, this isn't an April Fools joke: President Trump and his GOP cronies are on a crusade to harm public schools and hinder our students' ability to learn. Just this morning, we learned that they have terminated $106 million in federal funding for K-12 Education in Massachusetts. That funding would have provided: [] Mental health services for students Math tutoring Purchasing of high-quality instructional material with a focus on science Enhanced screenings to identify students’ risk of poor reading outcomes, including risk of dyslexia. Building upgrades including: Improving air quality through HVAC installations Building outdoor learning spaces for students Bolstering security in schools, including the purchasing of cameras, door alarm, and emergency response technology. Massachusetts students who just want to learn and be safe in school are suffering because of Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their reckless crusade to slash funding without due process or any accountability to the American people. This yanking of funds means that projects which have already been started will be jeopardized and students will not get the resources they need. This is a disgusting move by an administration that is committed to dismantling our public education system. Here's what else you need to know about Republican attacks on the Department of Education: President Trump's Executive Order On March 20th, President Trump signed an executive order to dismantle the U.S. Department of Education (DOE) to the fullest extent possible. While a full elimination of the department requires an act of Congress, this action fulfills his Project 2025 campaign promise to restore public education to state jurisdiction. Trump assured that key functions of the department would be preserved and redistributed to other agencies. Among the programs set to be reassigned are Pell Grants, Title 1 funding, and programs for students with disabilities. Impact on Students and Massachusetts The DOE serves over 50 million students across 18,200 school districts nationwide. In Massachusetts alone, nearly one million students depend on the department's resources. The Commonwealth receives $2 billion in federal education funding annually, which accounts for roughly 10% of the total state school budget . The loss or redistribution of these funds could have serious implications for public schools. Key Changes & Workforce Reductions Days before Trump’s executive order, on March 11th , the DOE workforce was cut nearly in half. Secretary of Education and billionaire Trump donor Linda McMahon said, “Today’s reduction in force reflects the Department of Education’s commitment to efficiency, accountability, and ensuring that resources are directed where they matter most: to students, parents, and teachers.” Soon thereafter, President Trump ordered the transfer of the student loan program to the Small Business Administration (SBA) under Kelly Loeffler. The same day, he announced a 43% workforce reduction at SBA , significantly affecting the department's ability to manage student loans effectively. Additionally, Special Needs and Nutrition programs were moved to Health and Human Services (HHS) under Robert F. Kennedy Jr., who has publicly claimed that childhood vaccinations cause autism. Legal & Political Response On March 13th , Massachusetts Attorney General Andrea Campbell led 21 state attorneys general in filing a lawsuit [] against Secretary McMahon and President Trump, challenging the drastic DOE workforce and program cuts. On March 24th , AG Campbell filed an additional motion to her lawsuit for “a court order to immediately stop the mass layoffs and transfer of services.” Senator Ed Markey, a member of the Senate’s Health, Education, Labor and Pensions Committee, charged Trump, Musk, and McMahon's dismantling effort as an attempt to privatize education. He said that eliminating the DOE “will harm every community in the country.” Governor Maura Healey also criticized the cuts, arguing that they would lead to: Larger class sizes Canceled after-school programs Reduced support for students, particularly those in rural areas or with special needs Cuts to professional development, research, and school nutrition programs Massachusetts' Reliance on Federal Education Funding Massachusetts receives $2 billion annually in federal education funding. Billionaire Linda McMahon, WWE co-founder who has never worked in public service and lost two Senate elections in Connecticut, previously served as head of the Small Business Administration under Trump. body:
But I want you to hear this directly from me.
| **_A PERSONAL LETTER FROM THE DESK OF REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
By now you may have heard the rumors and even seen President Trump’s announcement...
---
But I want you to hear this directly from me.
---
**Given our current razor-thin House GOP majority, I’ve made the decision to remain in Congress to ensure we pass _ALL_ of President Trump’s America First agenda. **
---
This wasn’t an easy decision for me. I’ll be honest with you – serving our country as Ambassador to the United Nations has long been a dream of mine.
---
**But given the circumstances, I simply had to put America first.**
---
At the end of the day, passing President Trump’s agenda is __so_ _much__ more important than my own political career.
---
When I call myself “America First” those aren’t empty words, Friend. _It’s my governing philosophy._
---
In order to call yourself “America First”, I believe you should never focus on what’s best for yourself. Instead, you should _ALWAYS_ do what’s best for our country.
---
_And as it became more and more apparent that I would be most effective fighting for the America First agenda in Congress and on the campaign trail, it became clear to me that I should remain there._
---
Because President Trump is right...
---
What’s most important right now is that we maintain **_EVERY_** Republican seat in Congress – and I’m going to fight like hell to make sure we do.
---
Last cycle, I transferred millions of dollars of my own funds to help the GOP win battleground races.
---
**Now that President Trump has entrusted me with fighting for his agenda in the House for the next two years, I want to raise _even more_ to help DEFEND President Trump’s House GOP Majority – starting with the upcoming special elections in Florida on April 1st. **
---
In those two key races, we’re already seeing the truly unfathomable amounts of money the Left is willing to spend to reclaim the majority so they can block Trump’s agenda and sabotage his presidency!
---
To fight back against their lies, vicious attacks, witch hunts, and even outright LAWFARE, I have nowhere to turn other than the dedicated patriots who have always had my back when I needed it most.
---
**That is why, with the LAST FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline before these special elections now just days away, I’m asking YOU to help me jump-start our biggest fundraising blitz of the year!**
---
It is no exaggeration to say that the fate of our House GOP majority – and President Trump’s entire America First agenda – is in your hands, Friend.
---

The democrats could still win control...

**Here is where things stand:**
**Republicans:****217**
**Democrats: 215**
**Undecided: 3**

If the Democrats win the three special elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21, the US House would FLIP to the control of Nancy Pelosi.

My name is Jimmy Patronis, and I’m the Republican Nominee in the FL-01 race.

**I’m facing a well-funded liberal who has a real shot of beating me, and since this race isn’t getting any national attention, my campaign is seriously underfunded.**

This seat is anyone’s game, and if we want to keep our MAGA Majority in Congress, I need your financial support.

clean_body: What if I told you that President Trump could lose the House?| | | | | You probably thought the election ended on November 5th, but control of the House isn’t settled yet. The democrats could still win control... Here is where things stand: Republicans:217 Democrats: 215 Undecided: 3 If the Democrats win the three special elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21, the US House would FLIP to the control of Nancy Pelosi. My name is Jimmy Patronis, and I’m the Republican Nominee in the FL-01 race. I’m facing a well-funded liberal who has a real shot of beating me, and since this race isn’t getting any national attention, my campaign is seriously underfunded. This seat is anyone’s game, and if we want to keep our MAGA Majority in Congress, I need your financial support. ************************************************************ Thank you, Jimmy Patronis | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIMMY PATRONIS, INC. | |

name: Michelle, UWDA
subject: Time to Fight Back Against The Trump-Musk Billionaire Takeover
body:
Join an event near you. We have the power to stop the billionaire takeover! | | |
Peter, C’mon besties, we’re taking action!!! Donald Trump and Elon Musk think this country belongs to them. They're taking everything they can get their hands on and daring the world to stop them. On Saturday, April 5th, we're taking to the streets nationwide to fight back with a clear message: Hands off! Join us and our partners at Indivisible for a [“Hands Off!”](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SLdqY4re9NRChJwFnQ0ir1rJEkxg1I2i9T2VPQptZJxt6fx6CCYIEZS7lae6DnSh0sBzSn5Af0OMv-WGZ7iXWix5tNw7fv4xmn_mlT2_QS3FEID6c_cItepk17fn0xkMKRmvv4WAniNf-qkIlL7h8bMTKmnlAnkwhU6ppfTFlxCXzWxbomlrxZVXYpHMIHUoEPL4VyGoZ6h1kSAUS1LsnRLA50p4fJjk8q7TE-_VT6RCkOcZQgG4xc7iLCK8qhrDyTZWQ6ifFtX3t37h_LVPnz557fDHvzgTyZ-sKqPviOr6hwrnT1Md2lRHl-NQR5VyXfA1k3jStr634NINkqp8A5ixvH_hgheowobiq8O5IkkjLeXLruLu3tTavPDnRc33/4fa/cvEZWFJpTMe41bAQJfKQ_A/h0/h001.ghnSTGOB_Nd4mq8KPEnWz2Fy9L_aSIZLq7je8VwfcYQ) mobilization near you! **Here is what we’re up against and why we’re coming together to mobilize:**
* ❌ Trump and Musk’s attempt at an illegal power grab is a crisis we must stop.
* ❌ Trump, Musk, and congressional Republicans are gutting services, raising prices, and racing towards slashing Medicaid, Social Security, and more.
* ❌ Trump, Musk, and congressional Republicans are on this path of destruction for the benefit of their billionaire allies.

This fight is just beginning, and we’re mobilizing to jumpstart the opposition. Together, we have the power to stop this takeover.
**These are our demands:**
* ✅ We demand an end to the attacks on immigrants, trans people, and other communities.
* ✅ We demand an end to the billionaire takeover and rampant corruption of the Trump administration.
* ✅ We demand an end to slashing federal funds for Medicaid, Social Security, and other programs working people rely on.

**[👉 Join us in taking action, find a local event today!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SLdqY4re9NRChJwFnQ0ir1rJEkxg1I2i9T2VPQptZJxt6fx6CCYIEZS7lae6DnShBNo9AGOVQKKXZumGiAkvAibLHm2xH0E326fBqVBCc1RmqC-Rfrng_32DGe0W1fGvK9cex4AyLvfqt-LkPMtwXkKf7y82L8e77FUxO165S3FlYRdPUITTEJSnpM4xPSMZdp8uraViVZTmXsAMgJd-lf7SG7TLcrbonm1tR-axc2gxS_p6gE8PrRkMrD-q9RcbZy_YRjz5XyUiJz5DwBZetkDZTAHCRti2gO6uPQ-Y3xtrlnH04q1myO9x8RDgUz8QOdnYV28cqWHsn67TdqosCOtjvRqd2aYt1V6siKELkbLFOWiP0eSmQ58QlQbD9bEv/4fa/cvEZWFJpTMe41bAQJfKQ_A/h2/h001.CvFIF2vXpUdy4rA-LPbraQQWhdMBgIisp519Zel8FmA)**

Latino Vote Voices Premiere:
Shaping Latino Political Power & the Sanctuary State Bill
with Kevin de León
|
#### **Welcome to the Premiere Episode of Latino Vote Voices!**

For our first episode, Mike Madrid sits down with California political trailblazer **Kevin de León** — the first Latino to lead the State Senate. Kevin recollects how his humble beginnings, personal struggles, grassroots organizing, and groundbreaking work on climate change and spearheading **SB 54, the Sanctuary State legislation** has redefined Latino leadership. Join us as we kick off this journey to amplify Latino voices, inspire action, and build a stronger democracy—one vote at a time.
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[They're scared': Strategist highlights new 'opportunity for Democrats to make a comeback'](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=f5a9af7f3f&e=5bd167f239) By: Raw Story

[New California Hispanic Legislative Caucus kicks off series of roundtables](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=313316e93f&e=5bd167f239) By: Orange County Register

[23 states, DC sue Trump administration over billions in lost public health funding](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=5a53cfc490&e=5bd167f239) By: CNN

[Democrats quietly worry their Musk-focused message in Wisconsin isn’t resonating with voters of color](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=16cfcface7&e=5bd167f239) By: Politico

[How immigration policy shifts are affecting Latino families](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=7be256e441&e=5bd167f239) By: Brookings

[The hidden trend behind Latinos’ shift toward Trump](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=230f442da5&e=5bd167f239) By: Politico

[After 2024, which way will Wisconsin Latino voters sway in the state Supreme Court race?](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=b8c5bb7160&e=5bd167f239) By: Milwaukee Journal Sentinel

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: The Left Embraces Violence, Again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
The Left has crossed a terrifying line.

| | |
---
|
---
The Left has crossed a terrifying line.

**Democrat leaders are no longer content to just smear conservatives — they’re encouraging violence against us.** Texas Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett openly joked about physically punching Senator Ted Cruz, and mocked Governor Greg Abbott’s disability in front of a cheering crowd.
---
---
U.S. Rep. Jasmine Crockett (D-TX)
_Photo by Gage Skidmore_
---
They’re not hiding their hatred anymore. They’re calling for fists instead of debate. They’ve gone from cancel culture to firebombing businesses like Tesla dealerships. And they’ve nearly taken lives — Congressman Steve Scalise was almost assassinated, and President Trump barely survived an attempt on his life.

This isn’t politics. This is tyranny.

**The Democrat Party has become the party of rage, violence, and Marxism. And while the media stays silent, we must stand up — and fight back with everything we’ve got.**

The Senate Conservatives Fund is leading the charge to elect bold, unapologetic conservative fighters who will stand up to this madness and defend our Constitution.

But we can’t do it without you. **Your donation today helps us fight for true conservatives like Ted Cruz — men and women who won't back down.**

**[**DONATE NOW to defend liberty and restore our Republic.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/LoqqFoUiQ9WgdOWeQaA97Sa7f-IzoF_XPG2H-JbzC96Ph2yIEvnkzpbGAberI06Ns9rqnCB16iLyOduh-nm_r8HeGFX3EdEWiDNSDM-1l5ZvyQATHzSxPpWIZGkvlJ46l9UVWXIHZct6DxCUvxGiXyuehjNoQLVpCtaahIf1eDXN_mpNefhglGQ-xA9_95trp0b1UGfLOjCTj-wDgpM6TA9NpliMNu06MF0pHnRksLRQLefazpZXTkFKS0KRyrmTnQwbqwyj78rcYHNQCMz9GH23bKceUssp3-UcMQIrs6-0Nb9nmvA/Om04zRMlYZ4th5_V9eKV0me2bElMyVg6/7)** You can donate to SCF and we will use your donation to help all of our supported conservatives in the Senate. You can also donate directly to specific senators through SCF, and we transfer it to their campaigns.

Time is running out. The Left is on the march. It’s up to us to stop them — before it’s too late.
---

# [Health Care Crisis: Lower Salaries and Fewer Benefits for Regional Doctors Increases Shortage of Medical Professionals ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=160351956&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwMzUxOTU2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM1MjcxOTQsImV4cCI6MTc0NjExOTE5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ke42rW-7ktZ3c0lQMMuMIhbE3f-8Efq1rS4bZ1EhStI)
### Patient Care to Suffer without incentives and financial solutions to avoid the medical iceberg
| | [Dr. Michael Goldstein](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct) and [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)

| Apr 1

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e1f8a378-8a4f-46a0-93e6-a294a27ebc7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [National Cancer Institute](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1d834ec8-3d24-4b52-82bb-a63b34bd201f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/96b306c6-d898-4e17-9778-2c7fea053325?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Throughout the country (including, the Northeast) there are pockets of physician shortages, especially Primary Care Physicians. Since we live in a free market economy, the average base salaries in rural areas have declined by $23,568 from $288,257 to $264,687 without factoring in inflation.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..Rsf6DL_7zrRmcohwR-8XA5-IH4LDO6XbJIC7_h7BNOs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160351956)
Job-related incentives have also fallen. The result is an 82 percent reduction is practicing in a rural area from 3.4% to 0.62%. This is a trainwreck for healthcare, especially for any rural area. [Source](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/25083f76-fc76-4810-925f-1aa16822740a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
What are the solutions?
**Loan forgiveness**. Underserved communities could provide such loan forgiveness for doctors working in medically underserved areas. _**These communities need to be proactive in attracting doctors by offering incentives to doctors to come to avert a crisis.**_
**Low Rents**. Real estate is a large expense for a medical practice, especially with the building code requirements for medical facilities. _**These could be offset with lower rents and/or tenant improvement assistance for medical office construction/conversion.** It goes back to the Field of Dreams - If you build it, they will come._
**Foreign Doctors.** Through every labor crisis, trained foreign workers alway tend to be a temporary solution. _It comes with cheap labor and is fraught with exploitation with promises of visa extensions or deportation threats, especially in these rural areas which must be solved for.**It is a band-aid not the solution.**_
There are two types of Foreign Physicians: **US-Trained and Non-US trained.**
* **US-Trained** physicians that are licensed in foreign countries should have an easier acclimation to participating and/or running their own practices.
* **Non-US trained** physicians can be permitted to practice here provided that there is a supervisory physician with regular licenses granted after 3-5 years of this kind of care much like other professional trades.

**Increased Reimbursement Rates.** State-regulated insurance reimbursement rates need to be made attractive to keep and recruit rural physicians.
**Medical Billing and Practice Management.** Efficiencies are critical especially with declining fee schedules and a greater need for practice optimization to improve payments to care providers across all sectors, especually primary care practices where the squeeze is the tightest.
**Increased Incentives**. Medical care needs to be viewed as a business and local communities and states that offer incentives to attract small and medium businesses to their community must do the same to attract doctors to their communities. _**While such incentives look at improvements in infrastructure and education, healthcare assessments need to be part of that equation.**_
_**Rural residents should not have to suffer from un-necessary shortages of care because of geographic location which used to be the beacon of community care which should be a growing and not a declining area.**_
We all have a vested interest in solving this problem before it is too late especially as:
1) Baby boomers retire from medicine and become patients and users. **Demand for senior living facilities will increase;**
2) Medical school enrollment decreases;
3) America continues to becomes less healthy and the efforts to Make America Healthy Again will take time to have a meaningful impact in reducing health care costs;
4) Health care costs continue to increase; and
5) General care continues to become less affordable.
Young physicians who are ready to enter practices are less likely to stay in states in the Northeast (like New York and Connecticut) because of the high cost of living and the high tax rates. Instead, they are opting to locate to lower taxation states with lower costs of living, especially housing which factors into their ability to service student-loan debt.
With an aging population and the explosion of technology to provide better care, we will be less able to provide this care unless we have and adequate supply of doctors who are not debilitated by overwhelming debt and the lack of freedom to be able to afford in more expensive states.
**Without changes in our healthcare system rural communities will not be the only place where there will be physician shortages. They will become common to urban centers as well.**
**Thank you for your continued support and please reach out for assistance. Please subscribe and spread the word as we need your support to grow this message**

Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way.
Dr. Michael Goldstein has more than 40 years of medical practice experience and Jonathan has worked with him and other medical practices to help solve their pain-points. This healthcare issue will need local, community and state buy-in for long-term solutions that entice businesses to re-locate.
Please subscribe and support.

Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee –

I’m reaching out to say **thank you** for your support. Because of you, my campaign has the momentum we need to prepare for the challenges ahead and deliver lasting change for North Carolinians and Americans nationwide.

Taking on Donald Trump and Elon Musk isn’t an easy task. But your support is helping me back up the Democrats in North Carolina who will stand by my side to do just that.

And Peter, it’s working. Republicans in Congress are already scrambling to hold onto their majority, and Donald Trump just retracted his nomination of Rep. Else Stefanik for UN ambassador, citing the risk of putting her seat in jeopardy.

But we can’t let up. House Speaker Mike Johnson is going all-out to not only keep Republicans in power, but to expand their majority in 2026. I’m doing everything I can to keep that from happening by supporting my Democratic colleagues from competitive districts who will be top targets in the coming mid-terms.

We all have a role to play in turning this ship around. Thank you for doing your part, and for staying with me in this fight.

— Valerie Foushee

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee – I’m reaching out to say thank you for your support. Because of you, my campaign has the momentum we need to prepare for the challenges ahead and deliver lasting change for North Carolinians and Americans nationwide. Taking on Donald Trump and Elon Musk isn’t an easy task. But your support is helping me back up the Democrats in North Carolina who will stand by my side to do just that. And Peter, it’s working. Republicans in Congress are already scrambling to hold onto their majority, and Donald Trump just retracted his nomination of Rep. Else Stefanik for UN ambassador, citing the risk of putting her seat in jeopardy. But we can’t let up. House Speaker Mike Johnson is going all-out to not only keep Republicans in power, but to expand their majority in 2026. I’m doing everything I can to keep that from happening by supporting my Democratic colleagues from competitive districts who will be top targets in the coming mid-terms. We all have a role to play in turning this ship around. Thank you for doing your part, and for staying with me in this fight. — Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. name: Working Families Party
subject: 1000 protests. One message: Hands Off!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, **Trump, Musk, and their Republican allies in Congress are looting this country in broad daylight.** They’re slashing Social Security and Medicaid. They’re defunding public schools and cancer research to bankroll tax cuts for billionaires who already have more money than they could spend in a hundred lifetimes. They’re driving up prices, stripping away our rights, and hollowing out our government to keep power in the hands of a wealthy few — while working people struggle just to make ends meet. And they want you to think there's nothing you can do. That it’s too late. That the system is rigged beyond repair. **But they’re _wrong_.** [**On April 5, working families across the country are fighting back with the largest single-day protest since Trump took office. More than 1,000 protests will be happening across the country, with workers, students, seniors, veterans, immigrants, and everyday families coming together to say: Hands off our services. Hands off our rights. And hands off our communities.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMa2J2F9-GOeJSFpuNdJr44EIjbjoV3Z3SFelaTJuHe1JNx3O1-hwjK2_FnHMxXRJ52b0O6FqsulXAydkqRbKNSRE4er3-Kt_tIGfG3XqFnYnEVieZMAj1vuuc1YO-q2vi281aQL-Oz_-eFSPBwcb95wK7OVQYw-0x2gDjoyJJ394RWddBd28lukTFfyY4yjgy0yLiKWAH_mW2z1OCp76_RgKtajsa0phcvZTvVYsyRMvfvtyEpcxefZyeJChcKFgNF8BsGe7GrnPO-dlb7U9ipthykf1UnaOePsRV7Dl8_3tRlWmf2M8HQjSpg3ZNm05qEDp__85eenfNfJ3iie4Pp8/4fa/F-4DFXLGTSeBFxAKh8LXhA/h0/h001.WR-VX8ihW6UiAHl_gLVwmza4GIc4aaH95n19JFHKPb0) **[Find a Hands Off protest near you »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMa2J2F9-GOeJSFpuNdJr44EIjbjoV3Z3SFelaTJuHe1JNx3O1-hwjK2_FnHMxXRJ52b0O6FqsulXAydkqRbKNSRE4er3-Kt_tIGfG3XqFnYnEVieZMAj1vuuc1YO-q2vi8-kI4pMR5PoIV9xi1hfcQ1eAqqzvSYXc2uj9KFLbcTc5jRaHqq9mEJW_rU-cf9HZ0lHi9vfy4rfMk-A939PkGHo4zMHWhlObcektCLDz5xrV1OKQZOxzlp77jUDYTGCeNTySFxUljk2zJ27NcgYIXr7YOIE4h1ntj_0uPIyilTzWNVEzHf2ZzEOf3Ot-A4xdGkVZybI9NiRadfd63u0oz0/4fa/F-4DFXLGTSeBFxAKh8LXhA/h1/h001.N5-WSC0LG5C3Hq9lJLxiXDm_-5vpQRqf18Lml-aHhvI)** This isn’t just another protest, Peter. It’s a moment to draw the line. Because no matter what issue brought you here — healthcare, housing, wages, climate, abortion, democracy — it’s all on the chopping block. **And the billionaires are sharpening their knives.** Trump and Musk are trying to buy our democracy out from under us. They’re flooding elections with cash, dismantling checks and balances, and trying to lock in an economy where they win and everyone else loses. They want us _divided_. _Distracted_. And too _demoralized_ to fight back. **But we’ve seen this before.** And every time the rich and powerful have tried to hoard everything for themselves, working people have risen up and said: Hell no. History isn’t written by billionaires, Peter — it’s written by the people who refuse to bow to their greed. [**Find a Hands Off! protest near you and show up on April 5. Every person in the streets makes our message louder, our movement stronger, and this fight impossible to clean_body: | | | Peter, Trump, Musk, and their Republican allies in Congress are looting this country in broad daylight. They’re slashing Social Security and Medicaid. They’re defunding public schools and cancer research to bankroll tax cuts for billionaires who already have more money than they could spend in a hundred lifetimes. They’re driving up prices, stripping away our rights, and hollowing out our government to keep power in the hands of a wealthy few — while working people struggle just to make ends meet. And they want you to think there's nothing you can do. That it’s too late. That the system is rigged beyond repair. But they’re wrong. This isn’t just another protest, Peter. It’s a moment to draw the line. Because no matter what issue brought you here — healthcare, housing, wages, climate, abortion, democracy — it’s all on the chopping block. And the billionaires are sharpening their knives. Trump and Musk are trying to buy our democracy out from under us. They’re flooding elections with cash, dismantling checks and balances, and trying to lock in an economy where they win and everyone else loses. They want us divided. Distracted. And too demoralized to fight back. But we’ve seen this before. And every time the rich and powerful have tried to hoard everything for themselves, working people have risen up and said: Hell no. History isn’t written by billionaires, Peter — it’s written by the people who refuse to bow to their greed. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . | | You probably thought the election ended on November 5th, but control of the House isn’t settled yet.

The democrats could still win control...

**Here is where things stand:**
**Republicans:****217**
**Democrats: 215**
**Undecided: 3**

If the Democrats win the three special elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21, the US House would FLIP to the control of Nancy Pelosi.

My name is Jimmy Patronis, and I’m the Republican Nominee in the FL-01 race.

**I’m facing a well-funded liberal who has a real shot of beating me, and since this race isn’t getting any national attention, my campaign is seriously underfunded.**

This seat is anyone’s game, and if we want to keep our MAGA Majority in Congress, I need your financial support.

********************************[********************************Can you step up for a MAGA ally during a time of need? clean_body: What if I told you that President Trump could lose the House?| | | - | | You probably thought the election ended on November 5th, but control of the House isn’t settled yet. The democrats could still win control... Here is where things stand: Republicans:217 Democrats: 215 Undecided: 3 If the Democrats win the three special elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21, the US House would FLIP to the control of Nancy Pelosi. My name is Jimmy Patronis, and I’m the Republican Nominee in the FL-01 race. I’m facing a well-funded liberal who has a real shot of beating me, and since this race isn’t getting any national attention, my campaign is seriously underfunded. This seat is anyone’s game, and if we want to keep our MAGA Majority in Congress, I need your financial support. ************************************************************ Thank you, Jimmy Patronis | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIMMY PATRONIS, INC. | |
