# [My Father](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159908827&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5OTA4ODI3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM1Mjg1NzgsImV4cCI6MTc0NjEyMDU3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.siHlG23byzUFesl7MQSFUqfZ2eqti5Fe0vu7W8lq5YE)
### The first superhero I ever met sparked a fire that will never relent
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Apr 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159908827&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5OTA4ODI3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MzUyODU3OCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ2MTIwNTc4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OM79xADcNi6wcv95e0idv3Acj2cG6oXm8E8lUn2dF4A&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159908827&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5OTA4ODI3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM1Mjg1NzgsImV4cCI6MTc0NjEyMDU3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.siHlG23byzUFesl7MQSFUqfZ2eqti5Fe0vu7W8lq5YE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159908827&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5OTA4ODI3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM1Mjg1NzgsImV4cCI6MTc0NjEyMDU3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.siHlG23byzUFesl7MQSFUqfZ2eqti5Fe0vu7W8lq5YE)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC9teS1mYXRoZXI_.qjAZm11ODVdVaBSGWjJ8qwI0nIhK7BvcziDTc9rgEA4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/my-father?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

There's something indescribable about holding your father's hand as he returns to his Maker. You feel his pulse dissipate, his chest rise and fall slower, then slower yet, and watch helplessly as he takes his final breath.
On Friday, March 28 at 10:45 am Chicago time, on the final Jummah of Ramadan 2025, my dear father returned to his Creator.
إِنَّا لِلّهِ وَإِنَّـا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعونَ
On Sunday March 30, the final day of Ramadan, we held his Janaza (funeral).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/97420e3a-6e17-46dd-af59-e2494e2ea3a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My father's funeral on the last day of Ramadan, 2025.
My father died in the comfort of his own home, as his four children held him tightly, counting every last heartbeat, every last breath.
He died while his 11 beautiful grandchildren, ranging from 2 years to 18 years, looking on longingly.
He died while his sisters, nieces, nephews, and daughters in-law sat nearby and prayed for him, as he slipped away.
He died surrounded by love, prayers, by warmth, and with the knowledge that he completed his life's purpose, passed his test, and that it was time to return home.
The Holy Qu'ran, which is the final holy book for Muslims, teaches us that ultimately this life is temporary and a trial, and that every human being will one day return to the Almighty who created us. The Qur'an declares in Chapter 2, Verse 29:
> How can you disbelieve in Allah? When you were without life, He gave you life, and then He will cause you to die, then restore you to life, and then to Him shall you be made to return.
The Qur'an goes on to teach us the Arabic prayer to recite when someone dies as إِنَّا لِلّهِ وَإِنَّـا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعونَ which roughly translates to "_To God we belong and to God must we return_."
I cannot possibly do justice to my father's prolific life and service in one article, nor will I try. Instead, I'd like to share a few anecdotes that exemplify who he was, what he stood for, and what legacy he leaves behind.
This is Maulana Abdur Rashid Yahya.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/64218e65-7587-4e9f-9b2a-712eccd031a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My father, Abdur Rashid Yahya, at the young age of 17.
## Who He Was
Servant, scholar, leader, author, orator, Imam, linguist, professor, judge, world traveler, health enthusiast, fashion aficionado, husband, father to four, and grandfather to 11 -- that was my father, Maulana Abdur Rashid Yahya.
Maulana Abdur Rashid Yahya was born on June 19, 1950 as the eighth of nine children, in a small village known as Muradwal in the Punjab region of Pakistan. He was born during the holy month of Ramadan, on the third day. His father, my grandfather Mian Sirajuddin, was a school principal and scholar--a man who spent 15 years studying faith before choosing to affirmatively accept Islam and join in particular the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community.
Muradwal in 1950 was not much different than Muradwal in 2025. While a few homes now have electricity, the village has no paved roads, no plumbing infrastructure, and no real revenue aside from minor farming and agriculture. How did an infant born to a rural middle class family in the agricultural regions of Pakistan, a nation then only 3 years old, live a life that took him around the world? From Pakistan to the United States, the United Kingdom and the UAE, South Korea and South Africa, Guatemala and Germany, Lesotho and Botswana, Mecca and Medina, Rabwah and Qadian, New York and North York, Hamilton and Harrisburg, Mozambique and Manchester, Southfields London, and the South side of Chicago, and the list yet continues?
My grandfather raised my father with the intention of dedicating his son's life as a servant of humanity. Accordingly, after completing his high school education and his Bachelors, my father gained admission to Jamia Ahmadiyya in Rabwah, Pakistan--a 7-year Islamic seminary. Here, he would gain a scholarly command of Arabic, Urdu, and English, and a deep knowledge of Persian/Farsi. He would complete the intense 7-year study in only 6 years, and still graduate at the top of his class in 1975. A year later he and my late mother, Tahira Rashid, were wed in April of 1976. They welcomed their first child, my elder brother, in February of 1977. Tragedy struck when only 13 days later, my grandfather passed away while my father was a young man of 26.
My father was rarely emotional, but even into the final years of his life when he would speak of his own father, his eyes would well up with tears because he missed him. (_Despite the pain I feel in losing my father, I take comfort in knowing that nearly a half century later my father is reunited with his own father_).
But in those 13 days, before my grandfather's passing, something else happened. That infant born in the remote hamlet of Muradwal was appointed by the then third Khalifa of the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community to travel to the United States of America as an Imam and Islamic scholar. My grandfather died knowing his youngest son would carry on his legacy of scholarship and service to humanity on a global scale. My father thus patiently bore the loss of his father, remained committed to his mission, and entrusted my mother and his first born to his family and to the Almighty. With that, he departed Pakistan and soon arrived in the United States. In this iconic 1977 photo he stands on a ferry with the Statue of Liberty behind him (_which I tried to recreate in 2023_).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/77677582-8c39-4495-bb96-8608e4ccd136?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The original (left), and the copycat (right).
He would not return to Pakistan for more than four years. When we were children he would tell us how even calling my mother from the United States required scheduling a long-distance international phone call a week in advance, and at a cost of roughly $5 per minute--which in today's terms would be almost $26 per minute. I cannot imagine the level of sacrifice, patience, and commitment he imbibed to relentlessly continue his work--separated by oceans and continents from his wife, child, mother, and siblings. It was this ardent dedication to education, to service, and to fulfilling his promise to his own father that carried my father through his next nearly 50 years of service before his deteriorating health prevented him from continuing his work.
It was this commitment that took him all over the world, where he left his mark with service in Pakistan, the United States, South Korea, South Africa, Lesotho, Botswana, Mozambique, Guatemala, and Canada.
It was all driven by what he stood for.
## What He Stood For
Though my father was an Islamic scholar and professor who taught doctorate and post-doctorate level classes on Qur'anic hermeneutics, Hanafi, Maliki, Shafi'i, and Hanbali, and Jafaari jurisprudence, and split-word Arabic translation of the Qur'an--my siblings and I were never indoctrinated with any form of religious compulsion. Though he was resolute on praying five times a day, reciting the Holy Qur'an every morning at least, and offering _Tahujjed_(voluntary) prayer each night--my siblings and I were never forced to pray. And though he generously donated more than 10% of his meagre income to charity--my siblings and I were never* forced to donate our incomes to charity once we started working.
On the contrary, when I questioned my faith as a teen, he not only encouraged me to study the [Holy Qur'an](https://substack.com/redirect/dc0e359e-a288-472a-991b-742d843cefb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and read engrossing books like [The Philosophy of the Teachings of Islam](https://substack.com/redirect/324ee8a8-5867-4b4a-b6a0-ad8993f9288a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), he just as adamantly encouraged me to study other religions, attend other services, and read books by scholars and writers of different faiths (and no faith). My father, Maulana Abdur Rashid Yahya, the Islamic scholar, is why I took the time to read books by Christian apologists Lee Stroble, Paul E. Miller, and Dr. Philip Jenkins, new atheist writers Richard Dawkins, Christopher Hitches, and Sam Harris, and a variety of orthodox Muslim scholars, among scholars of other religions. My father is why I visited Hindu temples, Jewish Synagogues, and a host of other houses of worship belonging to different faiths. He is why I've read the Gospels cover to cover numerous times, the Torah and the Vedas, Kitab al-Aqdas, and the Book of Mormon.
My father understood that faith is personal between a person and Allah the Creator. That the Qur'anic commandment "_There shall be no compulsion in religion_ " (2:257) was not a suggestion to be considered, but a sacred protection of freedom of conscience to be honored for _all_ humanity. He believed, as I now do too, that when I stand before the Almighty, I will be asked about the choices I made, and why I chose to believe what I believe--and answering "_because my father told me to believe that_ ," won't cut it. Perhaps the greatest gift my father ever gave me was that rather than teaching me _what_ to think blindly, he pushed me to learn _how_ to think critically.
Thus, on all things related to matters of faith he simply led by example, taught us how Islam's founder Prophet Muhammad (sa) practiced and exemplified Islam, and let us come to our own conclusions. "_Your grandfather studied faith for 15 years before formally accepting Islam and choosing to join the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community, " _my father would remind us,_ "With that living example in front of me, how can I force faith on any of my children_?" This, in a nutshell, was my father's frame of reference on matters of faith.
On matters of service to humanity, however, none of the above seemed to apply.
Service to humanity was not an option. It was an order. As ferociously as he protected us from religious indoctrination, he unrelentingly infused in us the need to serve all humanity regardless of faith, color, or creed. "_I don 't care who the person is, what religion they follow or don't follow, where they are from, or even if they mistreat you, never miss the opportunity to serve humanity. You should be so focused on serving all humanity that your only question should be--did I fulfill my obligation to my neighbor in need_?"
This was his response to every complaint we made, as young kids often do, when it was time to do the hard work--whether it was feeding the hungry, raising funds for the less fortunate including out of our own pockets, or cleaning up trash on the side of a busy highway. Above I wrote an asterisk next to "never" when addressing charitable donations. While my father never _forced_ us to donate to charity, he incessantly reminded us that this was a matter of faith and trust in God, that He would increase our incomes if we donated to the less fortunate. _And_ it was a matter of service to humanity as direct financial donations are among, if not the, most practical means to elevate the less fortunate.
Thus, the only _indoctrination_ my siblings and I received growing up was to relentlessly stand for justice for any and every marginalized community. I can pinpoint this lesson as among my chief inspirations to pursue a law degree and practice human rights law. It's why I skipped my senior year mid-terms in college to travel to Louisiana to provide support to Katrina victims in 2005, and why I traveled to Turkey, Lahaina, and LA in 2023 and 2024 to support earthquake victims and fire victims, respectively. Service to all humanity is what my father stood for and that is the legacy he leaves behind.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/871c7299-36c9-4079-80e1-bce804cb2ad4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Law School Graduation, Richmond, VA. Flowers provided by my father.
## The Legacy He Leaves Behind
Everything I am today, I owe to my father. I see a man who never lived a life of luxury, yet was wealthy beyond comprehension. In his final months, before he lost his ability to speak, a nurse asked him if he had any regrets in life? He responded with conviction, "_None. I consider myself more fortunate than the world 's wealthiest billionaires. I have lived a wonderful life, and if this is what God has in store for me as my final chapter, then I am content with His will knowing I did everything I could with what He gave me_." Even in his final days before lost consciousness I would ask him how he was doing, and despite the pain he endured, his only response was to whisper with what little strength he had, "Alhumdolillah," i.e. God be praised.
I see a man who struggled with health issues throughout his life, yet never made excuses to delay his work. He suffered Rheumatic fever as a child, which left permanent scarring on his heart. He broke both collar bones in accidents. He endured emergency gall bladder surgery. He endured cataract surgery. He endured major oral reconstructive surgery. He endured double heart valve replacement open heart surgery, caused by the deteriorative effects of Rheumatic fever decades prior. And finally, he suffered debilitating PSP, which is a rare form of incurable and untreatable Parkinson's, a neurological disease that finally took his life.
Despite it all, he endured.
His life exemplifies to me the power of faith in God and quite simply, the power of conviction despite obstacles. As I look at the world today and see what are seemingly insurmountable obstacles and injustices, I reflect on my father's example of a man who, without worldly means, remained unrelenting in his work to do what is right. And in doing so, throughout his life he advanced the causes of justice and humanity by educating tens of thousands, raising tens of millions in funds for the less fortunate, and raising four children, 11 grandchildren, and dozens of nephews and nieces committed to the relentless pursuit of service to all humanity.
Love of the Almighty, and love of service to all humanity. That is my father's legacy, and that is how I shall always remember him.
## A Smile Is Charity
And through all his struggles, my father loved to laugh. His cackle was distinct, joyous, and infectious. I recall sharing with him a quote from Mark Twain who wrote:
> When I was a boy of 14, my father was so ignorant I could hardly stand to have the old man around. But when I got to be 21, I was astonished at how much the old man had learned in seven years.
My father's subsequent laughter is one I will never forget. And his laughter was surpassed only by his sharp whit. I recall the day my eldest son, now 16, was born. I turned to my father on the drive home from the hospital to say, "_I 'm cherishing today, and likewise, I can't wait until he's old enough that I can hold a conversation with him. Abbu, at what age can you really start to have those dialogues where you can reason with your children_?"
As soon as I spoke I bit my tongue, but my father pounced like a lion on its prey, smiling as he responded, "_Reason with your kids? I 'll let you know when it happens, son_." I could only chuckle and concede, "_Well played, grandpa. Well played_."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/671d19e0-640a-4359-8bed-a1267853a341?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My father holding my son the day he was born.
Again, as we struggle through the difficulties of contemporary life, I'm reminded of my father's example to remember to smile and laugh with your loved ones. As Prophet Muhammad (sa) taught, "_Even a smile is charity_."
## Closing Thoughts...For Now
As I mentioned, no one article can do justice to my father's life, so I will be sure to revisit life lessons from him in the future. For now I close with the final lesson my father taught me--the precious value of the time we have.
My father was an enemy to apathy and an ardent opponent of procrastination. He cherished every moment he had, and it was impossible to find him wasting his time or anyone else's time.
His emphasis on time made me reflect on this fact.
In the religion of Islam, the _Adhaan_ (call to prayer) is recited in your ear when you're born--but there's no prayer offered. Likewise, a funeral prayer is offered at your death--but there's no _Adhaan_ to announce that prayer. From that perspective, the _Adhaan_ at your birth is for the prayer at your death.
In our actual five daily prayers, once the _Adhaan_ is called, everyone who hears it understands that the prayer will begin in just a few moments, so be ready to stand before the Almighty. And thus is how we are called to view life. The time between the _Adhaan_ at our birth, and the funeral prayer at our death, may stretch 74 years 9 months, and 9 days as it did for my father. Or, it may be the blink of an eye, as it was for my father's 84-year-old sister who remembers the day he was born, and wept as she saw him breathe his last. She lamented to me behind a waterfall of tears, "My little brother was _just_ born--how his he _already_ gone?"
For Muslims this is a constant reminder that life is too short to worry about petty things or worse, to harm others. It is a reminder that instead, we must spend our short lives and the precious moments we have in service to one another. That we must be relentless in our service, as indeed that is the only true religion--indiscriminate service to all humanity.
Everything I am, I owe to Maulana Abdur Rashid Yahya. His love and prayers, his mentoring and guidance, his compassion and conviction, his good looks and charming personality, and his unassailable ability to lead by example--qualities that have left an everlasting mark on my heart and mind.
Thank you to the literally thousands of readers, friends, supporters, subscribers, and strangers who have taken the time to send me your notes of love and support and prayers. I do not have the capacity to respond to each person individually, but I have made it a priority to read each comment--please know you have my gratitude. Many have asked how they can offer their support. I can only conclude with the lessons I learned from my father.
If you pray, say a prayer. And whether you pray or not, consider making a charitable contribution to Humanity First USA--my father's favorite charity--to combat hunger, blindness, and poverty.
[Donate to Humanity First USA](https://substack.com/redirect/a68c4c95-b227-44c6-b3b9-5b7098cd714e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Indeed, whatever our differentiating factors, let us remain united on the one true religion--service to all humanity. Nothing would have made my father more proud.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f341cf62-6737-420c-9929-0040f4b213ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Maulana Abdur Rashid Yahya (June 19, 1950 - March 28, 2025)

The first superhero I ever met sparked a fire that will never relent | | | Apr 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | There's something indescribable about holding your father's hand as he returns to his Maker. You feel his pulse dissipate, his chest rise and fall slower, then slower yet, and watch helplessly as he takes his final breath. On Friday, March 28 at 10:45 am Chicago time, on the final Jummah of Ramadan 2025, my dear father returned to his Creator. إِنَّا لِلّهِ وَإِنَّـا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعونَ On Sunday March 30, the final day of Ramadan, we held his Janaza (funeral). | | ---|---|--- My father's funeral on the last day of Ramadan, 2025. My father died in the comfort of his own home, as his four children held him tightly, counting every last heartbeat, every last breath. He died while his 11 beautiful grandchildren, ranging from 2 years to 18 years, looking on longingly. He died while his sisters, nieces, nephews, and daughters in-law sat nearby and prayed for him, as he slipped away. He died surrounded by love, prayers, by warmth, and with the knowledge that he completed his life's purpose, passed his test, and that it was time to return home. The Holy Qu'ran, which is the final holy book for Muslims, teaches us that ultimately this life is temporary and a trial, and that every human being will one day return to the Almighty who created us. The Qur'an declares in Chapter 2, Verse 29: How can you disbelieve in Allah? When you were without life, He gave you life, and then He will cause you to die, then restore you to life, and then to Him shall you be made to return. The Qur'an goes on to teach us the Arabic prayer to recite when someone dies as إِنَّا لِلّهِ وَإِنَّـا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعونَ which roughly translates to "To God we belong and to God must we return." I cannot possibly do justice to my father's prolific life and service in one article, nor will I try. Instead, I'd like to share a few anecdotes that exemplify who he was, what he stood for, and what legacy he leaves behind. This is Maulana Abdur Rashid Yahya. | | ---|---|--- My father, Abdur Rashid Yahya, at the young age of 17. Who He Was Servant, scholar, leader, author, orator, Imam, linguist, professor, judge, world traveler, health enthusiast, fashion aficionado, husband, father to four, and grandfather to 11 -- that was my father, Maulana Abdur Rashid Yahya. Maulana Abdur Rashid Yahya was born on June 19, 1950 as the eighth of nine children, in a small village known as Muradwal in the Punjab region of Pakistan. He was born during the holy month of Ramadan, on the third day. His father, my grandfather Mian Sirajuddin, was a school principal and scholar--a man who spent 15 years studying faith before choosing to affirmatively accept Islam and join in particular the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community. Muradwal in 1950 was not much different than Muradwal in 2025. While a few homes now have electricity, the village has no paved roads, no plumbing infrastructure, and no real revenue aside from minor farming and agriculture. How did an infant born to a rural middle class family in the agricultural regions of Pakistan, a nation then only 3 years old, live a life that took him around the world? From Pakistan to the United States, the United Kingdom and the UAE, South Korea and South Africa, Guatemala and Germany, Lesotho and Botswana, Mecca and Medina, Rabwah and Qadian, New York and North York, Hamilton and Harrisburg, Mozambique and Manchester, Southfields London, and the South side of Chicago, and the list yet continues? My grandfather raised my father with the intention of dedicating his son's life as a servant of humanity. Accordingly, after completing his high school education and his Bachelors, my father gained admission to Jamia Ahmadiyya in Rabwah, Pakistan--a 7-year Islamic seminary. Here, he would gain a scholarly command of Arabic, Urdu, and English, and a deep knowledge of Persian/Farsi. He would complete the intense 7-year study in only 6 years, and still graduate at the top of his class in 1975. A year later he and my late mother, Tahira Rashid, were wed in April of 1976. They welcomed their first child, my elder brother, in February of 1977. Tragedy struck when only 13 days later, my grandfather passed away while my father was a young man of 26. My father was rarely emotional, but even into the final years of his life when he would speak of his own father, his eyes would well up with tears because he missed him. (Despite the pain I feel in losing my father, I take comfort in knowing that nearly a half century later my father is reunited with his own father). But in those 13 days, before my grandfather's passing, something else happened. That infant born in the remote hamlet of Muradwal was appointed by the then third Khalifa of the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community to travel to the United States of America as an Imam and Islamic scholar. My grandfather died knowing his youngest son would carry on his legacy of scholarship and service to humanity on a global scale. My father thus patiently bore the loss of his father, remained committed to his mission, and entrusted my mother and his first born to his family and to the Almighty. With that, he departed Pakistan and soon arrived in the United States. In this iconic 1977 photo he stands on a ferry with the Statue of Liberty behind him (which I tried to recreate in 2023). | | ---|---|--- The original (left), and the copycat (right). He would not return to Pakistan for more than four years. When we were children he would tell us how even calling my mother from the United States required scheduling a long-distance international phone call a week in advance, and at a cost of roughly $5 per minute--which in today's terms would be almost $26 per minute. I cannot imagine the level of sacrifice, patience, and commitment he imbibed to relentlessly continue his work--separated by oceans and continents from his wife, child, mother, and siblings. It was this ardent dedication to education, to service, and to fulfilling his promise to his own father that carried my father through his next nearly 50 years of service before his deteriorating health prevented him from continuing his work. It was this commitment that took him all over the world, where he left his mark with service in Pakistan, the United States, South Korea, South Africa, Lesotho, Botswana, Mozambique, Guatemala, and Canada. It was all driven by what he stood for. What He Stood For Though my father was an Islamic scholar and professor who taught doctorate and post-doctorate level classes on Qur'anic hermeneutics, Hanafi, Maliki, Shafi'i, and Hanbali, and Jafaari jurisprudence, and split-word Arabic translation of the Qur'an--my siblings and I were never indoctrinated with any form of religious compulsion. Or, it may be the blink of an eye, as it was for my father's 84-year-old sister who remembers the day he was born, and wept as she saw him breathe his last. She lamented to me behind a waterfall of tears, "My little brother was just born--how his he already gone?" For Muslims this is a constant reminder that life is too short to worry about petty things or worse, to harm others. It is a reminder that instead, we must spend our short lives and the precious moments we have in service to one another. That we must be relentless in our service, as indeed that is the only true religion--indiscriminate service to all humanity. Everything I am, I owe to Maulana Abdur Rashid Yahya. His love and prayers, his mentoring and guidance, his compassion and conviction, his good looks and charming personality, and his unassailable ability to lead by example--qualities that have left an everlasting mark on my heart and mind. Thank you to the literally thousands of readers, friends, supporters, subscribers, and strangers who have taken the time to send me your notes of love and support and prayers. I do not have the capacity to respond to each person individually, but I have made it a priority to read each comment--please know you have my gratitude. Many have asked how they can offer their support. I can only conclude with the lessons I learned from my father. If you pray, say a prayer. And whether you pray or not, consider making a charitable contribution to Humanity First USA--my father's favorite charity--to combat hunger, blindness, and poverty. Indeed, whatever our differentiating factors, let us remain united on the one true religion--service to all humanity. Nothing would have made my father more proud. | | ---|---|--- Maulana Abdur Rashid Yahya (June 19, 1950 - March 28, 2025) Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Today is Election Day
body:
This is no joke, we can't lose 2 House seats.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/agdF/?__vbtrk=MjgzMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, two critical special elections for **FL-01** and **FL-06** are happening today in Florida.
Hakeem Jeffries and the entire DNC are hoping that patriots like you take our historic victory last year for granted and sit this one out. They know exactly what’s at stake if our GOP majority shrinks even further.
**The stakes couldn’t be higher for our country’s future.****This is the Left’s first true opportunity to strike a blow against President Trump and our razor-thin GOP House majority.**
When the polls close this evening, we will know whether we are able to maintain our grip on these pivotal House seats or watch them slip into the hands of Democrats who want to undermine President Trump and our America First agenda.
[DEFEND THE HOUSE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/agdF/?__vbtrk=MjgzMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Progressive mega-donors and Deep State interests are **_funneling millions into these races_**. If this wasn’t one of the most important moments since President Trump’s victory they wouldn’t be spending that much money. They know how vital this moment is.
If they pull this off, the bold promises President Trump and House Republicans made to the American people, our entire America First vision, will face relentless roadblocks from an empowered Democratic House faction.
**Democrats are even promising to file articles of impeachment. This isn’t conjecture, they’re openly saying it.**
[DEFEND AMERICA FIRST](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/agdF/?__vbtrk=MjgzMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Fellow patriot, I am reaching out to you right now because we need help getting out the vote and we can’t afford a misstep in Florida.
These districts voted Republican last November but Democrats are banking on conservatives dropping the ball. The Left is assuming that we won’t muster the resources or resolve to push back as they mobilize their base.
**In these final moments our ability to get our voters to the polls will make the difference between victory and defeat.**
I created the **House GOP Battleground Fund** to ensure that conservatives fighting to defend the House have the resources that they need to stay in the fight and that is exactly what we are doing today in Florida.
**_[I'm humbly asking that you please rush a donation to our Get Out The Vote initiatives immediately to help us secure victory](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/agdF/?__vbtrk=MjgzMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

I am deeply grateful for every patriot that stands with me in our fight to defend the House and save America.
_Your fellow patriot,_
**Elise Stefanik**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/agdF/?__vbtrk=MjgzMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a33163d-7f24-49c8-b4b0-88f87179d06c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

**BYE BYE, IRS!**
**Read this to see how you could actually get to keep MORE of your money.**
**🚨 BREAKING:** TRUMP and ELON have a plan to stop the government from ROBBING YOU!
For far too long, bureaucrats at the IRS have been PREYING on hardworking Americans like you.
But that's all about to change.
---
[**TRUMP WANTS TO ABOLISH THE INCOME AND PROPERTY TAXES!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/6a30pZdV2kHnwStsKiLlUA52iTw89b-YRQivm-_wQ1gd68fjrV-M3H2k3fp7cLJHtOM1KNb_tKa137kE-LmOjq_un3LFY4mDG9fy-bNcITVIofvIcDR9cHTyOR5Qe7tAuk9sHPG5W8dTSG--DqOvW4sKF3ppu9ZRRkYcct-djfD4G76dNVBuwlyUj7DDIvIrdLotRYCouIAeBMZTYN0hqci4uA4yTn1znxve_fVXR8m8f8KQwbGJ1qHmB11vdRoTUhjU8_mQTIOmvUru06Mz0AYOCIKvEr9gabxQTXFhoXi0Mu7mICB85kXeKXiiU2VBYYAtmZD4QAbM758EyB1bLBOBhBOBCdthhG6811KDf9O9pegyawQSfXqfb2H2JT27uMIfsMb1jxcoWFBgKu-3zzg-eiQozWD-7NM6RqFUIajsR8Ygpy7bvjEsm_vUSq_0mt8aPkZc81CM7cE/-BVUDQh6szHNzfDia3yrPyXXEXJx4sqa/7)
---
**This could be one of the BIGGEST wins for the American people __in history.__**
President Trump knows that your income belongs in YOUR pocket -- not the federal government's.
Imagine the financial freedom you could have by keeping EVERY PENNY of your paycheck -- no more deductions, no more IRS meddling!
But here's the thing...we need you to **SIGN THE PETITION BEFORE MIDNIGHT ⬇️⬇️**
TRUMP needs to know that EVERY AMERICAN is on board with this plan, or it could fall by the wayside. _**[Do you support Trump and Elon's GROUNDBREAKING TAX PLAN?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/4pArjz58WHckdn5t3UzmrpaDCNE6_vQJDZ4pIYxrKFQVH1UgoeYV7LhgUPmQaegjgbnpMjofHXbnR74auWeTlb1UT0K2IQOddgv28siCwTkjjxg4ugvxNne2u0YV10McqQggL1HCRm42jWW0wu3rMj1qyofYGniuiMlG3tRNwy4kIis1zArU2QT2-qqCmacpJHWVNif1S7knrL_MMGqY5fMArAhVUMNsPMj2Ns2iBcPkCo_nY56eIdknDUQ7EuYfW0Z1G6htQLDzMt76MS91-FJxppT8swFTsf2q6yuFm0BN3ZBfPiVmfhqbHLZUicyoPjP5u58kC3oUASTUy0tu_KTAI6-t4Q5UldGhx20b7HNUc0wWIk50hMg9qg8E6GiMM-8QJMJP5E3aqw8kJtPmsKHuLv82UlS7Dx3kXqs2gxvJXYkTZgYyOQpLleA8Ru2c8DO-aj15UCEaEXc/9LDbhKBe5i08d6z4gpgav2zi6uLKjP6Z/7)**_
**Sign your name below to send a message: NO MORE TAXES-EVER ⬇️**

[PRE-ORDER HERE](http://links.heavenhelpusbook.com/s/c/LF0JRCV40i7KdZlcccXHHN6wGbZXXNBKmsJCyLKtvR9byGifRmcS6X85S0pl0PUg8ID0AxIsMwNb3Oy2hUun42m7TDCY2kbLy3t2UcphGByOUOHYGrf9E8raiRGPTXg0Pb0NV2DWr7rX37_lbNHZatF4P-h5RG7TKgGUT2RGYg6r1kWFr1lIW8plW3EpmCMwbWLbirXQTulVV1-7YnCb5lioXRonIxtLxR96T7iiI30CluhDFTt81taQk5LGdJpYjpQ1Kt9f0yMEFdKXi6-CyHlQivvBLw/6wyUA2vcgjnJ-L0UK01mr0zjUzrY-qPg/7)

One of the most common questions I hear is, _**“How do we turn things around in our country?”**_

I believe the answer starts with reconnecting to our faith-based communities - our churches, synagogues, mosques, and other houses of worship. These are the places that provide strength, comfort, and a sense of belonging, especially in times of division.

Heaven Help Us is a playbook for people finding purpose through their community - showing how ordinary Americans, supported by faith-driven organizations, are doing extraordinary good all across the country. These inspiring stories will surprise you and fill you with optimism for the future.
---
[](http://links.heavenhelpusbook.com/s/c/jAb_QZBwFPAD1_y8grE-XEi8rdLkHfIMLY59Wax8a0evK6UDVlfAVyqkFPw7DgXotOUwia2n8JeOnwXNB7M-2exFhg8csEzhgKasdR1YBwErcEyNzDvZrUBWwzDStsdYQYKLcaoRk2jOb61sEmPOnrgMpMmMeRkRW9FIRYZBUuWxlgWWIxUQXiOP09F3XvCLFtEUfEbZT9ZHQl2WNLHEwaLY7XhKOZilDtkguTYSNWKqfxx9QynTv5UcYamXJgaOG6ctQLX3oeJmLJm6jZ3jwS4Ildp1lg/U8_7hXazg14ng3unYmXOcbojlB4FrbR8/7)
---
We all know that America is stronger when we are working together. With our current division, it may seem like a distant concept, but I believe that we can find inspiration in these stories to help us rediscover and make a real, positive impact.

Stay tuned for more information as we approach the April 8 launch date! If you would like to pre-order a copy, please visit this website: [HeavenHelpUsBook.com](http://links.heavenhelpusbook.com/s/c/ahHlvbZZ8oS7DOGeLn2lpcUlO5tqNmPqX5ie6xKkD--n4jNLz8tqxY4QEOI_vkEBSVhFyCqww1uojjJ3BmEMQdqhJSTLWGpm0cfVHaTJdwNG_vmYUhiKbwiDYK3BFWBKG-Uli_z-Gd7XuVpmxbXgiKfYmjmOqwNC_RWbUkSGgnjTt2dI5Mtv649kLl3FNSiUtuX5Cs1Y70DxwmKYiGHhgZeYkvBDWesoaaCU6Vy8f3H72D1BSg43aD5x1037doDMXPweZkiMYHJDKM3yLbjBtBr72M_ccQ/yATt9xgNsFT9qIObJ93q3skgAiIJ73Ve/7)

Thank you for all that you are doing to help!

-John
---

# Tuesday April 1, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** Thanks for being a loyal reader of _The Flyover_. Today, we're sending along a special message for you from one of our sponsors, World Concern. _The Flyover_ works hard to publish a quick read of relevant news each day - without the corporate media bias - and we deliver it absolutely FREE to our loyal readers. We can do this thanks to advertisers like [World Concern](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00cuq2zAQxvGnkXc28kjyZaFFUuOunE0b0q6MIo0dFV2MrCT07UtKoYTDWf-YPwzfZZonZZ0N60l5lHmJs0FjtcpoZspLWpcg5rowckEEZAXKuuVMMNZyKG6Sdn3b9O2V6Rq4AdOKmkJvFkE7NLrpCiuBgqCc1nXLe0YrIRoD10V1or9ypRrCKRqbY6p-RRvyDRf3Oz4wVTr6wslbzttO2IHASGBc7cOGtXrG5IyOQWMKVUwrgXFTKxIYx_Np-HH8_u08fSVsvGc_7_GeNBI2_OsSaJTfCDu-0KOxd0_YgF5Z90YZ0wvUtqF6Fx1DxpD_J8uAz91hzpjKjyGt_KbsGggbzpcvw_TzcKIMRJGk2Z7WObs3LeF0fR3-fTp_PsNDwp8AAAD__w_8jHk), who help us pay our writers and editors - and literally help us to keep the lights on. Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00M9uozAQx_GnMTeQGdv8OfiQXcSeyGU3yvaEjD0QV8ZGxknUt69SpWovvX6k31eaOQ_joKyzfjmqFWWaw2jQWK0SmpHynJY5iLHMjJwRAVmGsqw5E4zVHLKLbCva1E3ZqElUU8Nx1jWiVhRMW9ZQQWYlUBCU07KsectoIURlYJpVI9qJK1URTtHYFGLxGqxPF5zdW7hhLHRYMycvKW07YQcCPYF-sTfrl-IeojM6eI3RFyEuBPpNLUig70_H7v-vf39Pwx_C-mtaxz1co0bCumeXQPXgFY29roR1uCrrnpgwPkhtG6pP08En9OkrkHu87w5Twph_H2u1bsounrDudP7dDS-HI2UgsijNdrfO2b2qCafLY_JxXPr53TcJ7wEAAP__HnKFeA) [**A devastating 7.7-magnitude earthquake struck Myanmar**](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00M9uozAQx_GnMTeQGdv8OfiQXcSeyGU3yvaEjD0QV8ZGxknUt69SpWovvX6k31eaOQ_joKyzfjmqFWWaw2jQWK0SmpHynJY5iLHMjJwRAVmGsqw5E4zVHLKLbCva1E3ZqElUU8Nx1jWiVhRMW9ZQQWYlUBCU07KsectoIURlYJpVI9qJK1URTtHYFGLxGqxPF5zdW7hhLHRYMycvKW07YQcCPYF-sTfrl-IeojM6eI3RFyEuBPpNLUig70_H7v-vf39Pwx_C-mtaxz1co0bCumeXQPXgFY29roR1uCrrnpgwPkhtG6pP08En9OkrkHu87w5Twph_H2u1bsounrDudP7dDS-HI2UgsijNdrfO2b2qCafLY_JxXPr53TcJ7wEAAP__HnKFeA) and Southeast Asia last Thursday night, leaving behind devastation, death, and despair. Homes have crumbled, families are displaced, and critical infrastructure has collapsed. At this moment, there are more than 2700 casualties reported, and the toll is expected to rise by thousands more. [Please give today!](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00M9uozAQx_GnMTeQGdv8OfiQXcSeyGU3yvaEjD0QV8ZGxknUt69SpWovvX6k31eaOQ_joKyzfjmqFWWaw2jQWK0SmpHynJY5iLHMjJwRAVmGsqw5E4zVHLKLbCva1E3ZqElUU8Nx1jWiVhRMW9ZQQWYlUBCU07KsectoIURlYJpVI9qJK1URTtHYFGLxGqxPF5zdW7hhLHRYMycvKW07YQcCPYF-sTfrl-IeojM6eI3RFyEuBPpNLUig70_H7v-vf39Pwx_C-mtaxz1co0bCumeXQPXgFY29roR1uCrrnpgwPkhtG6pP08En9OkrkHu87w5Twph_H2u1bsounrDudP7dDS-HI2UgsijNdrfO2b2qCafLY_JxXPr53TcJ7wEAAP__HnKFeA) [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00M9uozAQx_GnMTeQGdv8OfiQXcSeyGU3yvaEjD0QV8ZGxknUt69SpWovvX6k31eaOQ_joKyzfjmqFWWaw2jQWK0SmpHynJY5iLHMjJwRAVmGsqw5E4zVHLKLbCva1E3ZqElUU8Nx1jWiVhRMW9ZQQWYlUBCU07KsectoIURlYJpVI9qJK1URTtHYFGLxGqxPF5zdW7hhLHRYMycvKW07YQcCPYF-sTfrl-IeojM6eI3RFyEuBPpNLUig70_H7v-vf39Pwx_C-mtaxz1co0bCumeXQPXgFY29roR1uCrrnpgwPkhtG6pP08En9OkrkHu87w5Twph_H2u1bsounrDudP7dDS-HI2UgsijNdrfO2b2qCafLY_JxXPr53TcJ7wEAAP__HnKFeA)

*** Emergency medical care, medicines, and vaccinations**
*** Safe water, hygiene kits, and sanitation services**
*** Emergency shelter and essential supplies for displaced families**
Every moment counts--and every gift helps. clean_body: | | | | | | Tuesday April 1, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! Thanks for being a loyal reader of The Flyover. Today, we're sending along a special message for you from one of our sponsors, World Concern. The Flyover works hard to publish a quick read of relevant news each day - without the corporate media bias - and we deliver it absolutely FREE to our loyal readers. We can do this thanks to advertisers like , who help us pay our writers and editors - and literally help us to keep the lights on. Our advertising partners are critical to our success, and we hope you take a few minutes to read -Cole, CEO Flying together with our sponsor and Southeast Asia last Thursday night, leaving behind devastation, death, and despair. Homes have crumbled, families are displaced, and critical infrastructure has collapsed. At this moment, there are more than 2700 casualties reported, and the toll is expected to rise by thousands more. Your gift today can help provide: Emergency medical care, medicines, and vaccinations * Safe water, hygiene kits, and sanitation services * Emergency shelter and essential supplies for displaced families Every moment counts--and every gift helps. | | The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne, WY 82001-3527 | ---|---

clean_body: Urgent: Help Fund Crucial Senate Races >> | | | Ted Cruz here. I am reaching out to make sure you saw this important message below. Please read now. | From: Ted CruzTo: All Supporters Date: Thursday, March 13, 2025 Subject: Breaking News: Another Open Senate Seat! | | Fellow Conservative, Breaking news: With liberal Democrat Senator Jeanne Shaheen's unexpected announcement, we now have another open Senate seat on the map for this 2026 Election Cycle. Michigan, Minnesota, Georgia, and now New Hampshire are all winnable seats for Republicans to flip, BUT WE NEED TO ACT QUICKLY to fund these races. Important: Open Senate seats are the best opportunity to hold and grow our Republican Majority so we can continue enacting the Trump agenda. We have 'Open Seat Funds' already set up to support the eventual Republican nominees in many states. Please donate right now to KEEP THE SENATE RED! We can't let Democrats derail the historic and Nation-saving work Republicans are doing in the United States Senate to support and protect President Trump and his administration. If we lose the Senate, President Trump's term effectively will be cut in half. Thank you! We can't waste this HUGE opportunity. ** For Liberty, Ted Cruz ** | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Trump illegally terminated union contracts for 700k workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last Thursday, Donald Trump unleashed yet another illegal executive order,
this time attacking workers’ rights.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250401?refcode=em20250401-36551&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36551_1203867_zY3MjG&akid=36551%2E1203867%2EzY3MjG ]Headline from The Hill reading "Trump administration moves to end union
rights for many federal workers"

He instructed 18 federal agencies to unlawfully terminate their collective
bargaining agreements with 700,000 union workers.

This is a war on workers,
Peter. Working people's power cannot be
dependent on a totalitarian president.

Unions and the labor movement are a threat to billionaires like Trump and
Elon Musk, and as a result, their very existence is currently under
attack.

NOW is the time for us to support unions and fight back. We desperately
need more working-class champions to stand up against union-busting and
other anti-worker actions in Congress, and that’s exactly who Justice
Democrats is working to recruit to run in 2026.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250401?refcode=em20250401-36551&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36551_1203867_zY3MjG&akid=36551%2E1203867%2EzY3MjG ]Fuel our fight with a grassroots contribution of ANY amount. We don’t
take money from corporate PACs, so every dollar you give makes an impact.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250401?refcode=em20250401-36551&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36551_1203867_zY3MjG&akid=36551%2E1203867%2EzY3MjG ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250401-36551-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36551_1203867_zY3MjG&akid=36551%2E1203867%2EzY3MjG

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. subject: Elon Musk thinkstoday’s election is “important for the future of civilization”
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Far-right billionaires like Elon Musk are prepared to flood state-level races with cash, but we’ve proven just last month that when state Democrats stick together, we can win. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Today’s the day. Polls close tonight in Wisconsin’s majority-deciding state Supreme Court race –**a race that will test Elon Musk’s political influence.** Musk-aligned groups have spent over $20 million in Wisconsin to prop up far-right candidate Brad Schimel, and Musk hosted a rally on Sunday where he told voters this election would be _“important for the future of civilization”_ before handing over $1 million checks to two attendees. Far-right billionaires like Elon Musk are prepared to flood state-level races with cash, but we’ve proven – including just last week – that when state Democrats stick together, we can win. [After winning tie-breaking special elections in Minnesota, Pennsylvania, and Virginia this year, the DLCC is fighting to elect even more state Democrats. clean_body: Far-right billionaires like Elon Musk are prepared to flood state-level races with cash, but we’ve proven just last month that when state Democrats stick together, we can win. | | | | | ---|--- Today’s the day. Polls close tonight in Wisconsin’s majority-deciding state Supreme Court race –a race that will test Elon Musk’s political influence. Musk-aligned groups have spent over $20 million in Wisconsin to prop up far-right candidate Brad Schimel, and Musk hosted a rally on Sunday where he told voters this election would be “important for the future of civilization” before handing over $1 million checks to two attendees. Far-right billionaires like Elon Musk are prepared to flood state-level races with cash, but we’ve proven – including just last week – that when state Democrats stick together, we can win. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Let’s hit the ground running. name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
I’m running for Governor of California | | | Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d861a15efd874e549b46cd6feb84e3f1&_e=S48TpEdo2V5RbzgSKjO78TcHEOEqV0JP9-LtivyanG2AmB5WPXATBpG74t_ubUn1GdcWVnPK4ij9TwnzsNrvIW6vGEJ86IxmFDvGOM9VCuahj-N_Dsvd2dfapOcDQCMVSCVmJTZPSRkG3gMAuTgLX9xkQwtjG4xPaRtOmhd26sncaeMx2ebeNFR-qcqUrgU6R9cewqyie7_AqxaqWanCRtwLjOlG4FXOKhSbIAChgwyOPJd87vxaY1iacPHIAJLIB6F1AOKone0XJlkr4aw-SLhipXP-UHuTe7uvmoitwwJh1U1ODVBsAkA31Rx3xDEuw7rqVnErLtsyy8Kp7cT6R3NFY-XaaZnTTtDHAT9dHaMsIOMvsskHgcMt7qa6I_pbRQM8cSfLjASyz8JDeDWR9Q%3D%3D)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d861a15efd874e549b46cd6feb84e3f1&_e=S48TpEdo2V5RbzgSKjO78TcHEOEqV0JP9-LtivyanG2AmB5WPXATBpG74t_ubUn1GdcWVnPK4ij9TwnzsNrvIW6vGEJ86IxmFDvGOM9VCuahj-N_Dsvd2dfapOcDQCMVSCVmJTZPSRkG3gMAuTgLX9xkQwtjG4xPaRtOmhd26sncaeMx2ebeNFR-qcqUrgU6R9cewqyie7_AqxaqWanCRtwLjOlG4FXOKhSbIAChgwyOPJd87vxaY1iacPHIAJLIeI4Zo-GnU3wQvhXaKOlq4wkwl_YmRrNriVRaeJ2WLezUAZ1GwbAWJzVhxIn24G7XvY4Pq3goY0z0frPyQZdYbpgAYeCXmKkiLGwtK988-r-CpNRhWEbfu541tMyn-JvbUdAberNcJek8ytTfZRB8nw%3D%3D)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...**_Republicans turned things around_ by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.****_And we can do that again_**. **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.****[That’s why I’m asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d861a15efd874e549b46cd6feb84e3f1&_e=S48TpEdo2V5RbzgSKjO78TcHEOEqV0JP9-LtivyanG2AmB5WPXATBpG74t_ubUn1GdcWVnPK4ij9TwnzsNrvIW6vGEJ86IxmFDvGOM9VCuahj-N_Dsvd2dfapOcDQCMVSCVmJTZPSRkG3gMAuTgLX9xkQwtjG4xPaRtOmhd26sncaeMx2ebeNFR-qcqUrgU6R9cewqyie7_AqxaqWanCRtwLjOlG4FXOKhSbIAChgwyOPJd87vxaY1iacPHIAJLI-9CsQs8tv8LYAFeRgmQNF0heB_iwiwGMyDHWuylu4i5EIUY7gGJTb4KmCZhBFAw4rgCc58WlA_Lb5gPMwn0jvf9T3BQ6NsyIiDc3UBX1YnRDuu68FkvmXEHP3cBk_mq_RWq1X4DrJQBHeFgIeD7_xw%3D%3D)** More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. **[**When you rush your Bianco for California contribution of $35 or more...**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d861a15efd874e549b46cd6feb84e3f1&_e=S48TpEdo2V5RbzgSKjO78TcHEOEqV0JP9-LtivyanG2AmB5WPXATBpG74t_ubUn1GdcWVnPK4ij9TwnzsNrvIW6vGEJ86IxmFDvGOM9VCuahj-N_Dsvd2dfapOcDQCMVSCVmJTZPSRkG3gMAuTgLX9xkQwtjG4xPaRtOmhd26sncaeMx2ebeNFR-qcqUrgU6R9cewqyie7_AqxaqWanCRtwLjOlG4FXOKhSbIAChgwyOPJd87vxaY1iacPHIAJLI8QFKo90nyYLW32bYonDZLtPH0LS5MLJzuxZcCR8LMbv5SWqNygrkdYXMY7tkFFTpMwCjyRoNyIQK6gV3T-iAMJyqEJ6xKaR1HWPAAH2BZMEAVCC2Gdf50IkY7jsbPDti4VoMCaqlJNIIONAD_c7HhA%3D%3D)**...you’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.__**We rely on everyday Americans like you**_ — _Not liberal Hollywood elites_ —to fund this campaign. **[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to my campaign and give us the resources we need to go up against the Kamala Harris fundraising goliath.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d861a15efd874e549b46cd6feb84e3f1&_e=S48TpEdo2V5RbzgSKjO78TcHEOEqV0JP9-LtivyanG2AmB5WPXATBpG74t_ubUn1GdcWVnPK4ij9TwnzsNrvIW6vGEJ86IxmFDvGOM9VCuahj-N_Dsvd2dfapOcDQCMVSCVmJTZPSRkG3gMAuTgLX9xkQwtjG4xPaRtOmhd26sncaeMx2ebeNFR-qcqUrgU6R9cewqyie7_AqxaqWanCRtwLjOlG4FXOKhSbIAChgwyOPJd87vxaY1iacPHIAJLIYkxBoHuDhhab9NX-jsFQqB93-aC91K5bUXncKxnws4k7pxUYjAwOFAIYko8oCeSBE6ltCrKAlO-iZD_yoy0hqaxENjOkXDC0GDC18eH2vFVNPh0D0pUsavFLwPJMdGsd4ilHF7Vi-cJ_3LpdVCV4_A%3D%3D)** The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you!
---
| | [ **DONATE **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d861a15efd874e549b46cd6feb84e3f1&_e=S48TpEdo2V5RbzgSKjO78TcHEOEqV0JP9-LtivyanG2AmB5WPXATBpG74t_ubUn1GdcWVnPK4ij9TwnzsNrvIW6vGEJ86IxmFDvGOM9VCuahj-N_Dsvd2dfapOcDQCMVSCVmJTZPSRkG3gMAuTgLX9xkQwtjG4xPaRtOmhd26sncaeMx2ebeNFR-qcqUrgU6R9cewqyie7_AqxaqWanCRtwLjOlG4FXOKhSbIAChgwyOPJd87vxaY1iacPHIAJLIOqnM0nhVmTH1LNL0rZoh8twDKIhPQ4YgiTW8ZHEgAOudX2Uguvj1-qWG33EfoIVjZrl2FiGfRXMrqBfQj5iY4B-bIIrc4lQAsu_umhbGNHinSm7QJSP_Fk1r7aLUOnc4VJ-tdsHK6XWDnLI7ukpLJQ%3D%3D)
---
Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco
---

It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you! | | Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco Chad Bianco For Governor | | Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026 PO Box 706Riverside, CA 92502

body:
17 hours and COUNTING!
| **_Cory Booker is our HERO!
He’s been filibustering against Donald Trump and Elon Musk for OVER 17 HOURS:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88562?t=6&akid=19420%2E878179%2E26HxnX) Sen. Booker is exactly the kind of fighter we need right now! [**We need EVERY Democrat reading this to join the fight and THANK Cory Booker for taking a stand against Trump and his MAGA mob! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88562?t=7&akid=19420%2E878179%2E26HxnX) | [**THANK CORY BOOKER: DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88562?t=8&akid=19420%2E878179%2E26HxnX)
---

FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Sen. Booker,

**As of right now, you have been on the Senate floor for over 17 HOURS defending our democracy!_WOW!!!_**

This is true heroism — and exactly the kind of leadership we need to defeat Donald Trump’s disgusting attacks on the American people!

As a proud Democrat, you have my word that I will join your fight and do everything I can to keep electing incredible Democrats like you.

**We know Trump and Musk will _lie, break the law,_ and do _everything possible_ to bring our country backwards — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do!**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88562?t=9&akid=19420%2E878179%2E26HxnX) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88562?t=10&akid=19420%2E878179%2E26HxnX)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Trump is losing confidence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Eleven days ago — just before we learned that President Donald Trump’s
entire national security team texted detailed attack plans over an
unsecured commercial app with a journalist inadvertently added to the
group chat — Pete Hegseth stood next to Trump and, in his best Fox and
Friends anchor voice said: “Under the previous administration we looked
like fools. Not anymore.”

Throughout his career Trump has projected a level of confidence that has
successfully persuaded persuadable people that he is in charge, in command
and in control. His success has depended on people believing that his
bullying, domineering behavior will bend his enemies into submission, cow
his political allies into abject fealty and create successful outcomes for
the country, especially for those who’ve been alienated by political
elites from both parties.

But there are signs that he’s losing this confidence game. His reckless,
chaotic, bizarre and anti-American behavior — and that of the toadies in
his court — is hurting the country. Americans are both seeing it play out
in the news and now feeling it in their lives. One or two mistakes might
be forgivable by the average American, a few more could be understood by
rank and file Republicans. But beyond that, what happens? Just look at
this list, barely three months into his administration:

⁃ He pardoned every one of the thugs who beat police officers on
January 6, 2021

⁃ He switched sides in Ukraine, from defending democracy to
supporting tyranny

⁃ His National Security team’s unlawful sharing of detailed attack
plans put U.S. service members’ lives at risk

⁃ His tariffs are producing higher prices, fewer jobs and panic
throughout the economy

⁃ He’s now admitted that he’ll likely send America into recession
as stocks continue to plunge

⁃ His HHS secretary is telling Texas kids with measles to just
toughen up — after the first child to die of measles in 20 years

⁃ He’s firing 83,000 Americans - most of them veterans - from the
agency that serves those who’ve served our country in uniform

⁃ And he’s defying the courts, the constitution and the rule of law
over and over again

And that’s just for starters.

There are clear signs that his failures are shaking America’s confidence
in his presidency and in the prospects for Republicans no matter where
they’re running.

Last Tuesday, Democrats won a special election for a state senate seat in
a Pennsylvania district that Trump won in November with 57% of the vote.
And Trump last week had to withdraw Congresswoman Elise Stefanik’s
nomination for ambassador to the United Nations out of concern that a
Democrat might win her vacant seat. Trump won her district by 21 points.
Add to that, there’s an outside chance a Democrat could pick up another
Congressional seat in a “safe” Republican district in Florida (more on
this below).

Trump might just lose this confidence game. Our job is to make sure he
does.

Three things we can do this week:

1. If you want to make phone calls to ensure we’re doing everything we
can to help Democrat Josh Weil win a big upset for Congress in a
special election taking place today, please sign up here:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64740?t=1001&akid=240055%2E444211%2E_Ioo_a ]https://www.mobilize.us/mobilize/event/769353
2. There is another special election taking place today — this one will
decide the majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. Elon Musk is
pouring millions of dollars into the race, the question for us is: can
people power defeat oligarchy? You can make phone calls to Wisconsin
voters today here:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64685?t=1002&akid=240055%2E444211%2E_Ioo_a ]https://www.mobilize.us/swingleft/event/549753
3. Join HANDS OFF! this Saturday (4/5/25). This is a national day of
action with more than 700 events planned across the country. Join one
near you, or host one if no one else has already done it:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64449?t=1003&akid=240055%2E444211%2E_Ioo_a ]https://handsoff2025.com

Lastly, thanks to everyone who joined us at the Congressional town hall in
Fort Bend county last Thursday with Tim Walz! More than 2,000 people
joined us, many of whom signed up to do the work that we need to save our
country. Thanks to the Powered by People volunteers who put it on, staffed
it, and made it a success.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250401.glUr2k&refcode=ema20250401-240055&t=1004&akid=240055%2E444211%2E_Ioo_a ]Image of the Fort Bend town hall with Beto and Gov. Tim Walz on stage,
surrounded by people

Thank you,

Beto

Powered by People needs grassroots support to help keep Beto on the road,
connecting with voters across Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250401.glUr2k&refcode=ema20250401-240055&t=1005&akid=240055%2E444211%2E_Ioo_a ]Will you chip in $3 or more right now to fuel this
movement?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250401.glUr2k&refcode=ema20250401-240055&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=240055%2E444211%2E_Ioo_a ]DONATE $3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=240055%2E444211%2E_Ioo_a

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Oregon GOP
subject: For Immediate Release: Election Security in Oregon at Risk Without SB 210
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Time-sensitive testimony deadline: April 2 at 1 PM.

| |
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/j8dkhEwzXAc9/a0ExT2cybkNkT1JBOGczZXQzQlR3cldzRjVXbEVxVkh6eDZLeVJSSy9zNDQvS0xXMEp2aHJQZUJQRXd1Ylo0T09GakFWV3pRRTlOVzBSd1FzTXhJTkM1cGxSbm9EUjFIQnBmWEEyUDVtWE09S0/)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
CONTACT:Oregon Republican PartyLaJuana Decker, Communications Chaircommunications.chair@oregon.gop

Release Date: April 1, 2025 **Oregon Election Security at Risk: Urgent Action Needed to Support SB 210** Oregon’s election security concerns affect all voters, regardless of party affiliation. Recent failures—such as the inadvertent registration of over 1,500 noncitizens in Oregon and the United States Postal Service failure to deliver ballots to 2% of registered voters in Coos County—are only two of many examples that underscore the urgent need for reform.[**_Oregon Senate Bill 210_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/exLpSgyrvjT4/a0ExT2cybkNkT1JBOGczZXQzQlR3cldzRjVXbEVxVkh6eDZLeVJSSy9zNDQvS0xXMEp2aHJQZUJQRXd1Ylo0T09GakFWV3pRRTlOVzBSd1FzTXhJTkM1cGxSbm9EUjFIQnBmWEEyUDVtWE09S0/) is a critical measure to restore confidence in Oregon’s elections by:
* **Making in-person voting standard,** with exceptions for military, overseas voters, and those unable to vote in person.
* **Requiring photo ID** for voting and ballot requests.
* **Ensuring all mail-in ballots are received by Election Day** \- a standard already enforced in most states.

Despite these common-sense reforms, most testimonies submitted at the bill’s March 31st hearing were in opposition. Oregonians who support election integrity still have time to make their voices heard—written testimony in support of SB 210 is due by Wednesday, April 2nd, at 1 PM. You can submit your testimony at****[**_https://bit.ly/SB210testimony_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/~ye9Q7aLR0cK/a0ExT2cybkNkT1JBOGczZXQzQlR3cldzRjVXbEVxVkh6eDZLeVJSSy9zNDQvS0xXMEp2aHJQZUJQRXd1Ylo0T09GakFWV3pRRTlOVzBSd1FzTXhJTkM1cGxSbm9EUjFIQnBmWEEyUDVtWE09S0/) Oregon’s lax election practices, including allowing voters to register without proof of U.S. citizenship (ORS 247.012) and counting ballots with missing or illegible postmarks (ORS 254.470), expose the state to unnecessary vulnerabilities. These policies could also put Oregon at risk of losing federal election funding under the latest Executive Order on election integrity.Adding to the concern, Oregon is currently facing multiple lawsuits for [**_failing to comply with the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA)_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/N76GBvwWbpCm/a0ExT2cybkNkT1JBOGczZXQzQlR3cldzRjVXbEVxVkh6eDZLeVJSSy9zNDQvS0xXMEp2aHJQZUJQRXd1Ylo0T09GakFWV3pRRTlOVzBSd1FzTXhJTkM1cGxSbm9EUjFIQnBmWEEyUDVtWE09S0/) , including allegations that the state refuses to provide access to voter registration maintenance records and has [**_failed to remove inactive voters_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/PWzmtEZXbzcz/a0ExT2cybkNkT1JBOGczZXQzQlR3cldzRjVXbEVxVkh6eDZLeVJSSy9zNDQvS0xXMEp2aHJQZUJQRXd1Ylo0T09GakFWV3pRRTlOVzBSd1FzTXhJTkM1cGxSbm9EUjFIQnBmWEEyUDVtWE09S0/) from its rolls. Meanwhile, the [**_Republican National Committee (RNC) has issued public records requests_******](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/-G3zFL6A~WC~/a0ExT2cybkNkT1JBOGczZXQzQlR3cldzRjVXbEVxVkh6eDZLeVJSSy9zNDQvS0xXMEp2aHJQZUJQRXd1Ylo0T09GakFWV3pRRTlOVzBSd1FzTXhJTkM1cGxSbm9EUjFIQnBmWEEyUDVtWE09S0/) in 48 states, including Oregon, demanding transparency on how states maintain voter rolls and remove ineligible voters. Oregonians deserve elections that are fair, accurate, and secure. The Oregon Republican Party stands firmly behind SB 210 and urges state leaders to align Oregon with national best practices to protect the integrity of every legal vote. **Take Action Now! Submit written testimony by Wednesday, April 2nd, before 1 PM at**[** _https://bit.ly/SB210testimony_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/AYV4J~wW7bQD/a0ExT2cybkNkT1JBOGczZXQzQlR3cldzRjVXbEVxVkh6eDZLeVJSSy9zNDQvS0xXMEp2aHJQZUJQRXd1Ylo0T09GakFWV3pRRTlOVzBSd1FzTXhJTkM1cGxSbm9EUjFIQnBmWEEyUDVtWE09S0/)**to support SB 210 and help safeguard Oregon’s elections.** ####

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e3a1790-7e19-4f23-8246-14b4bbd43e10/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc369d79b-e291-499d-b1ba-bec5b055162f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Peter, I have some huge news to share with you: I am running for Senate here in Kentucky to replace Mitch McConnell. In a moment, I’m going to tell you about my vision for this election — and I would love it if you took the time to read my full message. But if you’re short on time, will you chip in $10 to become one of my founding donors and help me become the next Democratic U.S. Senator? >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T429ce569-8965-45d3-92dc-321aa8965ea2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I was born and raised right here in Kentucky. I’ve spent my life in service to our communities, state, and country. I served as a JAG attorney in the U.S. Air Force for 27 years with the rank of Colonel. In the Air Force, I successfully negotiated several hostage crises and prosecuted violent criminals and child sex offenders. I’m a nonprofit founder for veterans in need, ordained minister, and the Floor Leader of the Kentucky House Democrats. I know firsthand the challenges Kentucky and our country are up against. [So now, after 27 years of serving our state and our country, I am running for Senate, but I can't start this fight alone. That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally: Will you chip in $10 in before midnight TONIGHT to help me kick off my campaign strong and show the world I have what it takes to win this race? >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb18e7edd-655c-4938-ac5b-5d95670d1d1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m ready to run for U.S. Senate to defend our freedoms and build an economy that works for everyone – no matter your background. Every American deserves access to food, clean water, healthcare, and shelter. But Mitch McConnell and the GOP do not see things the same way. During his 40 years in the US Senate, he’s put his personal quest for power and his special-interest allies ahead of our state, nation, and Constitution every time. I’m ready to turn the page. But I need you with me. [I promise you I will put everything I have into winning this race and being a voice for every single American. But I can’t do it alone — and I’ll need the help of grassroots supporters like you every step of the way. So I’m humbly asking: Will you pitch in $10 before midnight tonight and help me kick off my campaign with an unbeatable show of support? >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23e17d9b-9dc3-47cd-82e8-7008f364287f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6cea4f5-d6ba-4e8e-b7c2-3fc1cebb2a40/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

ELECTION DAY: TODAY 🕒 EMERGENCY SPECIAL ELECTION FUND: CRITICALLY LOW 🪫 We have two critical congressional special elections in Florida TODAY, and our special election funding is near EMPTY. We desperately need this funding to get out the vote in these key districts! Our state, our country, and President Trump are counting on us to get out the vote and ensure these two seats remain in Republican’s hands. The stakes couldn’t be higher, and losing these elections will have a ripple effect across the nation. Every dollar you contribute directly funds critical voter outreach, ensuring we have the resources necessary to mobilize voters today and protect our 2025 Republican majority. Thank you for your urgent support. - Florida GOP Team | About the Republican Party of Florida * The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability. We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America. Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. ## Join me April 9th at 8pm ET for a Zoom call...
**Im hosting a zoom call at 8pm ET on Wednesday April 9th and you are invited!**
In the past year I have made wellness a priority. I have also made it priority to support companies that aren't opposed to my values (like Walmart & Target). **There is an alternative to where you buy your personal care, household, cleaners, and all of your essentials.**
**I found a better way. An American manufacturer that 's been around for 39 years with conservative values that the MAHA movement can get behind.**
**The products are more natural, more effective and more affordable.**
**It supports American jobs and families with nontoxic products for every area of your home and life. Join me and over 2 million Americans and make a difference when you shop for things you 're going to shop for anyway.**
**Space is limited RSVP now by texting "RSVP" to (276) 500-1185 to claim your spot.**
## Restoring Trust in Our Elections: President Trump's Bold Action on Voter Integrity
President Trump has once again demonstrated his unwavering commitment to protecting the integrity of our elections.
With the signing of his executive order on voter ID and voter integrity, he is ensuring that every American vote is counted fairly and that the foundation of our democracy remains secure.
This isn't just about securing our elections--it's about restoring trust in our system and ensuring that every legal vote matters.
The reality is simple: in America, you need an ID for just about everything.
Want to cash a check? You need an ID.
Want to buy alcohol? You need an ID.
Want to get on a plane? You need an ID.
Even basic government services--such as signing up for Medicaid, food assistance, or public housing--require proof of identity.
And yet, when it comes to voting, Democrats suddenly claim that asking for an ID is an outrageous burden.
The hypocrisy is astounding.
Do you want to know why?...
