name: Tim Kaine
subject: Trump is posting about me on Truth Social…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Here’s what Trump just posted about me on Truth Social:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/i5s-InYsaUCgyJwZY6ZsVQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/i5s-InYsaUCgyJwZY6ZsVQ2]
Setting aside the fact that this post doesn’t actually make any sense — Donald, let’s talk about tariffs. We can start by calling them what they are: tax hikes.
Trump’s tariffs on Canadian imports are actually taxes on consumer goods — not “tariffs on deadly Fentanyl.” Groceries and food products. Building supplies. Fertilizers for our farmers. Goods critical to our national security industry like aluminum and steel.
Americans want prices to go down, not up! But these new taxes on imports could cost Virginians an extra $2 billion a year — that’s billion with a B.
That’s ridiculous, so I’m forcing a vote in the Senate to challenge Trump.
The fact of the matter is, slapping taxes on goods imported from Canada — one of our closest allies and biggest trading partners — isn’t going to accomplish anything other than squeezing Americans’ wallets even tighter.
If you agree that we’ve got to end this sham emergency and un-do Trump’s tax hikes, please add your name to my public petition today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/i5s-InYsaUCgyJwZY6ZsVQ2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/i5s-InYsaUCgyJwZY6ZsVQ2]
Before I sign off, let’s get one more thing straight: Trump’s ill-advised and unpopular taxes have nothing to do with the fentanyl crisis.
Fentanyl is a real emergency in this country, and one we’ve got to take seriously. (For example, it would have been helpful if Trump hadn’t torpedoed our bipartisan border deal that had funds in it to stem the flow of fentanyl.) But saying there’s an emergency at the Canadian border is just wrong — as Trump’s own Director of National Intelligence, Tulsi Gabbard, testified just last week, the fentanyl threat is coming from Mexico and China, not Canada .
So why invent this emergency? There’s one crystal clear reason: To get more revenue that will be used to give a tax cut to billionaires.
It’s not only that he’s hurting the economy — which would be bad enough — it’s that all of this is being done to fund tax breaks for billionaires off the backs of working Americans!
Join me in urging my Senate colleagues to reverse Trump’s ill-advised and wildly unpopular taxes on Canadian goods. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/i5s-InYsaUCgyJwZY6ZsVQ2]
Thanks for speaking out.
-Tim Kaine

We can start by calling them what they are: tax hikes. Trump’s tariffs on Canadian imports are actually taxes on consumer goods — not “tariffs on deadly Fentanyl.” Groceries and food products. Building supplies. Fertilizers for our farmers. Goods critical to our national security industry like aluminum and steel. Americans want prices to go down, not up! clean_body: What if I told you that President Trump could lose the House?| | | | | You probably thought the election ended on November 5th, but control of the House isn’t settled yet. The democrats could still win control... Here is where things stand: Republicans:217 Democrats: 215 Undecided: 3 If the Democrats win the three special elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21, the US House would FLIP to the control of Nancy Pelosi. My name is Jimmy Patronis, and I’m the Republican Nominee in the FL-01 race. I’m facing a well-funded liberal who has a real shot of beating me, and since this race isn’t getting any national attention, my campaign is seriously underfunded. This seat is anyone’s game, and if we want to keep our MAGA Majority in Congress, I need your financial support. ************************************************************ Thank you, Jimmy Patronis | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIMMY PATRONIS, INC. | |

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Union busting is wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
We need to stand up for labor rights. |
#
---
Peter, A few days ago, President Trump signed an executive order stripping collective bargaining rights from over a million federal civil servants. Who did he do this to? Nurses and social workers caring for veterans, public health workers fighting diseases, people who steward our natural lands, and professionals who keep our communities safe. Everyone loses when civil servants don’t have fair wages and safe working conditions. **This is union busting. And it’s wrong.** Here in Oregon, we know how unions can lift up people and communities. I’ve always stood with unions because when workers can negotiate fair pay, good benefits, and safe working conditions, _our state grows stronger._ That’s one reason I took executive action to ensure Oregon’s largest construction projects prioritize stability, good wages, and fair treatment. And it’s why I continue to support the right to organize a union for workers in both the public sector and the private sector. Trump is once again showing us exactly whose side he’s on — and it’s __not__ the side of working families. **[Will you pitch in $5 or more to help us stand up for workers and collective bargaining? Every dollar will help us push back against Trump’s attacks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104972136/537001543/299577830?amount=5&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250401_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWYzNDY3MS0yOTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h3Mt-Lw8i9xIMZtblAHF1Nm5pDlZy1-ZoBnr_kOwZbU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104972137/537001544/-1270421739?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250401_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWYzNDY3MS0yOTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h3Mt-Lw8i9xIMZtblAHF1Nm5pDlZy1-ZoBnr_kOwZbU=)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
No billionaire can match the power of this movement.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104972449/537002389/1328794144?refcode=ea.3849f0b9-290f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.3849f0b9-290f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4NDlmMGI5LTI5MGYtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GvisLLZMx0DWK7sNVS90A07e0mteMsLSQVqMd4Vc-6o=&emci=3049f0b9-290f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3849f0b9-290f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)
---
Thank you, thank you, thank you. **On behalf of everyone here at JanePAC, I just wanted to thank you for your support last quarter and for being one of the most engaged members of this grassroots team.** Whether you’ve opened one of these emails, signed up for a volunteering shift, or even chipped in your hard-earned dollars, your support proves that regular people — not unelected billionaires — are powering this work. I’m really proud of that. In just the past few months, we’ve helped elect climate champions in Virginia and Minnesota who are holding the line against Trump’s extreme agenda. And in Portland, our endorsed leaders on the city council are leading the charge against Big Oil with an investigation into Zenith Energy’s dangerous fossil fuel operations. Tonight, when votes are counted in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race, we’ll see yet again why this work matters. **Our JanePAC-endorsed candidate, Judge Susan Crawford, is up against an opponent backed by Elon Musk and the GOP money machine.** They’ve dumped millions into this race to buy this seat and shamelessly drown out the voices of Wisconsin voters. But no amount of money can match the strength of people like you stepping up, over and over, to fight for our democracy. So I just want to say thank you. For your support and your belief in this work. We’re building something unstoppable, and I’m so grateful to have you in this fight with me. Let’s keep going. — Jane [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104972450/537002390/2105508926?refcode=ea.3849f0b9-290f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.3849f0b9-290f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4NDlmMGI5LTI5MGYtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GvisLLZMx0DWK7sNVS90A07e0mteMsLSQVqMd4Vc-6o=) | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104972451/537002391/2105508926?refcode=ea.3849f0b9-290f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.3849f0b9-290f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4NDlmMGI5LTI5MGYtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GvisLLZMx0DWK7sNVS90A07e0mteMsLSQVqMd4Vc-6o=)

clean_body: No billionaire can match the power of this movement. | Thank you, thank you, thank you. On behalf of everyone here at JanePAC, I just wanted to thank you for your support last quarter and for being one of the most engaged members of this grassroots team. Whether you’ve opened one of these emails, signed up for a volunteering shift, or even chipped in your hard-earned dollars, your support proves that regular people — not unelected billionaires — are powering this work. I’m really proud of that. In just the past few months, we’ve helped elect climate champions in Virginia and Minnesota who are holding the line against Trump’s extreme agenda. And in Portland, our endorsed leaders on the city council are leading the charge against Big Oil with an investigation into Zenith Energy’s dangerous fossil fuel operations. Tonight, when votes are counted in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race, we’ll see yet again why this work matters. Our JanePAC-endorsed candidate, Judge Susan Crawford, is up against an opponent backed by Elon Musk and the GOP money machine. They’ve dumped millions into this race to buy this seat and shamelessly drown out the voices of Wisconsin voters. But no amount of money can match the strength of people like you stepping up, over and over, to fight for our democracy. So I just want to say thank you. For your support and your belief in this work. We’re building something unstoppable, and I’m so grateful to have you in this fight with me. Let’s keep going. — Jane = | = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

| |

Your support and the work we have done since last November has made this incredible momentum possible in the first place. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUwNTA2MDYwMjEzMzg4NTcyLFwiclwiOjE1MDUwNjEwNjU3NzIyNDg5OX0iLCJzIjoiMGJjOTQzM2FlYzg0N2NmMyJ9)

| Team,

Today is Election Day in Florida and Wisconsin.

Come what may, today we should all be extremely proud of the work we have done to rally despondent Democrats and patriotic Americans against MAGA at a dark time for our country and our democracy.

National Ground Game has been at the forefront of raising awareness and mobilizing folks to take action and make an impact. Since Vice President Harris’ crushing loss in November 2024, too many Democrats have been wallowing: lost in the wilderness, navel-gazing and adrift, looking hopelessly to the heavens for guidance.

We were divided, disorganized, and numb—and all the while, **MAGA was sharpening their knives and looking to take full advantage of a scattered and dispirited opposition.**

But then _people like you stepped up to help_.

When everyone told us that things were hopeless, the odds were stacked against us, that we were better off holding our fire for later more “winnable” fights, **we came together and rallied thousands of good people to the cause** and to the belief that we could rattle the GOP at a time when Trump had every single Republican in his pocket.

While our work has been instrumental in getting to this point, it is far from over. Today, we have _a lot_ of GOTV work left to do in Florida and in Wisconsin. **_We can’t get complacent now—and we need your help to make sure we finish strong, Friend._**

---
|
---
**[Will you rush a last-minute donation of $5, $25, or more today before polls close at 7 PM Eastern? There are votes left to win, and we need your support to make sure we do everything we can right up to the last minute to keep MAGA on their heels:](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUwNTA2MDYwMjI0OTIyOTEwLFwiclwiOjE1MDUwNjEwNjU3NzIyNDg5OX0iLCJzIjoiYzY4NWUzNDA2MjY1YTZkNyJ9)**

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Should illegal immigrants vote?
body:
Radical leftists deliberately created a crisis at our southern border.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/-pajXBr6MnL64rxlx_6S55zRRo9sEITSh2igAp8tfu6npA1bahJBw0nC7kaeQe5aensMsBVlG6VvvzRWNMHrbNDzgKma3AuJiBNMZQmxiYRk_cXqagftKTk8K53GdGMQyKGz59e6-AXBp-frKHanrIK_Ae19dWFwEEU6qW8FjtXkU-rkp9aHlAAZ/eApnYE_0FccInflGG9d7P594f4IE8WGJ/7)_

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/mfphXSmNP-wS4UUn9eZOifMJ7QUeCMmONu7INpWH6xB7a_laG_QkzM5BtyA-3eg7jJXXJuw_jz9jXDRPEmc9qBONYVr6tbqY8eza3bQnbb3JBJnzBwr8wfDYKZPAFwxf-4yp_e9e9L2kzX0s3-mbOkuUDV75RMp8pL7hvV840p01likeUu1pX2hb6RqAgpr9fZTuCDZuQ_rNXrLLTa4lK34PGZOWMOO0oH_6kRfr0R1mHAz17uj1TLWajD-jjwjHlCahrRhzLKeNorbyh_dpQ014PTsrndj2IoiOw0FaNpAedCLcyUUBlNvfVL7Yp6MLJq_iUPgaZDuBorNYt_MrsOoAOj56CPPtphcCswTI7WjqgDthhNopuOdMIzp-hzRnBCmuHInoEQJSJu1T9nVYbDX_9JqS7sQefolYaozLp-oKfkyUaMt49x03AClq/lCMSC0Uu6inelMKFBgdLKVwodg09B-iX/7)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

Radical leftists deliberately created a crisis at our southern border. They want people to come into our country illegally. _In fact, they encourage it._

Having millions of illegal immigrants in our country radically increases the potential for voter fraud and undermines the integrity of our elections.

Patriotic Americans need to make their voices heard about this crucial issue.

**🚨 _MISSION CRITICAL UPDATE_ 🚨**

Peter,
In the lead-up to the 2024 election, Elon Musk basically lived in Pennsylvania.

name: DNC HQ
subject: Thank you.
body:
---
We'll keep this short, Derek: **Supporters like you helped us reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goal last night, and we’re incredibly grateful.** That’s money that we’ll be able to put to work by investing in our state parties, organizing and mobilizing people across the country, and winning upcoming special elections. Several of those special elections are happening _today._ Thanks to your support, we’ve been able to invest in states like Wisconsin and Florida, where voters are heading to the polls right now. But to win these races, it’s going to take all hands on deck until the very last minute. [So we’re asking: If you have a few minutes, can you make calls to voters in states like Wisconsin and Florida and make sure they’ve got a plan to cast their ballots? You can follow this link for more information.](https://democrats.org/take-action?refcode=em_20250401_3101_fr&akid=3101%2E22930333%2Eu5JPmG) Thank you again for your support, and for everything you’re doing to help elect Democrats. The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: Celebrating Autism Awareness Month!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Give Hope, Create Change**
---
|
---
| April is **Autism Awareness Month! **A time to honor the strength, resilience, and uniqueness of individuals on the autism spectrum disorder and to recognize the families, caregivers, and professionals who support them every day. At **Autism Health Inc.** , we are committed to turning awareness into **action** by providing vital resources, education, and support to families across the country. One of the most impactful ways to support this mission is through **donations**. For just the price of a cup of coffee each month, you can help change a life. Your **recurring donation** helps fund scholarships for families in need, brings in world-renowned speakers, and ensures access to cutting-edge health solutions.
---
| [DONATE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=67fc0f2ac8&e=3a42edfdc4 "DONATE")
---
|
---
| **Join Us for the Autism Health Summit in San Diego!**
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=e8abfc75a3&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| In celebration of Autism Awareness Month, we also invite you to join us at the **Autism Health Summit** , happening **April 11-13, 2025** , at the **Town & Country Resort in San Diego, CA**. This transformative event brings together world-renowned experts, healthcare professionals, and families for a weekend of connection, learning, and empowerment.
### **Featured Speakers Include:**
* **Del Bigtree** – Emmy Award-winning journalist and medical freedom advocate
* **Dr. Peter McCullough** – Renowned Cardiologist and researcher
* **Dr. Sabine Hazan** – Microbiome researcher and gastroenterologist
* **Dr. Brian Hooker** – Scientist and Chief Scientific Officer of CHD
* **Dr. Dayan Goodenowe** – Neuroscientist and expert in plasmalogen research

### **Special Highlights:**
* **Mesenchymal Stem Cell Therapy Clinic** available on-site
* **CME credits** for healthcare professionals
* Sponsor exhibits, networking, and family-focused resources

### **Register Today & Save $50**
Use promo code **AHS50** for **$50 off** your in-person ticket.
---
| [REGISTER NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=64b92f2180&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER NOW")
---
| Together, we can create real change for individuals and families living with autism. Whether you join us in person or support from afar, thank you for being a part of this important movement.
---
| **Autism Health Inc.**
**501(c)(3) Nonprofit Organization
San Diego, CA**
**[www.AutismHealth.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=25844224e4&e=3a42edfdc4)**

name: Letitia James
subject: Every new victory is because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104975452/537010711/-1997846894?refcode=jtk1865-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmZiNjMwNy0yZjBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L80tT1F0b37yGEXxvOyiYCElSToAgRbDhs2j1t0oGNQ=)
---
Peter, I'm sure you've seen my name in the headlines – and that won't be changing anytime soon.

Our fight for our government, our economy, and our very democracy is only just beginning, and, with fearless fighters like you behind me, **I know I won't have to face it alone.**
Whether it's holding the dark forces that rule this nation accountable or defending to uphold the Constitution and the rule of law, the work we're doing has truly never been more important to the fate of this nation.
Every legal victory, every battle to safeguard the most vulnerable among us and keep our democracy alive is powered by your unwavering belief in the pursuit of justice for _all_ Americans.
With more eyes on our fight than ever, your support gives me the strength to keep going, no matter how tough the road ahead may be.
**So as we prepare to take on more obstacles in the weeks, months, and years ahead, I want to say** _**thank you:

Thank you** _for helping me stand strong against this administration's targeted attacks.

_**Thank you**_ for ensuring New York remains a safe haven for progress in the face of extremism.

And _**thank you** _for playing such a crucial role in defending our democracy.
**Truly, I wouldn't have the platform I do without this grassroots team. Together, we're sending a powerful message to bad actors everywhere: We will not bend, we will not break, and we will not be bullied.

_[And as I continue this fight for our Constitution and our nation, I hope you'll be by my side with your $5 donation here and your $25 donation there. I truly would not be able to succeed in these critical battles without fearless fighters like you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104975453/537010712/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1865-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmZiNjMwNy0yZjBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L80tT1F0b37yGEXxvOyiYCElSToAgRbDhs2j1t0oGNQ=)_**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104975454/537010713/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1865-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmZiNjMwNy0yZjBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L80tT1F0b37yGEXxvOyiYCElSToAgRbDhs2j1t0oGNQ=)
---
Thank you for all that you do, Peter.
– Letitia James
| With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families?

body:
Our House majority is on the line in Florida.
| Friend,
---
Today is our most important test of the entire year.

**In Florida, voters are going to the polls in two critical special elections that will decide the future of our House GOP majority!**
---
The radical Democrats know they don’t stand a chance in a free and fair election that’s decided on the issues, so they’re drastically _OUTSPENDING_ Republicans – _by more than 10:1 in one of these races_ – to flood the airwaves with their lying attacks right as voters head to the polls.

I know we just closed the books on the first quarter at last night’s FEC-mandated deadline...

**_But deadline be damned, we have no choice right now but to continue our grassroots surge so we can rush emergency resources to Florida all the way up until polls close._**

That is why I made another round of calls amongst our Party’s biggest supporters and secured your **500% MATCH** for **__one_ _more_ _day__**.

clean_body: Our House majority is on the line in Florida. | Friend, Today is our most important test of the entire year. In Florida, voters are going to the polls in two critical special elections that will decide the future of our House GOP majority! The radical Democrats know they don’t stand a chance in a free and fair election that’s decided on the issues, so they’re drastically OUTSPENDING Republicans – by more than 10:1 in one of these races – to flood the airwaves with their lying attacks right as voters head to the polls. I know we just closed the books on the first quarter at last night’s FEC-mandated deadline... But deadline be damned, we have no choice right now but to continue our grassroots surge so we can rush emergency resources to Florida all the way up until polls close. That is why I made another round of calls amongst our Party’s biggest supporters and secured your 500% MATCH for one more day. This is our opportunity to EXPAND the President’s House majority – don’t let it go to waste! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: I'm not giving up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Last week, the Administration withdrew Elise Stefanik’s nomination to be the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87485?refcode=em20250401-8862&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8862%2E614464%2E9t67ri)
Peter, it’s Democrat Blake Gendebien. Heartland Patriots said I could reach out with an update on our race in NY-21.
Last week, the Administration withdrew Elise Stefanik’s nomination to be the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations.
**It’s clear: they are scared.**
They’ve seen what we’ve been able to accomplish in just a few months. Thousands of grassroots donors have stepped up to help send a dairy farmer to Congress, and voters across the North Country are ready to elect a leader who will actually fight for them.
Our opponents know we had a real shot at winning this race, so they’re keeping Elise Stefanik in Congress to help them cut Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare and give more tax cuts to billionaires.
**But, Peter, I’m not giving up. It doesn’t matter who I’m running against or when the election might be – I’m still committed to representing the community that raised me.**
**[As we get ready for next November, I need your support to continue moving forward. Will you split a donation between me and Heartland Patriots today to help us prepare for what’s ahead?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87485?refcode=em20250401-8862&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8862%2E614464%2E9t67ri)**

name: Election Day Alert via Our Revolution
subject: UPDATE: Mobilizing against Musk in Wisconsin and across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1022&refcode=email-20250401_v&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Our Revolution logo

Today is Election Day — and control of Wisconsin’s State Supreme Court is
a coin-toss with voting rights and abortion rights hanging in the balance.
Elon Musk is doing everything to try to buy this seat, which makes
Wisconsin ground zero for our fight against Trump and the Oligarchs’ far
right agenda.

Right now, Our Revolution volunteers are on the phones, making sure every
progressive voter gets to the polls in Wisconsin for the crucial State
Supreme Court race with national implications.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23274?source=email-20250401&t=1029&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Our Revolution Volunteers

As of last night, Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team had sent over
180,000 texts and countless phone calls to turn out critical voters who
could make the difference. And we’re not resting until the last polling
place closes tonight.

For weeks we have been channeling the incredible boost of energy Bernie
Sanders brought in Wisconsin when he swept through the state, packing
stadiums to capacity, to drive voter turnout in communities from Milwaukee
to Eau Claire.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23274?source=email-20250401&t=1030&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Kenosha Rally Photo

But we’re not just fighting Musk and the oligarchy in Wisconsin. This past
weekend, Our Revolution was at the forefront of powerful "Tesla Takedown"
rallies nationwide, directly confronting Elon Musk’s exploitation of
workers and his attempts to silence unions.

From DC to Chicago to LA, hundreds of Our Revolution members stood
shoulder-to-shoulder, chanting: "Hey Elon, you can't hide—we can see your
greedy side!" By taking to the streets and taking a stand to hit Musk
where it hurts — his money — we’re expanding our fight against the
Oligarchy and showing we refuse to let them run roughshod over democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23274?source=email-20250401&t=1031&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Stop Musk Save Democracy graphic

All across the country we’re building a grassroots movement powerful
enough to challenge and dismantle oligarchy. Every phone call, text, and
rally adds up to real, lasting change — and we want you to be part of it.

We’re organizing events, groups, voter outreach, rallies, and more
nationwide to rise to this perilous moment in our country’s history. Will
you be part of this historic movement and join the Citizen Action Team
today?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23274?source=email-20250401&t=1032&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Yes, I’d like to join the Our Revolution Citizen Action Team.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1028&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250401nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]No, I’m sorry. But I can make a donation.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22227?t=1007&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22227?t=1008&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2025 Movement Builder
with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22228?t=1009&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22266?t=1010&akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=8001%2E5885482%2E0usUsj

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

body:

Friend, please allow me to introduce myself.

My name is Mary, and I'm team Trump's member services coordinator.

I just stepped out of a meeting with the President, and I wanted to share a few notes we had about your supporter profile.

_**I don 't want to take up too much of your time, so I'll just give you the key takeaways:**_
**FINAL NOTICE: **Your 2025 Sustaining Membership offer is set to expire 24 hours from now.
**YOU WERE REQUESTED BY TRUMP: **Everyone agrees, there is no MAGA MOVEMENT without you!

**SPECIAL OFFER: **Signing up TODAY will get you entered to win a FREE dinner at Mar-a-Lago.
**[JOIN TEAM TRUMP](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/s/c/m4exznZdWdQkgdQTP1Za93vGqYDQNrcDe6kkKpSrBpyknGGzStdHKEiuwYhP5fYxKgM57taxFDYWQ2-XX1jPaCXbLGTG6fgGjWMsHWjmoEtW_At_qud2-fySSTTSRtsZZter0mbmW-6GbZZA_28Fz0qA291-C-Isc90jGRB85InIcTFfO1tPV2wSQ6bB9hK2cLjb4SsKljhID-UAb2CnVq-pho2WjDG5Q0DGpRRUWSnlKT16mIts8MBpFyRpBQNa4G7H5vbremMft3tga1sxQa54X_yhxZMoboUDQwXWApbvT0M_1wNXMhUkz_GiduEucRCflqDl4g9fr5w7RTk40tcqsISkHWNZnPnMoV_An-66gp47Js43t5sVs5k2DYswfe2mv3gi52VTCibSB_2dKzHt41jYgfr23Yr3EFYy-8jNhPE7Msw_XKEyTe1JdEcIzw3SSHaJ1MNkjurte8jpGtDOVFERT-4up1W1HV1vDDzDjKmGxDjMpJGVWjVltnW0xvJelEsCrlK2t9SRgeKbVuo-WVzMAq6JZ-CrYM7uhftXCYC4imjD2o7IWZrGqmYfdW7jBXKX2qpFjlU/hVAJlOUgzW5_dIkl7TtkXaXhggMGNwiw/7)**

name: Heidi Campbell
subject: Not an April Fool’s
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
https://voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://voteheidicampbell.com/]
Dear Neighbors,
I wish that this was an April Fool’s joke, but it’s not. Undocumented children. Trans women. Pristine wetlands. These are the ‘problems’ facing Tennesseans, according to the controlling party. But you and I know better. Here’s an update on some of the most harmful bills I’m fighting this beautiful spring in Nashville.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81515/images/TrashHC.jpg]
[Proud to support Mayor O’Connell’s “Don’t Be Trashley” anti-littering campaign]
Environmental Degradation ( SB0670) [https://wapp.capitol.tn.gov/apps/BillInfo/Default.aspx?BillNumber=SB0670] and ( SB0664 [https://wapp.capitol.tn.gov/apps/BillInfo/Default.aspx?BillNumber=SB0664] )
We live in a beautiful state, and our natural environment is integral to keeping our communities heathy and safe. That’s why Tennessee law requires the Department of Environment and Conservation to issue permits for projects that impact wetlands, which play an important role in preventing flash floods, keeping our water safe and clean, and providing much needed water for our farmlands and our families in times of drought.
But SB0664 and SB0670 will deregulate ~90% of our wetlands and open them up for development. This legislation is being run for the financial interests of the house sponsor who is a developer. Last week, Senator Charlane Oliver and I voted no , but the Republicans sent it to the House for committee consideration today- on April Fools’ Day. This is no joke! This will likely be going to the floor in the Senate and the House- please reach out to our state reps and senators to ask them to oppose this dangerous legislation. If you want to get involved Harpeth Conservancy [https://harpethconservancy.org/] and Sierra Club [https://www.sierraclub.org/tennessee/middle-tennessee] are working hard to kill these bills.
Bullying Trans People
Why does the Tennessee legislature spend so much time on such a very small part of our population? Why do they make up scary hypotheticals about what a trans woman might do in the bathroom? Why do Republicans invade personal issues like gender at all? Because it keeps their base energized.
My colleagues have sent [https://www.wbir.com/article/news/local/anti-transgender-bathroom-bill-in-tennessee-is-headed-to-the-governors-desk/51-8954d81a-cdc6-49a1-8878-2772a387dee4] [https://www.newschannel5.com/news/a-2025-bathroom-bill-that-impacts-summer-camps-and-boarding-schools-passes-both-tenn-chambers] [https://www.wbir.com/article/news/local/anti-transgender-bathroom-bill-in-tennessee-is-headed-to-the-governors-desk/51-8954d81a-cdc6-49a1-8878-2772a387dee4] [https://www.newschannel5.com/news/a-2025-bathroom-bill-that-impacts-summer-camps-and-boarding-schools-passes-both-tenn-chambers] two [https://www.wbir.com/article/news/local/anti-transgender-bathroom-bill-in-tennessee-is-headed-to-the-governors-desk/51-8954d81a-cdc6-49a1-8878-2772a387dee4] more [https://www.newschannel5.com/news/a-2025-bathroom-bill-that-impacts-summer-camps-and-boarding-schools-passes-both-tenn-chambers] [https://www.newschannel5.com/news/a-2025-bathroom-bill-that-impacts-summer-camps-and-boarding-schools-passes-both-tenn-chambers] [https://www.newschannel5.com/news/a-2025-bathroom-bill-that-impacts-summer-camps-and-boarding-schools-passes-both-tenn-chambers] anti-trans bills to Gov. Lee. These bills will deny education institutions the freedom to honor their students’ right to use the bathroom that matches their gender.
We’ve lost the fight on these nonsensical bills, but let’s celebrate a better future by taking action in our communities. Consider volunteering at the Moosic City Dairy Dash [https://moosiccitydairydash.raceroster.com/] to support the YWCA, Tennessee’s largest provider of domestic violence services. Let’s join them! Sign up to race or volunteer today.
Undermining our Freedom
The controlling party wants to increase the amount of time that Tennesseans—guilty or not—spend in jail. And their proposal to revoke the right to bail for broad swaths of defendants is sailing through the Assembly. The constitutional amendment would apply to anyone that local authorities consider to have committed, for example, terrorism. The potential for abuse of this law [https://nashvillebanner.com/2025/03/18/tennessee-constitutional-amendment-bail/] should alarm all of us. The Senate has officially passed the resolution, and if the House does the same then we will see it on our 2026 ballots.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81515/images/AftynHC.jpg]
Okay, so maybe we can’t stop these bills because we don’t have enough votes. But we can make it harder. We can make our voice heard, and we can do it together. And MAINLY, we can get the word out about what is going on to the (majority) people in Tennessee who have no idea that our rights are under threat.
I recently joined in the Standup for Science rally [https://substack.com/inbox/post/159058863?publication_id=3838376&post_id=159058863&isFreemail=false&r=kg0ef&triedRedirect=true] to fight the alarming defunding of our world-class research institutions and the spread of anti-science misinformation.
I’m hearing from a lot of people who want to get engaged. Our town hall in Bellevue this past weekend was packed with people who are fed up and ready to stand up .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81515/images/groupHC.jpg]
Join me at an upcoming town hall! Our next one is April 19 at Stratford from 10-12 with Rep. Behn. People will need to bring documents to verify their identity [https://www.tn.gov/safety/driver-services/real-id.html] to complete the Real ID paperwork.
I hope to see you there! But regardless, I’d love to hear from you. You can reach me directly at 615.438.6338 or just stop by my office and say hello.
Oh, and every time you can- VOTE!
Heidi
You can reach the campaign at:
info@voteheidicampbell.com [info@voteheidicampbell.com]
629-279-1026
https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn [https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn] https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN [https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN] https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/ [https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/] https://voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://voteheidicampbell.com/] https://www.tiktok.com/senatorheidicampbell [https://www.tiktok.com/senatorheidicampbell]
Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer.
Campbell for State Senate
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

clean_body: That's why I'm asking you to donate to my campaign to become the next governor of New Mexico. | = $15, Peter. That's what I'm asking you to split between my campaign and EMILYs List today. Why? Because I'm facing the first public fundraising deadline of my race for governor of New Mexico on April 7. $15 will help us reach our ambitious $150,000 goal. $15 will help us send a fierce message to the MAGA forces trying to flip control of our state government that momentum is on our side. $15 will help us show we're a real movement ready to win and bring change to New Mexico. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you so much for your support, Deb = = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. subject: Tell Congress: Don’t let MAGA disrupt our Social Security payments!

body:
| | | **** **To the**** _billionaire_****bullies, empathy is a weakness.

**[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxnpZMcWBUA3N9QI8ocnbnA3ciL-LrW2DTu5OZZWtOCb_8XMnaw8LlGyh8IdROSBGLuCuXEuHQwWfCUl_-a_nu5B4L2_iF_CDiJJ1tJmWgszkKwRqyXnHuD6ceDaB42fBrhcgaGGrlDn6OMC4TKBiAeA3PBnZBR0XRLAa0WlfGwnRpsa6MTWLP9BUi0N-ZNLJ25uVwgAqLsajSokBc6biwG1dO_SFJv4uL6RSTCQS_tnOlhstnRjPJSbRnCvmCswbNyij3Ijq3Mb6hENa4rpe8mBwz4uua_UJev4E-2_TjKo98kM-D6pQUDcdHnH9oV3vEI58f28Rfu6lDOgsDQX5Pl7lKfWzEWP7t4dAJ16jYGvA0kCeWyJJd3TFCRP2PQb8PyacTEEZzAlugYeyztLZe8z58bfJBh1XaAac2vzxZkFA-UZGakLVk-2CALRZuO5WRJWFY-Vdl77qALk3eSn9XfTkVF5XcxDV0W4AnKEbVlE3SiXkH2327_U-Wf-V7LGqEFXG6M0ezU1erX51Kbasv2A/4fa/fclortarS3ejlcWa-aguHQ/h0/h001.6bLdUx2eT18n1ISrHd_Xtzkw0RKa88YnwOZEeMuKaug) ****
[**Out of touch MAGA billionaires are coming for Social Security! Sign on to DEMAND that Congress prevent any disturbance to our payments.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxnpZMcWBUA3N9QI8ocnbnA3ciL-LrW2DTu5OZZWtOCb_8XMnaw8LlGyh8IdROSBGLuCuXEuHQwWfCUl_-a_nu5B4L2_iF_CDiJJ1tJmWgszkKwRqyXnHuD6ceDaB42fBrhcgaGGrlDn6OMC4TKBiAeA3PBnZBR0XRLAa0WlfGwnRpsa6MTWLP9BUi0N-ZNLJ25uVwgAqLsajSokBc6biwG1dO_SFJv4uL6RSTCQS_tnOlhstnRjPJSbRnCvmCswbNci89lw2prkURM3O8guXPp6mDHg0jHXnqiTY_qayE2vlC18tHqOUfBHpTAv2jLevNjRkIUv49-Z6zde8E1x0gCjMr0pNSbO3vm_FCykrrK1HmDDLuxrDfW8a2zAJodJRBZF8-ejTKqiD-3mzQj3MeRGzlfo29nZPqxfw-XdKFO-gEDoo_aJ0WtZtAu3nvjM46v3pqyXSFaujP4G97YUMDGIYCgoUSP7Gx0BrBV4xKh1N9Gp5AoQMpKvgGcRm-dZHQXKrt9BjMKMreNP90ffmF1Q/4fa/fclortarS3ejlcWa-aguHQ/h1/h001.S4eXurkNVfRz-DygvMWrup4KKUZ6XVawxXjJCYOCQ-Q)****
* * *
**_Billionaire_** Dark MAGA co-president Elon Musk's claims that Social Security is riddled with fraud and operates like a Ponzi scheme are not only false but also deeply damaging. Worse yet, Trump’s Commerce Secretary, another **_billionaire_** Howard Lutnick, suggested that his mother-in-law wouldn’t complain if she missed a Social Security payment...** __**_but “fraudsters” would._ Maybe the family members of **_billionaires_** won’t complain (or even notice) if they missed a Social Security payment, but millions of people with disabilities and seniors struggling to survive sure would! **We cannot stand idly by while sociopathic individuals in our government spread dangerous lies that could lead to a disruption in our life-saving benefits!** _Able Dems is working to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will protect critical benefits that we rely on to survive!_ **[Join Able Dems in taking a stand for our most vulnerable citizens—those who depend on Social Security for their very survival. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | I know I emailed you a lot this past week about our end-of-quarter FEC deadline. We set a goal to raise $30,000 before our numbers went public and show all of the MAGA Republicans with their eyes set on NM-02 that Team Vasquez is stronger than ever. I’m proud to share that last night, we exceeded that goal! I am beyond proud to have a grassroots movement full of people willing to stand up and fight hard for their community — especially in times like these. This team is constantly raising the bar. Because of you, we’ve kept NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms for the first time in four decades, and we’re crushing our fundraising goals. But the MAGA agenda isn’t something that can be defeated in one day. We must keep fighting every day to flip the House blue and issue a critical check on Donald Trump’s power in 2026. = | | = Gracias, Gabe Vasquez | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag Queens on Blue’s Clues? It’s Time to Fight Back
body:
Turn America back to Godly values | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=75d638cc09584e819eab39d1f2ceab3e&_e=6OYilvPqWAEHGN5p-w0dTzjaGqjBXeNa6opH63YlFAPlR8odDfERibf1MWe8IlrY4Px2m2hy2ey3PGJS3WVeAhPn9GP6YAj91w9FJXIyJ94BVji5Cs84tPJ8CkUO6c0b6jg8cYpBdbmFnxWYDjAAF6AWgMY-U9msRda5nYC3XmsVWqN4PS3_citmeaxwBwEdFzEBvZkFG4uUJnhSdAhX-UMKjmm98Qd-bB9pNzxkW4Ia4Cgen_uFwNx3kwNlOwURP_AAN1NcDKFWLu-MQyWMQaukzFK_lNC7nLUHC5rozAAyzErAxiYiQaW_hVvmlVjN7rb50S6qOeftfE9bUOlIhIii6MuyigHcT1Wxq3KBIQuE1ix7juQjcYtVbIWPvWQ4IbwK4kwN0FXXb_gZAiBdJg%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=75d638cc09584e819eab39d1f2ceab3e&_e=6OYilvPqWAEHGN5p-w0dTzjaGqjBXeNa6opH63YlFAPlR8odDfERibf1MWe8IlrY4Px2m2hy2ey3PGJS3WVeAhPn9GP6YAj91w9FJXIyJ94BVji5Cs84tPJ8CkUO6c0b6jg8cYpBdbmFnxWYDjAAF6AWgMY-U9msRda5nYC3XmsVWqN4PS3_citmeaxwBwEdFzEBvZkFG4uUJnhSdAhX-UMKjmm98Qd-bB9pNzxkW4Ia4Cgen_uFwNx3kwNlOwURuacMEULXQFoBBTmc1dTcfSpqUQSwTqOEmGOk0Xt_hQTg9gdoQE1NfSKV02NFKyFj0IAsA4e3IogA6y033MDnG70Xju0d4aqZvGlApXQq_OMmP7ZxSH4nezctQqnsi6tF_bbUsCoDf0sj9Fmxi58gIA%3D%3D)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=75d638cc09584e819eab39d1f2ceab3e&_e=6OYilvPqWAEHGN5p-w0dTzjaGqjBXeNa6opH63YlFAPlR8odDfERibf1MWe8IlrY4Px2m2hy2ey3PGJS3WVeAhPn9GP6YAj91w9FJXIyJ94BVji5Cs84tPJ8CkUO6c0b6jg8cYpBdbmFnxWYDjAAF6AWgMY-U9msRda5nYC3XmsVWqN4PS3_citmeaxwBwEdFzEBvZkFG4uUJnhSdAhX-UMKjmm98Qd-bB9pNzxkW4Ia4Cgen_uFwNx3kwNlOwURFC9m519W2KVsjQcY53_PFcRQKQOtr8duz1HEyVWbYelAz8a5NCsXk7VXBD5AA9aAIWomiyNSWTV8cdLdr1SnopXGRr2AyV_GJpWz83OW1dLpK1eVSmlfE9f-D1l8xGLbtOkFYSHCR1PXAC7dMpt4_g%3D%3D) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=75d638cc09584e819eab39d1f2ceab3e&_e=6OYilvPqWAEHGN5p-w0dTzjaGqjBXeNa6opH63YlFAPlR8odDfERibf1MWe8IlrY4Px2m2hy2ey3PGJS3WVeAhPn9GP6YAj91w9FJXIyJ94BVji5Cs84tPJ8CkUO6c0b6jg8cYpBdbmFnxWYDjAAF6AWgMY-U9msRda5nYC3XmsVWqN4PS3_citmeaxwBwEdFzEBvZkFG4uUJnhSdAhX-UMKjmm98Qd-bB9pNzxkW4Ia4Cgen_uFwNx3kwNlOwURLtEC3NjMUjx3dW7yPf9Ii8hlejfY78QkRq9vy3WnHEEMtpmwyoxtQbySIsf0kyq_mU66HLugsnq0PgzeHkzRUUCuvtzCvKcAh-Vj-wcXbItnyL5DyzzO270vdNNN1pCR1iqHVBkgkXqdDTFWEO4Isw%3D%3D)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=75d638cc09584e819eab39d1f2ceab3e&_e=6OYilvPqWAEHGN5p-w0dTzjaGqjBXeNa6opH63YlFAPlR8odDfERibf1MWe8IlrY4Px2m2hy2ey3PGJS3WVeAhPn9GP6YAj91w9FJXIyJ94BVji5Cs84tPJ8CkUO6c0b6jg8cYpBdbmFnxWYDjAAF6AWgMY-U9msRda5nYC3XmsVWqN4PS3_citmeaxwBwEdFzEBvZkFG4uUJnhSdAhX-UMKjmm98Qd-bB9pNzxkW4Ia4Cgen_uFwNx3kwNlOwURfk3-M-BV_Eb1bFNpWLib_AFLXOsBL8yyZLqyPwmXOLkMSSWfuX204L02ElxIrrVtLQhoSG_uabgxMmir4YT39qqXANW_G_K8qQWOnogvhjfragRkoslkSkKIwMQrVNTpOAbuwtzQUdjeF3GSENR1lg%3D%3D)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.

Sincerely,

clean_body: Turn America back to Godly values | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. name: Marty O'Donnell
subject: Reinforcements incoming
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS**
body:
President Donald J. Trump needs reinforcements in Congress—conservative fighters who will help secure the border, cut spending, and shrink the size of the federal government. That’s why I’m stepping up. | [](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=6192602c0eb24e7bbc1ef9d4b54c1384&_e=wo_DqK9gCb3i1-kV2dJEDPHH1RaabruD7mStyXzXI7L4c9vH54vDi0CKFomDvl7pWXOIZpHJI2_a8sQU_fsskqzGA8w46Z0Gry_01b6qdQKqNZRrfMBrbI3IU8A5mhQmfIy3FLl3Nfbg63TPLUmWcDkC-cVJdpPAlRvleZ-qmNZX5UzTF3vyBe6PY84tnF8BVBxP9zE9d9wvyQqnFTq-Si5xzr4qUd4X2WGEPgoAM9qeSGreUUX-RzAzMfbXMGbdquyFXC3HJNbZMXnxLQ1MoYm7CSJb0OuADgorpDcm6vWm1Vfcpl_UHw3dY5YMHypcHfsHbUD0i-IAfTXFy2MseR6SBh27RDGgF5H36gOBwuAT1w5XTMiv1jwObaE-AGfHoCNRRwx3mrx8oyxHGiruEoqampnhpkhdE1E8C8eWn8w%3D)
---
Friend

I have some exciting news to share with you...

But before I do, I need to reiterate what I’ve said before: **I’m a musician and a composer,_NOT a politician._**

But, like many of you, I’m sick and tired of watching swamp politicians (who claim to not be politicians...) in Washington lay waste to our country, misuse our tax dollars, abuse their power, and compromise our safety and security.

That’s why I ran for Congress in 2024. Unfortunately, we were not successful the first time. But, also unfortunately, we’re still facing many of the same problems, and we still have politicians in Washington–like Susie Lee–trying to resurrect the same failed agenda that voters just rejected in November.

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=U5mbmt9Xqz9x65DGOu3CO%2FUbUu%2FXcT2%2FcVt84BxQIF6dEPy4Dhg73Y4boZZfg41XEDESdPasOXpOph2HZLRLTWQ6VwbkYpyOJOCwLc3eA1rFWK%2B7ras6r420eVwYhxh7%2FwibFWPblHIt0fqUPA%2BRw8D%2FtzjCrP3NXb6ZzVNHh8bzsJabDd2pEPi3tdBMKpceqaInRDTTSCLKRYiKvS1C%2B0qMOfUQRzbHB4I9LUxvQi8nCWZjbAbgqxkYU9%2BLZzlLpUQdf0Jm%2F%2BYDj51kRYkVhxOwFBbh%2BRH9sGBPOrKRGXdaB1u0cVAuAgiLiJVKpbE%2FObMPWSePqCDVGijE8U4bjYoNmh7Bwj4sIdWAoIshvWwkskQoO61Z8Ogp7Zsc0%2BcE5yYBfB0VEgbzdRE0%2Fm8Zg2kp5heio0hvS3M9WAQVRd3IuvX7UIkZU7TBjSowEL6B]

# [#]
I know you received a ton of emails this week from my team and me about our critical FEC deadline, but I had to reach out one more time to thank you!

Last week, I told you that we had to raise $15,000 before our deadline to send a strong message that we’re ready to take on whatever comes our way this election cycle.

Thanks to you and the rest of this strong grassroots team, we absolutely sent that message: Not only did we meet our goal, but we exceeded it!

Thank you so much! This is exactly the momentum we need to keep up if we want to put a stop to Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans' attacks on our fundamental rights and freedoms.

But we can’t afford to slow down, so would you mind pitching in $ or whatever you can today so I can start Q2 strong and keep fighting for our communities in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-apr25?amount=]

DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-apr25?amount=]

Thank you for everything,

Raul Ruiz
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

name: Mark Takano
subject: I wanted to re-introduce myself >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
what pushes me...
| [ ](https://takano4ca.us/l/VwaXdkxBheuX?t=ZABPeZJxDYEK)
---
Peter, my path to Congress was not decided in smoke-filled rooms or carefully shaped by consultants in DC. **My commitment to public service was built across generations, and instilled in me by my family.**

During World War II, my parents and grandparents were sent to Japanese American internment camps because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost __everything__ and had no choice but to rebuild their entire lives after the war [](https://takano4ca.us/l/9BX8HoW5sd34) _Despite_ being cast aside as second-class citizens, they instilled in me a deep sense of civic responsibility and commitment to public service. To love our country _despite_ its flaws, and to fight for the more perfect union that our Constitution promises. **Despite it all, they persevered.**

It’s what drove me to become a public school teacher for 20 years and eventually run for Congress. [](https://takano4ca.us/l/M7MrgUc1hJK4) When I ran for Congress in 1994, bigotry would rear its ugly head when I was forcibly and **publicly outed as gay** by my Republican opponent.

Despite it all, **I persevered and was a sitting member of Congress when the Supreme Court legalized gay marriage in 2015.**

Today, we’re seeing some of that same racism, xenophobia, and homophobia again – especially from my MAGA counterparts in Congress. Attacks on immigrants, LGBTQ+ Americans, and women have been rising in recent years and threaten to derail decades of progress.

But despite it all, **we will prevail.**

[**Peter, hate is able to prevail when good people do nothing. So I’m asking for your support today – we can fight back against MAGA extremism if we band together! Will you chip in $7 today to stop MAGA’s erosion of our rights and help elect Democrats win? »**](https://takano4ca.us/l/0uWuvDyzDjXq) | [CHIP IN $7 TO FLIP THE MAGA MAJORITY! »](https://takano4ca.us/l/I2425Bw3023h)
---
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://takano4ca.us/l/Ir6ddtZhkKSo)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://takano4ca.us/l/Vfq7TjIuxE8y)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://takano4ca.us/l/ttVBwKsGsp2d)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://takano4ca.us/l/Y7Bd74jyTFNH)
[Or a custom donation »](https://takano4ca.us/l/lnVJc7W2oTqm)
Sincerely,

Mark Takano
| | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517
www.marktakano.com

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://takano4ca.us/l/sWnPhuGR2giU?t=8aPxV52qwA64). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a[monthly contribution by clicking here](https://takano4ca.us/l/wynly5jKHcuY?t=ghbnUdDfDdaF).**

[Click here](https://takano4ca.us/fewer-emails?t=Yi4rpMpPPyni) to receive fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://takano4ca.us/l/6nTAD4eNHN9I). | | [Peter: Donate One a Month to Help Mark »](https://takano4ca.us/l/8Q9A61RueJvD?t=hW6Xo5MS6WRj)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://takano4ca.us/l/PyxSUVckhqPv?t=4BbObcf6gLSX)

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: We can never give up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
This team showed that every one of us can do something constructive every day. |
#
---
Team, I know the chaos coming out of Washington can feel overwhelming. Prices are rising, and our rights are under attack. Right now, people are scared. They’re angry. And they’re worried about what the future holds. Truthfully, it’s normal to feel this way. But we can never let these feelings get the best of us and lead us to give up. **We have to keep fighting — and that’s exactly what this grassroots team continues to do.** We just wrapped up our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year. _We crushed it._ This team showed that, regardless of what’s going on in the world, every one of us can do something constructive every day. Whether you donated, signed a petition, or got involved in some other way, I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart. People like you are going to lead the way as we fight like hell to deliver for Michiganders and elect champions for working people across the country. As long as we continue to stand together, I’m confident that we’ll be able to create a future where every family can thrive. I’m so grateful for all your support. Thank you for being such a key member of this team. Let’s keep fighting! — Gretchen | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104984276/537030125/-1809995021?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20250401_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDI4MjVhN2QtNDAwZi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bfUKGh7e1kvN2GCnOosTr6JJPOGPG0IPAugCMhQxIZw=)

name: Florida GOP HQ
subject: Election Day: TODAY!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF FLORIDA
body:
Peter, today is Election Day in Florida, and we don’t mean to sound alarming, but this situation is serious... |
---
Peter, today is Election Day in Florida, and we don’t mean to sound alarming, but this situation is serious...

**ELECTION DAY:
**
**TODAY 🕒**

**EMERGENCY SPECIAL
ELECTION FUND:

** **CRITICALLY LOW 🪫**

We have two critical congressional special elections in Florida **TODAY,** and our special election funding is near **EMPTY.**

**We desperately need this funding to get out the vote in these key districts!**

[**REFUEL THE FUND 🔋**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3d4979b0d44f4ad7a3b2f4889408ce4f&_e=-srpQMSgF2iEAouphI6yL1FLcDGNPj6dSrBiP2mRfHI_Kcjj8hE8jmLIDEVhPI0STjbafXC0OIeeZfztWaMGKklnNiiZCK_rXjEHSBJhoZni1s_GoLI-_KYeUlVT3N2eZrhsslOTVsRASIu7zHlxhniVv1ec0mL2pk9ntwhCvQlxx3xrfswb8-qozCNtWmVYg4O43AZNSGbIXUblFeXTxvgfyHtH0l30ojYAQCCidDVWx3f4zalJ1gw6XGvZIjaJKcSoytVo4uOyCjhrwBWhrlF58w_smDYJhcNahYSyMMbZodjwy7XaAdDXUYSjMRmc0QyET8tX1WLFYugmMwqpvy_5-VIp8TN5H7GS65VnKa89WyjLvynAd9ntDX7RdOXjS-v5hRf_boztDw8XF8XsCM1GWYQgHy9NCP41Z1YA-Ljj2ZdvK-_8CbNXUeoyOty1JZMOlKmuwnMH7h8ruTLVwA%3D%3D)

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: We took on Mike Johnson – and we won!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Today was a big, big day. We took on House Speaker Mike Johnson — and we won!
But let me rewind for a second. Did you see this New York Times headline?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Here’s the background:
I’m co-leading a bipartisan effort to allow Members of Congress to vote by proxy for twelve weeks after they or their spouse give birth. Basically, it allows for new parents to be where they’re needed most, when they’re needed most, and still do their jobs in Congress.
Congress was designed by and for older men, and it’s far past time to modernize our rules to reflect the people actually serving here now — and those who may want to serve here in the future.
Mike Johnson doesn’t want this bill to move forward. He says it’s unconstitutional, even though the Supreme Court has already declined to take up a case challenging proxy voting. And yes — he used proxy voting himself during the height of the COVID pandemic.
It’s not unconstitutional — it’s common sense.
200 years ago, secure proxy voting wasn’t possible. Today, it is. And it’s one of the most obvious ways we can support new parents — so they can care for their newborns and still serve their constituents.
In fact, this bill is so straightforward and so widely supported that 218 Members of Congress signed the discharge petition, essentially overriding Republican House leadership to force a vote on the bill. That’s the minimum needed — and we hit it faster than any discharge petition in recorded Congressional history.
Now Speaker Johnson is using behind-the-scenes procedural tricks to try and block the bill anyway. Today, he derailed his own legislative agenda because he tried to tie tanking our proxy voting bill with the passage of some of his and Donald Trump’s toxic bills. And when the effort failed...he cancelled votes for the entire week. Today is Tuesday, and now we won’t be voting again until Monday.
Because he doesn’t want to accommodate new moms in Congress? Because he thinks Congress should still only work for men?
Honestly, it’s hard to think of a good reason to block this bill.
So I’m asking for your help:
Will you chip in so that I can keep standing up for families and doing this work? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If we want a Congress that actually reflects and supports the American people — including parents, young people, and working families — we need to break down these archaic barriers.
Thanks for joining with me on this.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs for Congress
PO Box 120085
San Diego, CA 92112
United States

CONTRIBUTE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. If you'd like to receive less email from us, please click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/1ZAJdGZqA02o6mVNL1jNkQ2] and we'll adjust your preferences. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hyl6jC1aX0el_nwy_DShOA2?unsubscribedata=imji47VJqS0cAvV5kG1MeTCsmHI0DJKuys0GfhA7%2FD399xg312UNKMdHP5u1XxbaJYMS%2Bd86VeB3Gzva466ObWdoCIUuBmtVVWZYqFrlsBj%2F8znyTAWc2cEiF29r8n0orgl3iH%2F7nO0dt6nPlILR1og9jpb58Y1DRpLmy1ja%2BLu2fP7sfA9ULOMX4OJ%2Fm7B16pdLpeCU11TMW7myN4Aii8sJpg6bmWu%2BmsluYk6MSt9%2FJBrhjX02rl9kw3M9ENqCsrcbDwTL%2BIkundlRA70VaIjuFDS%2Bo9sBu1lDCDgAtjI5sKnyl%2FfPQWVbbhk2bwh9%2FQXKqnu5tTJEI6Xrs2MHSfoxGJSNtmyTzxZ%2FxHZyF0P%2BSEIQ8uD7lUTlqL7fc1%2Bf1E3DdLN16t3dHs75UQ6Zetq7R2yiWxXGfs0smmECNInaoA6odiMLD2ZWc1EuepeX .

| | | **FINAL FL-06 UPDATE**
The FL-06 Special Election is TODAY so there's no time for pleasantries.

This is Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I need to pass along an urgent message. Our candidate Randy Fine just told me he's been reaching out to you but I wanted to make sure I put this at the top of your inbox.

_I'm pleading with you to read his message immediately._

**- RANDY FINE'S ORIGINAL MESSAGE -**

Thank G-d...

I reached you just in the nick of time.

**It 's Randy Fine - I'm rushing to you with three urgent updates about my Special Election to replace MIKE WALZ in FL-06:**
1\. A radical anti-Israel group called to CENSURE ME right after I won my primary
2\. A far-Left blog just fired off a 1,200+ word HIT PIECE against me
3\. Election Day is TODAY and I'm short of my final fundraising goal
Let me be real with you -

We have one of the slimmest House Majorities in ~100 years. If we lost this Special Election, the odds of Democrats assuming the Speaker's gavel and sabotaging President Trump's second term will SKYROCKET.

_**[That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Scalise ONE FINAL TIME before my Special Election to raise a million dollars to help win my seat, elect more strong Republicans, and deliver on President Trump's powerful agenda.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cf772c59298c4af4886dbc82064236f1&_e=1q6GEuYvEnvFnUuI4jIxQLci14cwK5IFzU3SP16QbGeYGmXooXMMhGIhxlXArpUQYzcL0CfVRPi0ipRI8ThFtan976EsSvkme0ZohLbMUaVGAEoIwUkIaUXSnhb_nQIwDzgtjtaBM9dbMD-rh0_YcYSUonCIRl5UIO67T6gU14biKBkM5Go2cwe_M-4twpbhO5-fKDXLEmiIFkWsZPQ_BB1H0ajmL6pg7yEV8AcGF-DWahNAzVPARF6IuSISl6lOtd_TZRbloZCkJYxnc5gJny5ibsLkW6uRxikCWHy4qHNi-5eKlDDkNlmfQRyMRiWotwTXbyHJtfAQ13VSqcxrO9iKk4hzqVpP92_4Qzfx3vmQRTVu5-UAJ1TMQgxweWJsTyouWEK3_dbpzVDQG0yMyQ%3D%3D "That’s why I’m partnering with Majority Leader Scalise ONE FINAL TIME before my Special Election to raise a million dollars to help win my seat, elect more strong Republicans, and deliver on President Trump’s powerful agenda.")**_

_I 'm personally asking: Would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks for this noble cause?_ **[**YES >>**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cf772c59298c4af4886dbc82064236f1&_e=1q6GEuYvEnvFnUuI4jIxQLci14cwK5IFzU3SP16QbGeYGmXooXMMhGIhxlXArpUQYzcL0CfVRPi0ipRI8ThFtan976EsSvkme0ZohLbMUaVGAEoIwUkIaUXSnhb_nQIwDzgtjtaBM9dbMD-rh0_YcYSUonCIRl5UIO67T6gU14biKBkM5Go2cwe_M-4twpbhO5-fKDXLEmiIFkWsZPQ_BB1H0ajmL6pg7yEV8AcGF-DWahNAzVPARF6IuSISl6lOWp_yej25UrjQK-bF70g-ETiRkzlO5MvCbtl6rfd9x3-FnVJLJ3a-aMuIlMIv7ROFtkhPxffURaFwVWT9X9nIvbgC0MkHWTykK2IU8eF67Ds6EWgptjRaQw1PpLd2HMON4iwcg0_IWAeWz2rvBeTGZA%3D%3D)_[**NO >>**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cf772c59298c4af4886dbc82064236f1&_e=1q6GEuYvEnvFnUuI4jIxQLci14cwK5IFzU3SP16QbGeYGmXooXMMhGIhxlXArpUQYzcL0CfVRPi0ipRI8ThFtan976EsSvkme0ZohLbMUaVGAEoIwUkIaUXSnhb_nQIwDzgtjtaBM9dbMD-rh0_YcYSUonCIRl5UIO67T6gU14biKBkM5Go2cwe_M-4twpbhO5-fKDXLEmiIFkWsZPQ_BB1H0ajmL6pg7yEV8AcGF-DWahNAzVPARF6IuSISl6lOD3ekCo1VJNrSQsaLpi41IMZ1cr5E7aQhB-CDs1rOEiNqh8_BExaksKcU2yr8QYWxOv7dK4SbrEsf1ERq0j0jgNCIkMfnBXTeHFZnrss8Rk7nYAzM1rdmFOHjWI-wJBGZX45ilcvQMG8QYO7Fw-jFMw%3D%3D)**
Look, the Democrat Machine has spent a fortune slandering my name, lying about my record, and making me sound like a monster.

So here's who I really am:

I'm a proud father of two... I'm a proud Jew who will forever stand with our ally Israel... And I'm a Trump-endorsed Conservative so you know you can trust me.

I'm 100% confident I can defeat the Democrat Machine and win this Special Election - but only with support from fellow Patriots like you.

Remember: My Special Election is today. I could REALLY use your support right away.

GOP brawler and military veteran Rep. Clay Higgins **[EXPLODED at Democrat Rep. Gerry Connolly](https://substack.com/redirect/7f019890-9f91-402f-b281-51c1b4e54a47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for making the false claim that DOGE targeting veterans benefits.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7f019890-9f91-402f-b281-51c1b4e54a47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7f019890-9f91-402f-b281-51c1b4e54a47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Connolly gave a low-energy monologue about how Elon Musk and Trump are putting veterans at risk under the "false pretense of going after bureaucracy." He wasn't ready for what was about to happen next...
"I'm gonna directly address my veteran brothers and sisters across the country," Higgins prefaced his response. "We're gonna fix the VA whether anybody in the bureaucracy machine likes it or not!!"
"I've helped thousands of veterans across Louisiana and every one of them has the same issue, a problem with the bureaucratic machine of the VA! Not the nurses and the doctors, not their fellow veterans! Their problem is with the waste and the arrogance!!" Higgins continued. "We're about the fix the VA and that means we are going to eliminate the fraud waste and abuse in the VA!"
Watch democrats watch in horror as Higgins gives them a much needed reality check"
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7f019890-9f91-402f-b281-51c1b4e54a47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Thank you, Cory Booker
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
* # [Thank you, Cory Booker](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb00a4fe-3374-4473-89d9-658d3521e264/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72ad6328-bdcc-4896-8da2-e4d7c46daf36/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Amazing.

"Senator Cory Booker, his voice still booming after more than a day spent on the Senate floor railing against the Trump administration, on Tuesday night surpassed Strom Thurmond for the longest Senate speech on record, in an act of astonishing stamina that he framed as a call to action." ([NYT](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tccdc65fd-727f-447f-871a-1b5e0f406d29/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))

This is how you fight. By using every tool and rule you have to put roadblocks in front of the Republican sprint to dictatorship. This may have just stopped them for one day, but if the other Senate Democrats joined, and started playing hardball, we could turn that day into weeks, months, or a whole lot longer. [**Add your name: Thank you, Senator Booker. And to all the other Democrats--more like this, please. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac68241d-321a-47e4-8f53-2f36e093d75f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
