name: George Latimer
subject: I can’t thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=22PPWLv0vegfnj7pCjNJW1tbBupKhfzkKHY5VTF1rXmq%2Ffyx4vx7PyVMWDdaywZu%2BywDu82qtMU9xQDWVubBwOj4iAuBO5KwrlgvwA4y1DCI%2BrPLV4hHLXZTuyzAWsYjSBhIZr%2F6eu36MZ8220To7rgK3ltlWHaTGNpiPNo4kEa3p9ob13Q8wjBNmpc7vnmnp4C7XPwwRBI5ckHJf9BzeGqPRZUbGM7SfTzRZGaQgRuAWdIBy5rFaNzTmS2MWU8MTaMgLzl0txas8EsseHprIXYwAcC%2B7jPA6fMpSlnX%2FRwayK31HUcBPhu9Pa19pji86bTr2hQyzQfr4BMkljmKQIZ7oc0Z4VcpNfZd36qY2lDWHc1NtNOOukRu%2BU%2B%2Fl7O1dKCeRc3v2sqsS49Ley9BssWStOyI69OzB3s5kp6EJilgZ2W0%2FkeV6nMDfwtYKqTb]

# [#]
Hey Peter, it’s George.

I know you heard from me and my team a lot over the last week, so I wanted to reach out to say thank you. With your support, we were able to finish the quarter off on the strongest note possible.

This deadline was a critical test of our strength as this election cycle got started — and this grassroots team stepped up to the plate.

We have a long road ahead of us, but the path is clear. With your support, we can take back the House and put a stop to Republicans’ extreme agenda.

It’s no secret that critical programs like Social Security and Medicare remain under threat – so we need to work together to fight back and ensure Democrats win. I’ll always fight to protect the needs of everyday Americans and am honored to know that you have my back.

Thanks again for your support.

George

P.S. Our work is just getting started, and this election is only going to get tougher. Your grassroots support — $5, $10, $15 at a time [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-april25?amount=5] — will only become more important. I’d be so grateful if you could spare a contribution of any amount to my campaign today . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-april25?amount=5] Thanks again for all you do!
https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY [https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY] https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY [https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23]
For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

name: Blue Amp Action Team
subject: STUNNING: Cory Booker Breaks Record for Longest Senate Speech in History!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T839eb8bc-5854-4d38-82df-70ded65ebe0c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Katie Porter
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39602%2E3422442%2Ek7wqOr)
Derek, it’s people like you who have powered every campaign I’ve ever run. So, I wanted to personally give you an update on where we landed with our March email fundraising goal of $100,000.
As you know, I set these monthly targets to help us stay on track with raising the resources we need to win. And, I communicate with you honestly about these goals, why they’re important, and our progress toward hitting them.
**Thanks to an outpouring of grassroots support, we were able to get over 90% of the way to our goal!**
I’m so grateful for everyone who chipped in $5 or whatever they could spare to help get this campaign off the ground. The work I do would not be possible without you. _Thank you._
But, I won’t BS you. Because we fell short of our March target, we’re going to have to work twice as hard to make up lost ground. **_[(Can you chip in right now to help us close the gap?)](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250401_1_ak?refcode=em20250401-39602&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39602_3422442_k7wqOr&akid=39602%2E3422442%2Ek7wqOr)_**
Running in a big state like California is expensive. And because our campaign doesn’t take money from corporate PACs, lobbyists, or executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks, we need many more small-dollar donors to make up the difference from rejecting those big checks.
That might spook other candidates, but it doesn’t get to me. I know that we have what it takes to win, with the strength of this movement behind me.
So I have to ask, will you help us kick off a strong start to our April fundraising with a donation?
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250401_1_ak?refcode=em20250401-39602&refcode2=39602_3422442_k7wqOr&akid=39602%2E3422442%2Ek7wqOr)
More soon,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250401-39602&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39602_3422442_k7wqOr&akid=39602%2E3422442%2Ek7wqOr)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39602&t=4&akid=39602%2E3422442%2Ek7wqOr)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39602)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39602&t=5&akid=39602%2E3422442%2Ek7wqOr)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

We are a day away from filling the Congressional seats left vacant from Matt Gaetz and Mike Waltz. In Florida's 1st Congressional district Republican Jimmy Patronis is running against Democrat Gay Valimont and in Congressional district 6 state Senator Randy Fine and Democrat Josh Weil are running to replace National Security Advisor Mike Waltz's seat. Both districts are heavy Trump favorites with a 30 point victory back in November. The harder race to call is in Wisconsin, where Elon, Scott Pressler and many prominent MAGA influencers have been on the ground to get Waukesha County court judge Brad Schimel elected. Tomorrow is also Liberation Day, President Trump will impose reciprocal type tariffs on imported goods from other countries in an effort to free the United States from relying on foreign goods. The president has already brought in a flurry of investments and Peter Navarro foresees a $600 Billion annual increase in American prosperity. Elon Musk exposed absolutely insane fraud within Social Security, including millions of illegal immigrants receiving benefits. Harrison Fields joins me to discuss all things inside the Trump White House. Working alongside Karoline Leavitt, the White House has taken the reins from the WHCA in the press briefing room. The WHCA annual dinner might not even happen after the host, left-wing hack Amber Ruffin, slandered Harrison and his colleagues. The Trump administration is excited for Liberation Day and look forward to the economic boom they predict will be brought in from tariffs.
Featuring:
Harrison Fields
Special Assistant to POTUS
Principal Deputy Press Secretary | Trump Administration
New content in my newsletter: https://www.seanspicer.com/p/restoring-trust-in-our-elections

Delta Rescue is one the largest no-kill animal sanctuaries. Leo Grillo is on a mission to help all abandoned, malnourished, hurt or suffering animals. He relies solely on contributions from people like you and me. If you want to help Leo to continue his mission of running one of the best care-for-life animal sanctuaries in the country please visit Delta Rescue at: https://deltarescue.org/

Everywhere she goes in Virginia, she’s been hearing about how Trump and DOGE’s federal job cuts are already impacting Virginia’s economy and local businesses. She’s been standing up for the over 300,000 federal employees who call Virginia home, many of whom are nonpartisan career civil servants who are dedicated to serving their communities. They are real people with real families and real bills to pay.

Meanwhile, Abigail’s opponent and Virginia Republicans are standing by — and even cheering on — as the White House and DOGE attack public servants and Virginia’s economy. **This isn’t the leadership that Virginia deserves.**

Virginia deserves a leader like Abigail who will speak out against DOGE’s reckless actions and put Virginia families and jobs first. She will work to strengthen our economy by investing in the robust workforce that allows Virginia to flourish.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Everything we do is made possible by grassroots supporters like you.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250401-4911-footer&t=1&akid=4911%2E420207%2Eswlb86)
Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter!
I know you’ve received a lot of emails from my campaign lately, but they’ve been important. Thanks to this grassroots team, I’m excited to say we didn’t just meet our $100,000 goal for the first quarter, _**we exceeded it.**_ 💪🏽
**I don’t take a dime from corporations or their PACs, and I don’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs.** Everything we do — from getting out the vote in swing states to organizing Resistance Labs across the country — is made possible by grassroots supporters like you.
And Peter, this is only the beginning. People are angry, frustrated, and scared right now. As progressives, it’s our job to give them a way to channel that emotion into action and progress.
That’s what the Resistance Labs are all about. And we’re going to keep at it until we stop Trump’s authoritarian agenda and create a government that puts working families first.
**So thank you again for your support last quarter, Peter.[And if you can, please consider chipping in $3 today to keep powering this movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250401-1?refcode=em20250401-4911&amount=3&refcode2=4911_420207_swlb86&akid=4911%2E420207%2Eswlb86)**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250401-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250401-4911&refcode2=4911_420207_swlb86&akid=4911%2E420207%2Eswlb86)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250401-4911-footer&t=2&refcode2=4911_420207_swlb86&akid=4911%2E420207%2Eswlb86)**

clean_body: Everything we do is made possible by grassroots supporters like you. Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter! I know you’ve received a lot of emails from my campaign lately, but they’ve been important. Thanks to this grassroots team, I’m excited to say we didn’t just meet our $100,000 goal for the first quarter, we exceeded it. 💪🏽 I don’t take a dime from corporations or their PACs, and I don’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs. Everything we do — from getting out the vote in swing states to organizing Resistance Labs across the country — is made possible by grassroots supporters like you. And Peter, this is only the beginning. People are angry, frustrated, and scared right now. As progressives, it’s our job to give them a way to channel that emotion into action and progress. That’s what the Resistance Labs are all about. And we’re going to keep at it until we stop Trump’s authoritarian agenda and create a government that puts working families first. So thank you again for your support last quarter, Peter. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Dan Rayfield
subject: Join us for our "Safeguarding Oregon: Federal Oversight Forums" next week!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/danrayfield/join-us-for-our-safeguarding-oregon-federal-oversight-forums-next-week?e=1768325bd4)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends,

I'm excited to announce that I'm launching a series of town halls to connect with Oregonians and communities across the state. The "Safeguarding Oregon: Federal Oversight Forums" will launch next week, coinciding with the 100-day milestone of our administration, which will occur on April 10th.

In our first three months in office, we've established clear priorities: challenging federal overreach, fighting back against corporate greed, and standing up for veterans, students and working families. These forums will create an ongoing dialogue with Oregonians about federal accountability and how we're working to protect their rights.

I hope you'll join us for the Safeguarding Oregon forums alongside key state and national leaders at one of our upcoming locations.

Our first stop is in Eugene with Oregon House Speaker Julie Fahey!

Date: April 9th
Time: 6:30-8:00 pm
Location: University of Oregon Campus, Kincaid Street & 14th Ave., Prince Lucien Campbell building, PLC 180

Our second is in Portland with my friend Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes. Stay tuned here for more details!

Your friend,

Dan
---

name: Team DLCC
subject: March was a month full of victories, thanks to this grassroots team
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
In last month’s special elections, we defended every Democrat-held seat, protected our majority in the Pennsylvania House, re-tied the Minnesota House, and flipped a Trump +15 PA Senate seat. | | |
---
| |
---|---
March was a big month for state Democrats, and a huge part of our success is thanks to contributions from this online team. In last month’s special elections, we defended every Democrat-held seat, protected our majority in the Pennsylvania House, re-tied the Minnesota House, and flipped a Trump +15 PA Senate seat. **Those victories are meaningful because they help Democrats build a blue firewall to block the far-right from implementing its extreme agenda in the states.** Right now, we’re gearing up for this fall’s all-important elections in Virginia. With the governorship and state House up for grabs, we need to run innovative campaigns and mobilize every voter – that work starts with early involvement and investment. [We’re relying on grassroots support to help our candidates compete and win in upcoming elections. Can we count on you to make your first donation of the year today? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDSCrqP7HuqdVbYWeROcw0LmhSwoOeYGxvoFvW3RpzE9uk5ma25VGvXwaqy8fOVFP40AO6ostwxzp13owStMASUV7OoAnUoGOciN6s0NYg4D9VqhavXFxmKtINrMdHPpOLx-efulyI28abyVxB57Xhjrp_3XIFjdD_y-418yu-SZeXiS3UvXNPqGa1lkzSxC1F1wtVBSbCR7j1KY5qmihxJKqBP-ZqCD13zcLljwBsItFgUOYGq9unCaWDpc-iZKasd-hax3SV9yjs4YVoNdKhAfXEnnKQtEPM2XM7ygJt4LMav6Zc_1tw0Ov6iJq8UxXcv_QMAllDbhwDT_F1lsUMPyFisOBo8qFDtbQlJJ4tqXFdzHIIk6KLdXrpPB2hgqn4GfaBAyVQpLKSQJGO2Iis0OFiwUUaZTjdTXD2ZFRikVZktcbANmwg1rvlncwFnHigVeFmiik6Ru_dzDBwaHqKax3l5GSqpbsxSkQyAcnS_4bsSisCXyhNgufpFqXqdHWt6BWIuch0pzxxozelB4O96uN-rKyQA5L_Yd82oqlJgL4/4fa/N3bG6kO1SC21ngsBoDPRpA/h0/h001.BTI9NmGuWqoUGePu5gK7DZ7hyUC6OwFmENsL6s2zGdk) Thank you for all you’ve done, and all you’ll do to support state Democrats. _Active for 30 minutes_

House Republican leaders are launching an emergency fundraising drive to fuel our efforts and keep these seats in Republican hands - FL-1 and FL-6. **[And for the next 30 minutes, every dollar you give will be DOUBLED by House Republicans, so your impact will be twice as strong.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=718585b440c5499caae97f7d4d6c7255&_e=Bcxbxh_J0GhRBmKmTjkpHzyFGzFaIkQWMfuAW8ERsyUc_cDrsG_Ys4Q91BOXgmM3UK8Uq_TaILD_oXjOz8QuDuFqUMcRWXUY7GLf_LCHSfTauFNkHNnj3k0_OmeGuEVWtaGMrXPOrE5sODsl30HABJ-xjUBiJ3_N9xMonNbqcsFW8q6k3BfTN_1zz8s5X4M1GBdsdd4f6VfBRy4yPncesjtU7eMjs3wVjZ8vXBvGdg5TDW-o300gxZLmcaAzLkYQtcPCOBUrPnUXZKQCojTw97pbXmryDE3RmWvh2pPMHbJffNW-rrT-hIPbKrMXw3sv6aRZUfaikogFIUbJp8-oxsCHrtpmaMXFWtR0-seStI3G_nAL5trtLhgEqPace6NNGf2qgcjRZZYFZH3Lor8zYcR4JtYWS7cc6ts6_fOpTzc%3D "And for the next 30 minutes, every dollar you give will be DOUBLED by House Republicans, so your impact will be twice as strong.")**

clean_body: House Republican leaders are launching an emergency fundraising drive to fuel our efforts and keep these seats in Republican hands Critical reinforcements are needed >> | | | | | Friend, Three crucial House seats are headed to special elections, and we need your immediate support to defend our majority. These seats are the key to maintaining our America First agenda, and Democrats are already mobilizing to take them from us. | | | "Generic Button" Active for 30 minutes House Republican leaders are launching an emergency fundraising drive to fuel our efforts and keep these seats in Republican hands - FL-1 and FL-6. "And for the next 30 minutes, every dollar you give will be DOUBLED by House Republicans, so your impact will be twice as strong." Will you step up and help us defend our Majority? | | | "Generic Button" | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | The people of Israel are still suffering from the effects of the war this Passover. Many are still hoping and praying for peace. The Jewish people still need food, water, and medicine during these difficult times.

With the Passover season upon us, many are facing the holiday hungry and alone. The need to support Israel has never been greater than now.

During this time, we hope you’ll stand in solidarity with our brothers and sisters in Israel by wearing our U.S.--Israel flag pin. Click here to receive yours today.

The Jewish people still need food, water, and medicine during these difficult times. With the Passover season upon us, many are facing the holiday hungry and alone. The need to support Israel has never been greater than now. During this time, we hope you’ll stand in solidarity with our brothers and sisters in Israel by wearing our U.S.--Israel flag pin. Click here to receive yours today. | | | | | | | | | | tel:+18004868844 | © International Fellowship of Christians and Jews ® 303 East Wacker Drive, Suite 2300 Chicago, Illinois 60601 US The Fellowship is a 501(c)(3) tax-exempt, non-profit organization ® 2025 International Fellowship of Christians and Jews Since 1983, various stories of destitute Jewish people, whose names and photos may have been changed for privacy and security have been used to bless Israel and her people. Through these retellings, generous friends like you have helped feed, clothe, and shelter as well as provide medical care and heating for tens of thousands of those who struggle greatly. |

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=800f3e4e9d064386abd67c747d6d8b08&_e=Eznw3Jd5-Aj-T8DFCeetD3jI1xO_ZhZ0MKxHE69wIiiVFjuqgaXjEBC3jC5aRbtHsYcbCq7Ke0Oy4rJJKSjbhEFn3xcf27tyYaEtRsEEEL-77wFDhUEqCL-Vi0eOyrfQqxzoIc9jomt-DbifLqmEBycUlpOL9rzekZ3QDzwEZvFFwbyKG-j_q8Gh-NkU1B_cqqtIegBoHLQ6j7BgiwNGGrdsuagu2W2b5w2v4kE6qdw84ny3uZxs_Xam_afoGRMC_bL9B7iGD-2rNN0Xus3D7EMHA3MBGV0sTrk6FXf5juFG_wh5vkxqcsHPi111bFA0sH8-c4eYZNRErhlKoZwvuw%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=800f3e4e9d064386abd67c747d6d8b08&_e=Eznw3Jd5-Aj-T8DFCeetD3jI1xO_ZhZ0MKxHE69wIiiVFjuqgaXjEBC3jC5aRbtHsYcbCq7Ke0Oy4rJJKSjbhEFn3xcf27tyYaEtRsEEEL-77wFDhUEqCL-Vi0eOyrfQqxzoIc9jomt-DbifLqmEBycUlpOL9rzekZ3QDzwEZvFFwbyKG-j_q8Gh-NkU1B_caF-_iphU0IpVsmqvQjZorj8HdPb4vduWu4MwfkTraFrXzc0pqBnGI7hVMoRu_hlWuP3indk3f5T-np3eQzMtVrHZstFCpqzhy-28-DbUfbP0CfW7lu5gV5DlkoUydTxU_4K1gCKOQ0GKsVhTGpINAA%3D%3D)

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Trump & RFK Jr are threatening public health – I’m fighting back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
The administration is trying to abruptly cut off essential support for a wide range of urgent public health needs.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250401&t=1&akid=1720%2E1088799%2ErM6Ztf)
Breaking news: **Today, I filed my ninth lawsuit against the Trump administration.[If I have your support, can you pitch in to our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250401?refcode=em20250401-1720&amount=5&refcode2=1720_1088799_rM6Ztf&akid=1720%2E1088799%2ErM6Ztf)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250401?refcode=em20250401-1720&amount=5&refcode2=1720_1088799_rM6Ztf&akid=1720%2E1088799%2ErM6Ztf)
This time, I’m suing to stop the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), led by Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr, from **unlawfully terminating $11 billion in critical public health funding.**
By abruptly ending federal grants for state and local health agencies, the administration is cutting off essential support for a wide range of urgent public health needs, including:
❌ Identifying, tracking, and addressing infectious diseases
❌ Ensuring access to vaccines
❌ Modernizing public health infrastructure
This funding was already appropriated by Congress in response to the devastating COVID-19 pandemic to ensure our country is better prepared for future public health emergencies. Not only will these cuts hurt our nation’s public health infrastructure, but _they will hinder our ability to weather new pandemics and put our children, seniors, and communities at risk._
**This is NOT the way to ‘Make America Healthy Again.' It’s dangerous and it’s unlawful, which is why I’m suing.**
**[If you have my back in the fight to stop Trump, RFK Jr, and the administration from sabotaging our country’s public health, chip in $5 now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250401?refcode=em20250401-1720&amount=5&refcode2=1720_1088799_rM6Ztf&akid=1720%2E1088799%2ErM6Ztf)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250401?refcode=em20250401-1720&amount=5&refcode2=1720_1088799_rM6Ztf&akid=1720%2E1088799%2ErM6Ztf)**
In solidarity,
Rob

clean_body: This is a crucial moment in our fight to protect the American people and our democracy. Please add your name before midnight tonight. | | 🚨 Breaking news: Cory Booker has been on the Senate floor for over 20 hours to stand up against Donald Trump’s extreme policies and defend our Social Security. | = We must elect more heroes like Cory Booker who will fight tooth and nail to protect Americans’ hard-earned benefits from Trump and Elon Musk’s attempts to rip them away. = | = Kirsten Gillibrand joined him on the floor to call out the GOP: “It’s an absurdity. Your Social Security check is your hard-earned money, it is not for Elon Musk to play with.” — Kirsten Gillibrand For many Americans, their monthly Social Security check is the ONLY money they have to rely on. It’s a lifeline. We cannot allow Elon Musk to slow down Social Security offices, cut off phone lines and prevent folks from receiving lifesaving benefits. That’s why we must send leaders like Cory Booker back to the Senate to continue defending our fundamental rights. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Cory Booker and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Gillibrand HQ * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

| | | I'm tapping you in, Peter.

I'm calling on _**YOU**_ to join the fight to take back our country. With the GOP Trifecta in full swing, it's more important than ever for us to make sure that we have clear direction.

_And this isn 't some sort of elitist top-down system, we need to hear from YOU to make sure that we are succeeding in this goal. _

I'm well aware that you are a key supporter of our America First agenda, which is why I'm counting on you to participate in our 2025 Every Voter Canvass by **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**

As a top GOP leader, I can't deny it: Our path to victory relies on the input and activism of grassroots conservatives like you.

name: Dovid Efune
subject: Student's DOGE-Style Email Blamed for Emotional Harm
body:
🗞️ Read the latest reporting from The New York Sun 🗞️

<>

Reader,

They got DOGE-d. A sophomore at Brown University is facing investigation after
he took a page from the Department of Government Efficiency and sent an email
to nearly 4,000 administrators asking what they’ve accomplished in their jobs,
The New York Sun is reporting.

READ FOR 1¢ <>

It’s notable but you would be forgiven for not having seen this angle
reported before. Few media outlets have been adequately covering the story.

At The New York Sun we publish stories like this every day without blinking.

Our purpose is to keep the American public informed on matters of significant
interest and importance to their wellbeing and the future of our country.

We’re completely independent and serve no other agenda.

We believe that many news outlets in this country have lost their way. It’s at
the root of much of the rot we see in America today. If journalists aren’t
doing their jobs, then politicians, government and corporate giants won’t be
held to account.

At the Sun, we’re committed to restoring American journalism to its finest
traditions.

We are almost completely funded by our readers and answer to no one but you.

We know it won’t be easy. We’re up against some of the biggest corporations in
the world.

Our success depends on people like you. We need you to join us.

For as little as 1c per day you can join the movement to save American
journalism.

READ FOR 1¢ <>

We need every American to join us. Together we’re unstoppable.

Please consider joining today.

Sincerely,

<>

Dovid Efune
Publisher, The New York Sun

Peter,
Today, voters across Wisconsin are heading to the polls in one of the most high-stakes judicial elections in the country.
This race has been a national flashpoint. Trump endorsed Brad Schimel. Elon Musk flooded the state with more than $20 million in dark money, disinformation, and desperate gimmicks. And the court that voters choose today could shape the future of voting rights, redistricting, abortion access, and democracy itself—not just in Wisconsin but nationwide.
At GOTV PAC, we didn't flinch. We ran one of the most cost-effective turnout programs in the country. We made thousands of calls and texts to low-propensity voters and showed up, every day, when it counted.
But whatever happens tonight, this is far from over. The next elections are just around the corner; from the Pennsylvania Supreme Court to the Virginia legislature, we're going to be busy this year!
That's why we need to be ready. No waiting. No off days.
Your donation today ensures we can hit the ground running tomorrow—stronger, sharper, and ready for the next battle. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04012025&amount=25]

name: Andie Levien (via Democrats.org)
subject: Breaking: Democrats File Lawsuit to Block Trump’s Illegal Voter Suppression Executive Order
body:
Here’s what you need to know:
---
**_Breaking: Democratic Committees, Leaders Schumer and Jeffries File Lawsuit to Block Trump’s Illegal Voter Suppression Executive Order_** Derek, I’m Andie, the DNC’s General Counsel — which means it’s my job to oversee all legal issues related to the Party’s work. This means that in addition to helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot, I’m in charge of holding Republicans accountable to the Constitution. Trump recently signed an executive order that attempts to suppress voters, upend voter registration systems, stop states from counting eligible mail ballots, and withhold federal funding from dozens of states in the process. Democrats have one message for him: **We’ll see you in court.** The DNC, along with other Democratic committees and key Democratic leaders, has filed a lawsuit against President Trump, DOGE, and other departments within the Trump administration to block Trump’s unconstitutional order. Trump’s order not only violates multiple federal laws but also attacks the right to vote by mail and makes it harder for married women who have changed their names and military members to have their votes count. The order also allows DOGE to access sensitive personal information and makes it harder for states to run their own free and fair elections. It's anti-American, and Democrats are using every tool at our disposal — _including taking Trump to court_ — to stop this power-grab that undermines our democracy. Thank you again for your support as we fight back against Trump to protect our democracy. I’ll keep you posted. Andie Andrea Levien
General Counsel
Democratic National Committee **Your support helps us continue to build a strong Democratic Party that can protect voters, fight back against Trump’s illegal plans, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight for our democracy.** [**If this work is important to you, too, we hope you’ll consider chipping in $3 to help fund it:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250401_3109_fr&refcode2=3109_22930333_M9jlKP&akid=3109%2E22930333%2EM9jlKP) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250401_3109_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3109_22930333_M9jlKP&akid=3109%2E22930333%2EM9jlKP)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Forward Party
subject: Fast Forward - Immigration Follow Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
How should the US handle Immigration?

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_57_immigration_ro&n=1)
---
Tuesday, April 01, 2025 | Peter -- Wrapping up our third installment of our _**Controlling What You Can**_ series, we're looking at immigration. This topic has more nuance than any single social media post or email can ever hope to cover, so we will certainly be returning to this in more detail in the future. For now, here is a summary of your thoughts: The overwhelming majority of Forwardists are at least somewhat dissatisfied with how the US is handling immigration issues. On possible policy solutions, though, there was support for most every option, with none rising to earn the support of the majority. A better functioning pathway to citizenship was the most common solution selected as the most important issue to focus on first, but stronger enforcement and the growth of legal immigration across the board also had healthy support. When we pressed for details about what you would fix, here are the thoughts you left with us:
1. **Fair Pathways to Citizenship**

* You all called for a clearer and more efficient path to citizenship for long-time undocumented residents that emphasized fairness and the need to support children who grew up here as undocumented immigrants (sometimes referred to as DREAMers).

* As one of you put it, "_Those who have been in the country for years, with no criminal history, need a path to citizenship -- especially minors."_

2. **Comprehensive Immigration Reform**

* You called for updates to our outdated and inconsistent immigration laws. You asked for reform to reduce backlogs, secure legal entry points, and strengthen the overall process.
3. **Border Security & Legal Pathways

**
* Most everyone who brought up our borders wanted them to be more secure, but that was usually balanced with a call for it to be paired with expanded legal immigration pathways. The broad consensus: Increase pathways for legal immigration while shutting off illegal immigration.

* One of you said, "_We all want secure borders, but how we get there matters."

_
4. **Humanitarian Concerns &****Refugees
**

* Many of you were concerned about the pathway for asylum seekers and refugees coming under attack. You called for the alignment of immigration policies with American values of openness and compassion.

_**Controlling What You Can**_ has become one of our most engaging content series, so we plan to continue it well into the future! Please let us know what topics you think we should cover next. We're going to take a break from it this week because of a special announcement that will go live on 4/2, but we'll be back next week with the next installment.
[Christine Todd Whitman Thinks The EPA Is Going The Wrong Direction](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=I8hiGuqn3oziic57sfo4Djs93CJyjkxW5_iTYHtqI87YEbwLOaKgnsdmCU-ZSr5OEoD3asLTA3JqrQ24HfKoWvk9FZ15nQnXQ1MIDGtkW014Ak-mNdqY1zppH8hyXZeo3-z8QnUH5BjFkNbYMxwrOQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_57_immigration_ro&n=2) | _Delaware Currents_ When asked how she felt about America's direction on the environment, Gov. Christine Todd Whitman, former head of the EPA, said, "I think we're going totally the wrong direction. There's no question in my mind..." [Andrew Yang Joins The Will Cain Show To Discuss The Future Of Our Democracy](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=ITTgYn8SwKwIx5jB9cytiQd0MCCSav4hivrR2t1oqhwEWRJzETUnEpFdf6-V273Y&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_57_immigration_ro&n=3) | _The Will Cain Show_ Founder of the Forward Party, Andrew Yang, joins Will Cain to discuss the fracture of the political spectrum, especially on the Left.

April 1 | Utah Forward Party Davis County Convention The Utah Forward Party is hosting its first Davis County Convention for nominating candidates and voting on bylaws. If you're a member of Davis County, register today. April 2 | Black Voters Committee Roundtable: Your Voice, Your Priorities! Join the Black Voters Committee for an open and engaging roundtable that aims to put your voice at the center of Forward's work. April 6 | Young Forwardists Weekly Communications Meeting Join the Young Forwardist Committee at their weekly comms meeting. Collaborate, share ideas, and build messaging strategy to reach the next generation of voters. | Independent Political Report | Independent Political Report** Copyright © 2025 Forward Party, all rights reserved. name: John Fetterman
subject: talk about an upset! 🏀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1001&akid=10001%2E434096%2EUzirx2 ]John Fetterman

Hi Derek, it's John Fetterman.

It's March Madness, and there was a *huge* upset last week – but it wasn't in college basketball. It was right here in PA at the ballot box. 🗳️ 🔵 👇

Democrat wins Pennsylvania state senate race in major upset: James Malone triumphed in a district that voted for Trump over Harris by more than 15 points last November

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50894?t=1002&akid=10001%2E434096%2EUzirx2

President Trump easily won in Lancaster County a few months ago, so everyone thought a Republican would win last week's special election for state senate.

But Democrat James Malone ran on commonsense leadership, and the voters of PA made headlines last week when they chose him over his GOP opponent.

And now Malone is headed to Harrisburg to get sh*t done, not cause more chaos + confusion.

So I told PA Dems I'd help raise $10,000 by midnight to keep up this momentum and build the grassroots movement we need to fight for more wins like this in the midterm elections + beyond. Will you chip in a split donation to help flip more seats 🔵 and keep fighting for working people in PA?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50894?t=1003&akid=10001%2E434096%2EUzirx2

Thank YOU!!

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to EMAIL.

name: AOC
subject: It’s only “free speech” if you agree with them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
It’s only “free speech” if you agree with them.
Everyone else gets stripped from their community’s town hall.
The fact is, **we work for everybody**.
If Republican politicians can’t get that we work for the public, then the public should give them the boot. 🥾🗳️
Republicans are scared because people all over the country are standing up against their attacks on the working class.
**We deserve representation that stands with us**.
So, after meeting with over 86,000 people last week — including in vulnerable, GOP-held districts — Senator Bernie Sanders and I are bringing our Fighting Oligarchy tour to Los Angeles _next week_.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250401.VwAivg&refcode=em20250401-8509-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8509%2E2526796%2E6lnrTe)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250401.VwAivg&refcode=em20250401-8509-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8509%2E2526796%2E6lnrTe)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250401?refcode=em20250401-8509-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8509_2526796_6lnrTe&akid=8509%2E2526796%2E6lnrTe)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250401-8509-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=8509%2E2526796%2E6lnrTe)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8509%2E2526796%2E6lnrTe) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8509%2E2526796%2E6lnrTe) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8509%2E2526796%2E6lnrTe)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Hands Off Social Security
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100169773.172366.28&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100169773.172366.28&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169773.172366.28&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14106)
**Hands Off Social Security** _Senator Hughes brought federal, state, and local lawmakers, union leaders, and community members together outside the Social Security building in West Philly to tell Elon Musk and DOGE- keep your hands off social security!_
### **We want Musk and DOGE to Keep Their Hands Off Social Security**
Over 2.9 million Pennsylvanians receive social security, yet Elon Musk has mentioned multiple times that he thinks the program is a [Ponzi scheme](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169773.172366.28&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14107). He has [claimed that the program is full of fraud](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169773.172366.28&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14108), but that claim has been [proven false again and again](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169773.172366.28&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14109).
* * *
**WATCH: Senator Hughes says social security helps people afford rent and groceries** [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169773.172366.28&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14110)
* * *
### **Enough with Elon 's Lies**
When we hear lawmakers and Musk say "there will be no cuts to social security" they are not telling the truth. [At Senator Hughes' press conference](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169773.172366.28&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14110), union leaders explained how job cuts and office closures are already having an impact on wait times and the level of service social security recipients are experiencing. DOGE and the Social Security Administration have announced that leases for 47 Social Security offices across the country will be ended. They have also announced plans to cut thousands of jobs. It's easy to see how all of these cuts and closures will make it harder for people to access their benefits. Already, the Social Security website has crashed multiple times this year. And the system that monitors customer service was cut- part of DOGE's "efficiency" efforts.
### **Our Voices Will Make the Difference**
We must come together as a collective community to let Musk and President Trump know we see what they're doing, and we will not stand for it. Social Security provides money that seniors, children, and the disabled rely on to pay their bills, buy medication, and pay for groceries. Social Security is the primary source of income for about 40% of older Americans. We cannot let one unelected billionaire break down a program that millions of Americans have earned and rely on.
### **Call Your Congressperson**
Make your voice heard! Call Senators Fetterman and McCormick, and your US Representative and tell them to stop Musk and DOGE from making any more cuts and harmful changes to social security.
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes

name: David Hogg
subject: The most powerful part of Cory Booker’s speech
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This resonated with me on a deeply personal level.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250401-1&t=1&akid=1928%2E587540%2Eh0UycC)
Peter, I can’t thank you enough for helping Leaders We Deserve meet our fundraising goal before the end-of-quarter deadline.
But today, I actually want to talk about something different: **Senator Cory Booker’s impassioned, marathon speech against the Trump-MAGA agenda – one of the longest in the history of the Senate.**
Senator Booker read a story from a woman in Wisconsin who felt that she was living the American dream with her husband and kids before she was diagnosed with Parkinson’s disease. She pleaded with Senator Booker to protect the Social Security that she relies on to manage the impacts of this degenerative disease.
I almost broke down in tears during this part of the speech, just like Senator Booker did when he thought about his own dad’s struggle with Parkinson’s.
I thought about how my father was diagnosed with Parkinson’s when I was in fifth grade. The only reason my family didn’t go bankrupt was because of the support of Social Security when he couldn’t work anymore. It literally saved our family along with the VA benefits my father had from being a Navy pilot. Which Trump is now coming after too.
My dad passed away last September and I still think about him every day. He was a Navy helicopter pilot and law enforcement officer who spent decades of his life sacrificing holidays, birthdays, and years of family time to protect the American people. I believe our country has an obligation to serve those who serve us.
**What’s happening to Social Security right now is wrong.** While Trump and the MAGA GOP threaten to take away these essential benefits, I want to thank Senator Booker for calling it out, standing up to fight this cruel agenda, and speaking out for families like my own.
This kind of leadership is powerful – and it’s deeply resonant for millions of people across the country with stories like mine. Senator Booker demonstrated exactly how Democrats should be responding: **fighting back _hard,_ in every way possible.**
Peter, thank you again for helping us reach our goal last quarter. We’re going to keep electing leaders who are ready to meet this moment with the urgency it deserves – leaders like Senator Booker, who was just 29 when he was first elected. That work is possible thanks to the continued support from this grassroots team.
Thank you for everything you’re doing,
David Hogg

clean_body: This resonated with me on a deeply personal level. Peter, I can’t thank you enough for helping Leaders We Deserve meet our fundraising goal before the end-of-quarter deadline. But today, I actually want to talk about something different: Senator Cory Booker’s impassioned, marathon speech against the Trump-MAGA agenda – one of the longest in the history of the Senate. Senator Booker read a story from a woman in Wisconsin who felt that she was living the American dream with her husband and kids before she was diagnosed with Parkinson’s disease. She pleaded with Senator Booker to protect the Social Security that she relies on to manage the impacts of this degenerative disease. I almost broke down in tears during this part of the speech, just like Senator Booker did when he thought about his own dad’s struggle with Parkinson’s. I thought about how my father was diagnosed with Parkinson’s when I was in fifth grade. The only reason my family didn’t go bankrupt was because of the support of Social Security when he couldn’t work anymore. It literally saved our family along with the VA benefits my father had from being a Navy pilot. Which Trump is now coming after too. My dad passed away last September and I still think about him every day. He was a Navy helicopter pilot and law enforcement officer who spent decades of his life sacrificing holidays, birthdays, and years of family time to protect the American people. I believe our country has an obligation to serve those who serve us. What’s happening to Social Security right now is wrong. While Trump and the MAGA GOP threaten to take away these essential benefits, I want to thank Senator Booker for calling it out, standing up to fight this cruel agenda, and speaking out for families like my own. This kind of leadership is powerful – and it’s deeply resonant for millions of people across the country with stories like mine. Senator Booker demonstrated exactly how Democrats should be responding: fighting back hard, in every way possible. Peter, thank you again for helping us reach our goal last quarter. We’re going to keep electing leaders who are ready to meet this moment with the urgency it deserves – leaders like Senator Booker, who was just 29 when he was first elected. That work is possible thanks to the continued support from this grassroots team. Thank you for everything you’re doing, David Hogg
